body:
We must protect our country

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=ec111ad5df5f4b84aed97b1043e02399&_e=8V_b--MbcmEnVeOdpFrzHmudoPSJfEbQb87HeocNfT1FYMupNYA0lAdUFOmjepouc1dDEca_JIuq9EjRP4CzQGSuMAshi6Qi5Hv7-fSZ051jnUmJYgJhchrF3RvEIy91_2QiRfnW8yNhwj0oDJ0DStciC17PhXLfbf1dhCghJHzOfsLw4FIpryWdpZzEo1imf9VV52v2aN0DdVeO6P8v--CQxP88RNT9vH3AlMRYiskfKuahWPSqU_51RQMCjrSIDoffcWvAJ0DQy4E0-rCqEnbmqoptN7AStxXBY51GPSk%3D)
---
Friend,

I stand with Texas. Do you? **[Click here to join me in support of Texas securing our Southern Border.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=ec111ad5df5f4b84aed97b1043e02399&_e=8V_b--MbcmEnVeOdpFrzHmudoPSJfEbQb87HeocNfT1FYMupNYA0lAdUFOmjepouc1dDEca_JIuq9EjRP4CzQGSuMAshi6Qi5Hv7-fSZ051jnUmJYgJhchrF3RvEIy910cj03sbLntsSldykj5BNXQlKPPr3AEvu48Ia0EiPeb51B-BqFHuhVN3U-wUYd7eoAOayCU447GSqxAufJNHWiyoRldyTwDRywvXGO0FcEpy_njDOQQhXD6AYwu4Ff0tpaic40tC4OGlM6OlH3dADjIfW582GVRkC4ryo5HWPk9o%3D)**

It is the duty of the President of the United States to enforce our country's laws and uphold the Constitution. Joe Biden and his administration have intentionally maintained their open border policies and put the safety of the American people at risk.

We will never be able to stop the cartels from operating in all 50 states when millions of illegal immigrants are allowed to enter our country unchecked.

The state of Texas and Governor Abbott are exercising their constitutional authority and building a coalition of several states to **[secure the southern border once and for all.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=ec111ad5df5f4b84aed97b1043e02399&_e=8V_b--MbcmEnVeOdpFrzHmudoPSJfEbQb87HeocNfT1FYMupNYA0lAdUFOmjepouc1dDEca_JIuq9EjRP4CzQGSuMAshi6Qi5Hv7-fSZ051jnUmJYgJhchrF3RvEIy91E1nvk7dlIZ4GtDjdIjvemSR1_v6FdzfLcBgFIVgmrcimS8XlgCFrhKgpwcfR7YUCko8eXo1Mb3qLioR0FgJ2sQ9jHXcBlUgNIKHxhbGxYO-aX5a7VmDp5tX6YXSLw52CLRt4NtbmGr1uccD2-UnvRV6nlcelhuu38ihVUQBzIhk%3D)**

**This shouldn 't be a partisan issue, but it is clear Democrats have backed the Biden administration's reckless open border policies that weaken our nation's sovereignty.**

******IF BIDEN DOESN 'T SECURE OUR BORDERS, REPUBLICANS WILL.**** **
| [**SECURE THE BORDER** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=ec111ad5df5f4b84aed97b1043e02399&_e=8V_b--MbcmEnVeOdpFrzHmudoPSJfEbQb87HeocNfT1FYMupNYA0lAdUFOmjepouc1dDEca_JIuq9EjRP4CzQGSuMAshi6Qi5Hv7-fSZ051VMEvKsJ_10ocwHWcJmN5E97z445bvtBInGKFVvpNB3OTlrqK2MqIClX6TBFxSDnGFgWVJnW-p8lj9U2BO13y41WzjNH7O597xFLbef1UC6mZM_kQajKvT-w1FzL8X0D_BDxzEMeZQwlnuEcgfGQgK9md7s19myO-7DxHQIxtv8KmaYfeGU9p8LSPnJ9x_WI4%3D)

name: GOP
subject: Left-wing ideology has poisoned every aspect of life in the United States of America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We need your help!

|
---
Friend,

Our nation is in decline - and make no mistake. It's intentional.

Left-wing ideology has poisoned every aspect of life in the United States of America.

The economy has dipped into the savings of families, our schools are teaching students to hate our country, and political correctness in Washington is infringing on the chances of any common sense policies being passed.

If we can't defeat Democrats in 2024, we will have to play by their rules for more years to come.

But we must not dwell on the past or what could have been -- it's time to heal and focus on our future recovery.

When we elect Republicans with your support, we will hold the House of Representatives while taking back the Senate and White House.

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Journalists call out FALSE ads that try to cripple our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)
Katie Porter is always willing to call out BS, whether it comes from Republicans or Democrats. So when Adam Schiff released an ad that promotes our Republican opponent and claims that two men are the only leading candidates, Katie set the record straight. **[Watch for yourself:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-2?refcode=em20240204-37297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37297_3422442_W5ajmD&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-2?refcode=em20240204-37297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37297_3422442_W5ajmD&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)
Schiff’s ad is a deliberate attempt to consolidate conservative support behind the leading Republican candidate, Steve Garvey. **Because of California’s unique primary, the top two vote-getters, regardless of party, advance to the November general election.** Adam knows he’ll easily beat Republican Steve Garvey if he’s in the general election. But Adam also knows that polling shows Katie has a strong chance of becoming California’s next U.S. Senator so long as we make it out of the primary.
**Right now, Katie and our Republican opponent are in a dead heat in the race to qualify for the general election.**
Ads like the one Schiff released, which attempt to game the system, are why Americans distrust politicians. And with just 25 women in the U.S. Senate, it’s disappointing to see qualified women candidates dismissed like this. **[We can’t let this be the reason we lose Katie’s voice in Congress for good. Is there anything you can donate today to help power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-2?refcode=em20240204-37297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37297_3422442_W5ajmD&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240204-2?refcode=em20240204-37297&refcode2=37297_3422442_W5ajmD&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)
–Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240204-37297&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37297_3422442_W5ajmD&akid=37297%2E3422442%2EW5ajmD)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616

body:
| Reaching millions of undecided voters takes a lot of resources.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5319%2E5257348%2Ev2-PH1)
Derek — It’s go-time here at Schiff HQ.
Our primary is **30** days away. Early voting begins **tomorrow**. And Californians are receiving ballots in the mail as we write.
We’re ramping up our operations across the board — and we’re making big investments in our latest television ad, which sharply contrasts Steve Garvey and Adam Schiff’s visions for our future.
Derek, reaching millions of undecided voters across the Golden State takes a lot of resources.
And with polls showing this race to be _incredibly close_ , and Adam’s celebrity Republican opponent attacking and smearing him on cable news, we need to get ahead of the attacks and make sure Adam advances to the general election.
**[Will you help us expand our next ad buy? Pitch in $10 or anything you can spare right now. name: Briana Sewell
subject: This is a long email, but I hope you’ll still read it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRIANA SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
I wanted to take a moment to explain why I decided to run for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and why I’d be honored to have your support.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78407084/453312521/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTZmZGYwNS1jM2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQlHFZbiH8zQyInHWwDXv5j2sdmJAZWSo67q4mS4Nt8=) This is going to be a longer email, but I wanted to take a moment to explain why I decided to run for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and why I’d be honored to have your support.

**[If you already know you’re with me, use this link to chip in and help me win this race which could determine if Democrats take back the House:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78407085/453312522/-1680305149?refcode=email_020424_bio&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTZmZGYwNS1jM2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQlHFZbiH8zQyInHWwDXv5j2sdmJAZWSo67q4mS4Nt8=)** | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78407086/453312523/-1680305149?refcode=email_020424_bio&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTZmZGYwNS1jM2MzLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQlHFZbiH8zQyInHWwDXv5j2sdmJAZWSo67q4mS4Nt8=)
---
But if you want a little more background information about who I am and what's at stake in this campaign, keep reading:

When I think about all we’re living through right now, I think about what my grandmother saw, organizing in Selma, Alabama, as a foot soldier in the civil rights movement.

I think about what my mother saw when she joined the Air Force after college. She worked so hard and rose to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel.

The women in my family showed me the meaning of strength. They showed me what it means to serve a greater good, and what it means to fight for what you believe in.

That’s why I ran for the House of Delegates. I’m proud to be one of the youngest women ever elected to state office, and I was proud to pass laws to increase support for military families and veterans, add more teachers to the classroom, and expand protections for child victims of sexual assault here in Virginia. Now, I’m leading the fight to pass paid family and medical leave, so no Virginian has to choose between going to work and caring for a family member.

**Unfortunately, we’re seeing a lot less get done in Congress.** It’s broken, and women like my mother and grandmother – and folks across our community – have worked too hard and lived too much history to watch everything we care about slip away.

I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies.

**[But getting to Congress won’t be easy, and we need to win this race if Democrats are going to take back the House. clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to explain why I decided to run for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and why I’d be honored to have your support. = This is going to be a longer email, but I wanted to take a moment to explain why I decided to run for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country, and why I’d be honored to have your support. = | | = But if you want a little more background information about who I am and what's at stake in this campaign, keep reading: When I think about all we’re living through right now, I think about what my grandmother saw, organizing in Selma, Alabama, as a foot soldier in the civil rights movement. I think about what my mother saw when she joined the Air Force after college. She worked so hard and rose to the rank of Lieutenant Colonel. The women in my family showed me the meaning of strength. They showed me what it means to serve a greater good, and what it means to fight for what you believe in. That’s why I ran for the House of Delegates. I’m proud to be one of the youngest women ever elected to state office, and I was proud to pass laws to increase support for military families and veterans, add more teachers to the classroom, and expand protections for child victims of sexual assault here in Virginia. Now, I’m leading the fight to pass paid family and medical leave, so no Virginian has to choose between going to work and caring for a family member. Unfortunately, we’re seeing a lot less get done in Congress. It’s broken, and women like my mother and grandmother – and folks across our community – have worked too hard and lived too much history to watch everything we care about slip away. I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Briana | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Peter, President Biden emailed you this morning about the South Carolina primary and we wanted to make sure you saw it. Here’s the deal: Grassroots supporters are the reason we defeated Donald Trump in 2020. Folks who chipped in back then are the reason we have control of the White House. **And your support today will be why Trump will never be President again.** [Can we count on you to chip in $25? clean_body: | | | Peter, President Biden emailed you this morning about the South Carolina primary and we wanted to make sure you saw it. Here’s the deal: Grassroots supporters are the reason we defeated Donald Trump in 2020. Folks who chipped in back then are the reason we have control of the White House. And your support today will be why Trump will never be President again. Thank you for your support, Team Biden-Harris \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: Joe Biden Date: Sunday, February 4, 2024 Subject: My word as a Biden Peter -- Four years ago, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary. A number of grassroots supporters donated to my campaign shortly after, and that support laid the foundation for our campaign’s eventual victory against Donald Trump. Last night, we won the South Carolina Democratic Primary once again. And if we want to win again this November, I am going to need your help today. My dad used to have an expression -- "It's the lucky person who gets up in the morning, puts both feet on the floor, knows what they are about to do, and thinks it still matters.” Your support matters. Your donation matters. Because I cannot win this race alone against Donald Trump, Peter. I need you with me. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I am going to guess you didn't spring out of bed this morning and shout out loud, "Today is the day I am going to make my first contribution to Joe Biden's reelection!" But that's what I am asking you to do today. Here is my personal link to give: Thank you, Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: Josh Hawley
subject: This is weighing heavily on my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,

As I was praying yesterday, something was weighing heavily on my heart.

I was thinking of everything I am so grateful for - my family, the opportunity to serve the people of Missouri, the food on my table, and having a roof over my head.

We are blessed to live in America, Peter – but right now, Joe Biden is making everyone’s life’s harder.

High Inflation is stripping Americans of their jobs and financial security.

Our open border is forcing law-abiding Americans to fear for their lives at the hands of cartels and traffickers.

In cities across America, citizens are paralyzed in fear of carjackings, assaults, and murders because the Democrats refuse to put criminals behind bars.

I wasn’t put on this Earth to sit back while my fellow Americans suffer. That’s why I’m doing everything I can so we can take back our Republican Senate majority and get to work for the American people.****

**[This is a HUGE mission, and I can’t do it alone. Can you help me out by pitching in just $10 to help us take back our Senate majority and save America from the radical Left?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=f4eb79d147194cd1910e64a5dbacec3c&_e=4BDjtJjgZxBo3uEPqa2EydAbSyoTzGp5vMcXOSLdfqA_iSGjw5YllPq9vI_6XIBId3SdxDBTiM6F6VQuis31H8WsG66dXAoj7uDECdnknQ2gkoRwKUBm1AJMpuE4UuztjqHq_L6OlkUXsC33UCtspLBfFZFPpb07CIJBHZCAHPVEEve73pO9U-UPjTjpNssuB5cvy3zIQszSBN5Hr6tBM-_YjmrnWxhcEBuJnplQ6-Y6IFLVfOFiRz-2pd8b-5q9PXJ7sXKGO5Qgm_wkDE0IvhzjEfJira1FgGSJgwn8_SQmmHOIW6lZgVVk-qD7EWQ2OSDfy1SLJ-oBFYhQG_lgeRFbZ_KvX3vWtPpi2jfqPJU%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, As I was praying yesterday, something was weighing heavily on my heart. I was thinking of everything I am so grateful for - my family, the opportunity to serve the people of Missouri, the food on my table, and having a roof over my head. We are blessed to live in America, Peter – but right now, Joe Biden is making everyone’s life’s harder. High Inflation is stripping Americans of their jobs and financial security. Our open border is forcing law-abiding Americans to fear for their lives at the hands of cartels and traffickers. In cities across America, citizens are paralyzed in fear of carjackings, assaults, and murders because the Democrats refuse to put criminals behind bars. I wasn’t put on this Earth to sit back while my fellow Americans suffer. That’s why I’m doing everything I can so we can take back our Republican Senate majority and get to work for the American people.** ** Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

clean_body: Please look at the chart of the donations we've received from across the country in the last hour. Holy cow! | | | Peter -- Ever since Joe Biden won the South Carolina primary last night, thousands and thousands of people from across the country have contributed to help reelect him and keep Trump out of the White House. We are SO CLOSE to hitting the goals we had coming out of the primary. Can you add one more donation to get us there? Use this link: Please look at the chart of the donations we've received from across the country in the last hour. Holy cow! Every single dot represents someone who has President Biden's back and is chipping in to keep moving our country forward. Now they're hoping you'll do the same before we reach midnight tonight. name: Becky Wagner
subject: They're after my police officer husband
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2i57m4arsefb785kli9cbdoomlhd0m0a068hnl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7s4mqd3isil2cc0v4rjvneud7al2471o5aejkrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbhvq2oi5pt4cor2fnejhu5aivbj05sfce7k1mf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0ks21oc841rtdimv15veqd62qrftmio2tv10fm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr8ebt3uo9eoip6ko83af7j717ca7jqq1qfkj3eg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86utcdrnnn5cf89is8o2lehgmht70lhjagrcjdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu8cgpqo2q81lfp1u0n7f5ur3a8fl9ands8ikeho_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6cdhm8o7246h22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za4siljksttshv73ribbaoc406o9jk6429ok79c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chj60o73chh2bs)_

subject: Nikki Haley herself, tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
St. Croix and by Zoom | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ea065a6f40e/re-hey-9345309?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Chairman Gordon Ackley asked me to send out an exciting update.

Overnight (literally at midnight), **Nikki Haley confirmed she will appear by Zoom at tonight's Commit to Caucus reception on St. Croix at The Buccaneer Hotel.** The reception with free food and drinks begins at 6 p.m. Atlantic.

For those of you on St. John and St. Thomas, I will send a Zoom link later today. Hopefully, you can virtually join us for cocktails at sunset,

See you tonight,

Republican Women's Chairman Val Stiles
---
| | **2024 VIRGIN ISLANDS CAUCUS**
Thursday, February 8 (all voting in-person)
Pre-register to vote by [clicking here](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=c0738d9d63&e=d30db4cde8)
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. Atlantic at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. Atlantic at Bluebeard's Castle, Charlotte Amalie
---

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Money in Politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
There’s not much we all agree on, but nearly every American agrees that there is too much money in politics.
| | | |
---
# Too Much Money in Politics
---
By Mark S. Robertson, candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District.
There's not much we all agree on, but nearly every American agrees that there is too much money in politics. This results in a system where money interests outweigh the needs of everyday Americans. Politicians can easily become responsive to the wishes of their deep-pocketed donors rather than to the people they are meant to represent. We need to stop this!
Here are a few examples of excesses in political campaigns:
* Last election, a sitting member of Congress gave me this advice: "If you're not in debt at the end of your campaign, then you are not doing it right."
* The campaign of a candidate running against me in this year's Republican primary is already $1.25 million in debt.
* A Democrat in California spent more than $25 million in 2022 to win a seat in Congress.
This is out of control! Imagine how many homeless veterans we could care for with $25 million.
You'll be pleased to know that my campaign has money in the bank and zero debt. During the 2022 Republican Primary, I was outspent by many other candidates, yet I still won by nearly a two-to-one margin over the closest competitor. This was possible because of the grassroots efforts of the thousands of people who know and support me.
This is the advantage of having strong ties to our community. I don't have high-priced consultants or paid campaign workers. People freely volunteer their time, talents, and means to support our campaign. As a result, most of the contributions to my campaign come from people in Nevada. In contrast, most of the contributions to one of my competitors come from California.
We need people in Washington who "walk the talk." It is easy for a candidate to claim he is "against deficit spending" or wants to "balance the budget" while he does the exact opposite in his campaign.
I spent two decades as a financial planner helping Nevadans get out of debt, live within a budget, and reach their financial goals. I walk the talk in my personal life and will continue as I represent you in Washington D.C.
If you like this message and want a member of Congress who walks the talk, please forward this email to as many people as possible.

*******
---

We all chose to take time out of our day to email you because frankly, this is mission critical. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f09b2ae18b5abceaaa4be6b9a9c81046d009fd3b98663becd7660c2f32a2cc67989de1159597f22b7163b32beebe2cc3fdcb383c8caacd0a0 We’re from all over the country, but what unites us all is that we all felt compelled to continue to serve our country even after being discharged from the Navy. We are all political outsiders. We built a life and a career outside of politics, but after seeing the Democrats’ disastrous leadership and backwards vision for our country, we all felt called to serve once again. This time, our service looked much different. There’s a saying in the Navy, “Not self, but country.” We will always put America before ourselves. This means speaking up when we see government bureaucracy, working overtime for the American people, and oftentimes criticizing the Democrats and their harmful policies. For these reasons, the Democrats want to kick us out of Washington. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f09b2ae18b5abceaaa4be6b9a9c81046d009fd3b98663becd7660c2f32a2cc67989de1159597f22b7163b32beebe2cc3fdcb383c8caacd0a0 However, we hope that you’ll cover our six and donate by midnight to help us hit our major goal to keep us fighting for you in the Swamp! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f09b2ae18b5abceaaa4be6b9a9c81046d009fd3b98663becd7660c2f32a2cc67989de1159597f22b7163b32beebe2cc3fdcb383c8caacd0a0 DONATE $3 TO THESE 3 Navy VETS >> https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f2eed04bc97dc1109781059dbd0ade8cc1aaa9e97fe55e4afe3490ddf219c2881fe5f84bc000030e7fd151166e87849d464cacfd7cd8f087f DONATE $30 TO THESE 3 Navy VETS >> https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f37ed878760bd7911f0ffcb05adacf7cee7410f39e887200e3a9fa1bfad3518de10dbd2b2581b991c6d900e71b07c833dff9d1e7fb7fe15bb DONATE $50 TO THESE 3 Navy VETS >> https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120ff65024f1fa2da8423b02ae4e1d3e24d989c34955384b2e02d96bee652822661afc008d4a484c413a06ecff467763ca8285105cafc9af3c6a DONATE $120 TO THESE 3 Navy VETS >> https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120fb3eaf363907d34dc92674921f569db21e7a2c2b5a07712dd7c789b847c6027e5764613cbf416cfb622a7121be64e22b330830ab6b7144788 DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO THESE 3 Navy VETS >> If the Democrats got their way, our government would be by the millionaires, for the millionaires. Sending in a donation to the three of us would be such a huge help to make sure our government continues to be by the people, for the people. We didn’t set out to join politics. Most of us never had given it much thought. However, after seeing the crisis firsthand in Washington, we will fight tooth and nail to stay here and fight the DC status quo. Not self but country, Derrick Van Orden (R-WI) Brandon Williams (R-NY) Jen Kiggans (R-VA) https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120f45f5a9c2eb4d22a8ac5ebcd9a9dbd713f29e40ee8a2dbca8f02069a3d45b832e81ff41c341a59faf45acb3226f43aab852ee7cfcb5951725 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120fda3c257df102cfccc25aefef6e8a6798ec87652cbe907f495acc07c3f55365f12355b20e9f31cb801c9a75db41f66d483636f648c58b73d3 >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=531f5006ab46120fd3fd20457d6de8e594bdc862f0511589bf8261d482e47004da0061bbda96a950b128430f23989ef1986d111254f3eb93b6bcdb0c4eda2ad9 here . **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

February 5, 2024
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjudFT_LR4kF4Uy3VCHwZ62hOaFlA2v_gLvLUxkSCT2m2r3QUO-8Xvwv6UBSoZ30RXYFAaeUVI-frtdUVBLkpCOPL3yq5TRtII7fLnh5Hh-z3E&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==)
---
| Gold Dome Download February 5, 2024
Good morning! In this second issue of the Gold Dome Download, we dive into major legislation under consideration with an important impact on education, elections, the economy, and public safety.
We are particularly excited about the work that has been done to date on public safety and to enhance voter confidence in our elections. If you have any questions about the legislation presented below or about any bills not mentioned in the letter, please feel free to email us at [info@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:info@greatergeorgia.com).
---
|
---
| NEW: The Legislative Lowdown
We're excited to bring you a new social media series: The Legislative Lowdown! Get all the highlights from last week at the Georgia General Assembly in less than 30 seconds. Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjuW2MJwAfGq4LJcTIvQzpl0WZovKULTQX03pFmia9AOhdJOpUlz8466RD26DYFufllAavDT38p3qlt16GMK3vu7V7T_9101dp7ma5qXiAuslm7jXeieTBE_mB6D66UbgTtCxinf82wlWOjeiJ7Wfl_84=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==) or on the image below to watch!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjuW2MJwAfGq4LJcTIvQzpl0WZovKULTQX03pFmia9AOhdJOpUlz8466RD26DYFufllAavDT38p3qlt16GMK3vu7V7T_9101dp7ma5qXiAuslm7jXeieTBE_mB6D66UbgTtCxinf82wlWOjeiJ7Wfl_84=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==)
---
| |
---
| Signed into Law
Last week, Governor Brian Kemp signed the historic antisemitism bill, HB30, into law. The legislation - which was a bipartisan effort by lawmakers in the House and Senate - makes antisemitism a hate crime in Georgia.
"There is no place for hate in this great state," Governor Kemp said during the bill signing ceremony at the State Capitol. "In Georgia, we stand with our Jewish brothers and sisters, today and every day."
To read about the new law, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjuW2MJwAfGq4LFHtVqsitol6P-YReek_hqysT0F60g1FDtT43x6b0zz5dxyrJ8Z0z_QlarFSIblxwrFcJU4EIhXnvZOhfMxm0k-ayjqDYDNQM4gEoqUew_5ZJ1tDt8G5kb5Rnj2xTtlkZcClcOY-cVM8N0h9rPw_TT6HO0Mrumexy&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==).
---
---
| |
---
| Legislation on the Move
Elections Senate Bill 358 About: A bill to remove the Secretary of State from the State Election Board Sponsor: Senator Max Burns To read the bill, [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjudODkoZanRm4xeI266srW9MaRIuhnygTltQhX77PsmHAe_lKv5Kl6tMLKcxgWOkdbEhLmqNKz9MBF-pwQJR6DTDwUYnQU19Nlrv--gArZW2Olo3sOu0BPcQ=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==). Status: Passed the Senate
House Bill 976 About: A bill to require watermark security paper for ballots used in optical scan voting systems Sponsor: Representative John LaHood To read the bill, [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjuW2MJwAfGq4LRT8498JysEO9-uC8rLBLB3iCjaYNja2qBhRopsMXvlImNn9Jdwhf6h5ya9Kl8qxVmDqARzs6BU7fK8ydezxvH2pcAhbcobbXhCKxNwS8irI=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==). Status: Passed the House
Public Safety House Bill 881 About: A bill to amend the Prosecuting Attorneys Qualifications Commission Sponsor: Representative Joseph Gullett To read the bill, [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjudODkoZanRm4iZxS0SZJsJAeh-jis93Sq12N9pYNMf7DkDlUxB9wy2Oi8Z6UUapPGtfNSw6R8NKeug_NvTU1pzZyUK1kwELg_R_IEiscEHKPmoP5pXJeCtE=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==). Status: Passed the House
Senate Bill 63 About: A bill to end no-cash bail for serious crimes Sponsor: Senator Randy Robertson To read the bill, [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IfJGhOWJZIg8j6iqVC2x6wqmk3oR7q426zl7H_CsYKvgAHXZNuwjucf6JnRI0RlGyk026VaTNlGJkRqM_sMjRuixnxX0vD4x58GFn_PQyl0G4-VbnqAf-krnMMBJQrgWn7lv-cG571LD92_Z6l6gno_Z_7curmYPOACFX1fEHDk=&c=21_cUzqvIfXitLHLUCVCOW4_P6RETlAKlGg8IjnFOKawIWO_puXiBQ==&ch=Kc7fQo9eSJNhkdouz7TOh54XgQB_8OXxIe9_5ulqlPtMDQN9balPew==). Status: Passed the Senate
Senate Resolution 465 About: A bill to create a special Committee on Investigations to probe allegations of misconduct in Fulton County. ### Chairman Richard Smith (R-Columbus)
Last week, the Georgia General Assembly lost a true leader. Our hearts break for the family and friends of House Rules Chairman Richard Smith.
First elected in 2004, Chairman Smith served the 139th District - which includes parts of Muscogee and Harris Counties - for close to two decades. He was one of the most influential lawmakers in Georgia politics, having served as the House Rules Chairman since 2020.
He will be remembered as a steadfast conservative, a great Georgian, a proud servant of Columbus, and a friend to many. He leaves behind a great legacy, and our prayers are with his family, friends, and colleagues.

**Good Morning**! On this day in 1869, miners in Australia found the largest alluvial gold nugget ever discovered. Known as the "Welcome Stranger," the nugget weighed 3,123 troy ounces and measured 2 feet by 1 foot in size. ## Joe Rogan Gets $250 Million Deal
Popular podcast host Joe Rogan has signed a [new, multi-year $250 million deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO4yAQgOGnwd1YMAbbKSguBVeccu2WFoGxTYTBwiRW3n6Vrbf-ml__12262RBDWv7bjXSd82RdDS-aEBSgnGTj9UyE1DWkxcAHITvZy2bVdzvfXTeMwnsx3m0_dqiUkxfrlO_GHpugkaPkyJXgqlfYCjHgMDor1OycpAuTnHyoubSPHFJdaY7v_KLSurw1Ua-17gfr_jA0DM15nu12pI8xNJTgeTA0W070ZmhyXakwNI9MUPJiEyxUD0h0wrHnGuY3eLIRzlzqCs8dagZUHLYQY8iJobEFrlex_iX81xTt9_MjRz8wyZfNhvgTVX879B0AAP__wPlndQ) with Spotify that will make his show, the nation's most popular podcast, available over other platforms, including YouTube and Apple Podcasts. The deal changes how Rogan will be compensated, giving him a revenue share of ad sales plus an upfront minimum guarantee. For Spotify, it guarantees not only Rogan's massive audience but also a chance to share in the revenues from the new platforms. It's a vindication for Rogan, who has [come under fire in the past](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_GbETH-QBnYOiSLV07Whc4EiJiLBslyt9X6dzx6Q1Pej_n-cylluX6zQ8JPbeZYy9PmVFbjTSTSiGLoIxKgvHgDY3kSN0CQpogOSDL4DN6C3K8ACdyCcSZpEpAQAIEa8A6iwdjPPopsrE5RpLjQCCp9LYd7q0s_Sa5vttTtkNsD1XDrfd1H8avAU8Dnnhd5LV_1Ae2XmKVAU_3JnprV170vrZe8lsn4aq9ywyC8ZjoYkafrQHCyeIk7BDdRW0hra9Sa9mdHwiuDy71r9v_m_AbAAD__5jUWxA) for statements about vaccinations and other culture-war issues. At one point, several famous musicians pulled their music from Spotify in protest.
## Poll: Biden Trailing on Key Issues
A new NBC News poll shows President Biden trailing Donald Trump on several key policy issues, including by more than 20 points on [which candidate would better handle the economy.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ_G7rBgwSYpKP7GXf72SovAGvaEwTIkVt7-5KuvGY000qeZ-XosD0uJcvhvNzRtLYt1jd64ABsZqEX13qyIgLJHIzTXQkk1qT4aLVGpVUiQ8sal9Hcu7cRv0iPXFr3oyQAHxYGPgo_TCIMQGvTNWTGuzim8d4qjp1aO4btQbhHX9ClvPAZXtj6Z2NpeO_mvg7mD-TzPweWnu8IO5gvdwczhksvtJSUGnO0XinlcyVFjJbNos78GMnQll-3DIoWYKMRW2ZM85spqO14hJKzMBku5NtaO17YPsW2pP4zfT0qJ6qQ7xcNmKf02bH_d9RMAAP__uIxr0Q) The poll also shows Trump holding a 16-point lead over Biden on being competent and effective. ## Tucker Carlson Spotted In Moscow
The reported appearance of Tucker Carlson in Moscow has sparked speculation over whether he's there [to interview Russian President Vladimir Putin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAUAH8N3rDwM7bjgeHL4G-o0rWjReARvwaDBSSo_fVVOne64ZbTfVzWiyZP4faud1TFxVWbQk9cgQ8c5CobqxwiYN-g6iYxdbKXo2w21eM4T06gBbQGZhyvGmZ7GkEIBz3YhhQIkALE0IlhHKDtugmmk9Hd4IyRODMp0FKJqf2MFMqGzn_FJ6bWxL3xaivlyKz_x2BhsNRa2z2Hl2OwYOCPzGAJWF-oMXnLYCkPc8fEjU4-x8CvSOHG8xFLQcsp8D1mEyvPh073zF3C8E1oeT7QPLwuFAODRSd-Pnfb2_5_a5KyRyXvKY8Tk-K2a_K_eeWvVz8BAAD__4ydbQI). Carlson hasn't commented, nor has Russian media. Carlson was spotted at the Bolshoi Ballet in Moscow on Feb. 1, according to Russian media. He has said before that he tried to get an interview with Putin in 2023 and was stopped by the U.S. government. The possibility of Carlson interviewing Putin while Russia is at war with Ukraine brought quick criticism. [Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu3DAQAL-G6vZA7pFSUqiICwEB4rQpDzS1PK3Dh7DkHeG_D5za1RRTzfx5vb16Tlzuv32mtcd686Hzk24IDtDe7LSvkQjpOtFqFr0Ye7WznY51fqOFNLl5cRHdbjCgQ1xM1BRm--YmXlGj1aid0W52eDFmweVb8MbFECx9V1bTzr3K5b1y6QfF9FGfJJdQ85TWo_ezqesPhZvCbYxxya18OoUbFXg0hVuh8YlRJe0KN6ETspf3KkzQ_UeqAnchKgQ7RSp7g34QnFLbSaFDjdAf4S8JBC-p1QJcOsmTaXC5w_noXMBn3kEeuUqDg4AbcIFcW6hD4eYFXl7M8SvFn5Os-zk4JW7zoqy-Z8_pf0z_6uy_AAAA__-5-X3e) defended Carlson from the attacks: _" We have a free press in this country.'"_

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: devastating
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I’m sure you’ve heard the news. . .

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-y/)
Last week, President Biden’s Department of Justice (DOJ) prosecuted six pro-life defendants who were individually found guilty of violating the FACE Act and one count of “conspiracy against rights” in a federal trial held in Nashville, Tennessee.

While turning a blind eye to all the violent threats I’ve received – _and all of the attacks on Pregnancy Help Centers since Roe v. Wade’s reversal_ – President Biden’s (DOJ) is doing all they can to intimidate pro-lifers.

These charges mean that the defendants could each spend up to 11 years in prison!

Though their lawyers are looking to appeal to a higher court to have the charges dismissed, I’m doubtful that the Abortion Lobby would let any pro-lifer off that easily – _especially with President Joe Biden’s corrupt Department of Justice in their back pocket._

There is, however, one person who can expunge these pro-lifers’ records. . .

That person is President Donald Trump.

Pro-Life Friend, it’s time for you and me to insist that President Trump promise to pardon these protestors if elected President.

**[If you agree, will you please CLICK HERE to sign your “PARDON THE POLITICAL PRISONERS” Petition to President Trump right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-j/)?**

As you’ll see, this petition insists that, if he’s elected this fall, the first people he pardons are all the pro-lifers who are being punished by this out-of-control pro-abortion administration!

They LOVE to use the FACE Act to “throw the book” at pro-lifers just like those I told you about.

While these protestors did violate the FACE Act, this law is meant to protect Pregnancy Help Centers too.

But it virtually never is.

When violent pro-abortion extremist groups like Antifa or Jane’s Revenge – _who threatened to shoot up one of our training events in Nebraska_ – assault pro-lifers, vandalize property, and even fire-bomb Pregnancy Help Centers, the DOJ drags its feet just to investigate, let alone prosecute them.

That should make your blood boil – __it sure makes mine_!_

Pro-Life Friend, last summer 5 pro-life activists were found guilty of the exact same crimes as the 6 pro-lifers who were just convicted this week.

_Have you noticed the pattern here yet?_

In the aftermath of that conviction, President Trump went on the record saying:

_“Marxists and Stalinists in the administration got a Washington, D.C., jury to convict five pro-life activists who are now facing up to 11 years in prison for simple acts of protest.”_
He followed that by making a **_BIG**_ promise to pro-lifers everywhere:

_“To reverse these cruel travesties of justice, tonight I’m announcing that the moment I win the election, I will appoint a special task force to rapidly review the cases of every political prisoner who’s been unjustly persecuted by the Biden administration. . . so that I can study the situation very quickly and sign their pardons or commutations on Day One!”_
Now, you and I need to make sure President Trump follows through on his promise to pardon “every political prisoner who’s been unjustly persecuted by the Biden administration” on the first day he returns to office.

**[So, can you please join thousands of pro-lifers in signing your “PARDON THE POLITICAL PRISONERS” Petition to President Trump](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-i/)** to hold him to his word on promising to pardoning pro-life activists if he’s elected?

**[And once you sign, if you could please make a generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ in the amount of $250, $100, $50, $25, or even $10 I would be very grateful](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-d/)!**

For these courageous pro-lifers who are being unfairly targeted, Trump’s promise to pardon them may be the only thing between them and over a decade of imprisonment.

So, it’s up to us to hold him accountable so he keeps his word.

It’s up to us to make sure he pardons them all on **_DAY 1**_ like he promised he would.

So, can you please join thousands of pro-lifers in signing your **[“PARDON THE POLITICAL PRISONERS” Petition to President Trump](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-h/)** to hold him to his word on promising to pardon pro-life activists if he’s elected?

**[And once you sign, please consider making a generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to _Students for Life Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-k/).**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

**[Sign your Petition to President Donald Trump!<<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sdukkiy-duchtdja-u/)**

name: Becky Wagner
subject: They're after my police officer husband
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrYoGSRGlI7LfFzP5OuyIvyUaI_YjLDfhGJSS6UeQ3XAAWqtPX4Q9U5_a_NapDw1QvxzQtLFsUqDH1uIKErkx85HNiR7xjvmNHRI2cE19nloQ84Qr2nyAXUap-DfL41iFc_f_TZop0g_Oa-TK6vOfeHyoI3_5Ca7numHhdEPrsDuLY%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrYJq04fJAMk0DEqW-q21dymOshLpF3a6PB93atnQOs5nuvo3TPyreJ8M6wSiezusQ3EXalqWGsUte_PQqwvUjqhonxACJYeiHlrOYLrCEdGNLn1jmqHQu9G5SZ-TEnmFQM7Hz4xlOsiBecvxTsUnzIAAUmQgn4PozeCPb8PtyCIg0%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrYELeBbql24fPKE7KxipR0b-4Z8TPSy3G6QYgFz1Ydc1SzxzqlRWbrVjQBI7ocio4pFCqZV9CJZcFu8MLIW-hWO-iwxlSwSeJO1PqPrS5f2Ttbc6Guu9ROj-QqmocwWe8wlrCHc8cgNrDWykcECqcPY4XSDPJsQqHSjyGfCYfjP18%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrY4YBs-z06RJ8UmU-oJ5sp19ChDjrK2r1VFNW_ghCs2nFXX5csXtp6bIiRmoNbusdTI3kOc0G5CUqW-GfpRtX51NIPhm5yA2Os8LRgssvNf35Oxlhx11NpGYhg3WJZhCfeiw1wEA3MNY41K3fPlxzlPSuDcjAAwFKN4KWYTe3nhTY%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrYLVUpmMsck0i1u0WSWIJRq2GL0Fjwf4no27EHFoSYkXRwlqqAqXIbDPu32MvzMxIhOlPB2sb72U7vyNoTpeYfHsd0nd-XBJcuKpFg4wZ7BGwQenS7nHbo74JkNdwI2GLr1roNxfjr5_2LPcE5H1vM6FnXEOHhpWQwX2TgsebWHZM%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqIkdonM3ApGGdHoepdEPeKqtJO_UpIgwIXe6LN30EVH7eB1WE-y8FHqcDmu13KTvyNbil1Pzr9VcaTvyl1UmRbBB0oMw99ZFkgR6B8_y1jMqXZ4d7ZbkZa0t08tLUilS2Los4IU3990Vp5Vckhj2Awazk85uWWpJTibdsAr61mrYZpqD6imy3q4S_2lIXOqU72I2jc684B0GiF8BfpLqlPhoYvaSO10CEe-0lk6EbaTkPMCgEebOGfyaJfrY3M4N5kcXANBc8s5DXEJb9BvkKKfARJew8Ql8nbIUmbrOagM_LVSXp-9EQm1Ke_Hm1Q87OQmKi-dgIaaKCysx9WtmGI8%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_t=wICwYasR5HPzRCAwUDilK-3q8VfG2L0yrYohX7_f6u0bNs5-1xccd5qJnYQbkCkStwDub0JTHY07tCz77xzB00Pw97vO6Og7NkUkJr-eYhUIl05P4ksJbOOCJj_k-8idigvY0EWHgd1mWXNmmPDMxIvrIggWTSEnBUK-kJJcyhw%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=xlBFm1-mn5u6VZopJ1y_tHpyvhC-6uJMnlT66vfzmoZJfNTtjMSFd1qmunB2pW3ZBeNh2mvpoMzrA6P4tGqxc1kUQtTAaTOCNWd4JjYd5SJrNspEnI-BRwvY91veuBqM6-Vqwt7dJBEY9XFTcnrOd7f2Q2mDbNVjoOHhxmLJHxyS3Y8ekGg8gZZGUu6b5JQj-9P1KqQ2xi5edPs-0V1CF04iXase8RYFNV5lQzZFJT_sMsm7Rnmf-Ml9A-ytgwqmEtCCfzXig-jpAs0N_BoUb8t6GFYHaQgewamqik8Sd7g%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2b089c10c1a4fb4b0a139d33cc6e833&_e=vxFYdDk2oZPWUaWEq1foqH7T0J9Ioxcd4J97VQdDdOHNyfuoOO1lNwpkye0LR22fiIQQxjZYMg3c_Tg-96kbHTVjTtP92sLngXcO4gxd3w6Gg18FMHApP_LVODZy9vS_mRelVBhee_RE7daf2cEt38xYECC4PMdyVvVBt3YyR8ll34POsclZFQ3kBGehdVt2kTW31exiMNNAJ_r6gwvzZ3XL6UNMpS9bLV1pMo9x578%3D)_

In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do. This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others. Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: DEADLINE: State Delegate forms due Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
The deadline to become a delegate at the 2024 Indiana Republican Convention is this week!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/crouchdelegateforms?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=8789cb7e23-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_15_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-769f51c8db-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
,

The deadline to be a delegate at the 2024 Indiana Republican State Convention is this Friday at 12 PM.

Join Suzanne's fight to Axe the Tax, protect Indiana farmland from Communist China, and advocate for the most vulnerable: the unborn, the elderly, the disabled, and those struggling with mental illness and addiction.

We need your help!
If you'd like to be a state convention delegate, download the forms, fill them out, notify your County Chair, and take the forms to your local county clerk's office by Friday at 12 PM.
DOWNLOAD DELEGATE FORMS (https://ci.criticalimpact.com/user/41633/image/CAN-37__2024_revision_.FILLABLE.pdf?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=8789cb7e23-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_15_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-769f51c8db-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
Thank you for joining Suzanne's fight for faith, family and freedom!

- Team Crouch
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The latest FEC reports just dropped and we need to fill you in IMMEDIATELY:

| |

---
| | | Friend - the latest FEC reports just dropped and we need to fill you in IMMEDIATELY:
❌ House Democrats just announced a $12.3 million fundraising haul in the final stretch of last year - their warchest is now **OVERFLOWING** with $120+ million

❌ Joe Biden's favorite Super PAC just pledged a **QUARTER BILLION DOLLARS** to destroy Republicans up and down the ballot.

❌ We're trailing behind them by millions of dollars and we just missed our **VERY FIRST** deadline of the year - if we don't get it together and now, maybe we don't deserve to hold the Majority.
But while the Democrat Machine is schmoozing billionaires and special interests to fill up their warchests, we're calling on our strong grassroots army to kick it into HIGH GEAR!

_Here 's the plan:_

_**[We're activating MILLION-DOLLAR FUNDRAISING BLITZ between now and the end of the month. It's ambitious - we know. But that's the absolute minimum we need to push our Conservative candidates over the top in key battleground districts.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdo3je2994lnkpuvgvjpq671k0ape38p30ni0lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs "We’re activating MILLION-DOLLAR FUNDRAISING BLITZ between now and the end of the month. It’s ambitious – we know. But that’s the absolute minimum we need to push our Conservative candidates over the top in key battleground districts.")**_

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We'll amplify our positive vision for the future of our country, reach more independent voters in swing states, and turn out more Conservatives to the polls.

**IF WE FAIL:** We'll be forced to GUT our get-out-the-vote operations, SLASH our critical voter contact programs, and pull our ads OFF THE AIR.

What happens this month could determine the course of our country for generations to come.

Can we count on you to help out?
---
**[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvfaihf3ec0ufhs55lmj8e5a6etkfqkqit245a88_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrmr8qf378liodue6h9156nusgo4nbs0bqsqqm7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8sibtfse1venuggsse14e1d1j3g1rpltm4tbib0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs)**
---
To victory,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdhc4gkbvopqjsoq11h6er3af2bvhhkpku5kakig_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

I'm launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr0ral256b3srlgh8ug93n53qfoplhsln4qpolbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsjkseju5i8sh7hg7lqfchs39qukt2dhirho74sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob6c5h2bs "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm8bimimtpmu66fun6410vbn7qs1l62e4pak6g30_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5sssiof2ii4gp01iqlldv41dn1vah06kf3jmkio_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu14eg27e3m334u4je8bladsesd4pf1da3ug8c5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklv9jklouh3lf4utqoovo6fl2bfo681d77sbjto_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zej820mt5cn6pvf04nt87a7kpgqa7vsk05rqm860_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ab7s99f5hbq7alfe1nph8lfntduboki6essft0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbdpnidldhkc57rcn82meg1d07jhnf2sadqgvm6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zetnapb7gsuc4b4brb4e8igb3ne2fbmombtkdda8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcisv0jq1oipou91mvfgpbonod7chvmdoa1eh3to_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150Irvine, CA 92618
---
| |
---
|
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zivi51vcbges58ch6u36nkeg0369ruat84ako550_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj6cdjm4pb246h22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrtnejud284idak2iv8csvt8c7ofndd2v1r3s0tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim4ob1c1h2bs)_

Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

In today’s public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we’re dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That’s why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers.**

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I’d like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage’s _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LTJmZThmOGFjZWRiYjRiM2VhMjIyN2Y0YzRkOGE2YTBiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2dldC15b3VyLWZyZWUtZm91bmRlcnMtYWxtYW5hYy1lYm9vay8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZvdW5kZXJzYWxtYW5hYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aW1hZ2VfQUVfRkZPNDYxODMifQ/urCz7K7bSzFev17eeehwWA)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

# Cost of Living

Peter - every year, and especially in reeling from the Covid-19 pandemic, things are getting harder for families to afford.

Housing costs continue to rise while wages remain stagnant.

Healthcare continues to be out of reach for many Americans.

And our representatives that are sent to Washington, D.C., are not addressing these common issues. Instead, we see divisive rhetoric and culture war talking points used as scapegoats to avoid the real problems that impact everyday Americans.

The people across this great nation and those in District 8 of Texas deserve someone that will fight for their ability to maintain a healthy, normal life.

[**Peter, if you are ready to see that representation in our state is changed, then please chip in today. Every dollar counts and impacts our ability to see that we can make a real difference in the lives of those in our** **community.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=d027867602&e=a2a46ff12c)

\- Laura

ambitious – we know. But that’s the absolute minimum we need to push our
Conservative candidates over the top in key battleground districts.")**_

**IF WE SUCCEED:** We’ll amplify our positive vision for the future of our country, reach more independent voters in swing states, and turn out more Conservatives to the polls.

**IF WE FAIL:** We'll be forced to GUT our get-out-the-vote operations, SLASH our critical voter contact programs, and pull our ads OFF THE AIR.

What happens this month could determine the course of our country for generations to come.

Can we count on you to help out?
---
**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683707%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tfCovWUXuZfGeugviuB%2fPA&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683708%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0AlxpXC9iQDHB7NOMVHumg&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683709%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TTAf0nLtro%2bvpUox%2fae8cA&sysid=1)**
---
To victory,

House Republicans

SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I’m humbly asking you to provide any feedback you’d be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

Majority Leader Steve Scalise
