name: Team Kennedy
subject: Upcoming Events, Rallies, and a Special Message from RFK Jr.!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events and rallies and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Tucson, Arizona](https://www.kennedy24.com/tucson-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=3) \- Monday, February 5th at 6:30 PM
An exciting chance to see RFK, JR. speak about our fight to get on the ballot in AZ and hear how he will heal the divide in our government. You won’t want to miss this opportunity!
[Jackson Hole, Wyoming](https://www.kennedy24.com/jackson-hole?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=4) \- Thursday, February 8th at 4:30 PM
The private reception with RFK, JR. will include Jackson Hole’s finest wine and most delicious bites. Join us for a special Q&A session and get your picture with the future President!
[Grand Rapids, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/grand-rapids-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=5) \- Saturday, February 10th at 1:00 PM
Don't miss the thrilling opportunity to see RFK, Jr. discuss our efforts to secure a spot on the MI ballot and unveil his platform of truth and honesty. Join us for an event you won't want to miss!
[Detroit, Michigan](https://www.kennedy24.com/detroit-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=6) \- Saturday, February 10th at 6:30 PM
Experience an exclusive evening of support and connection at a private reception. Enjoy heavy hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, inspiring remarks, and a unique photo opportunity with RFK, Jr.
[Bergen County, New Jersey](https://www.kennedy24.com/bergen-county?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=7) \- Saturday, February 17th at 6:30 PM
Attend an exclusive event in the Metropolitan NYC area, offering a rare opportunity for an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. with hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, and photo opportunities.
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=8) \- Wednesday, February 21rd at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts "A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr." Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=9) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: How I Would Fix The Border Crisis Immediately
Last week on Fox & Friends, I explained why the border crisis has become so unsustainable and what I will do immediately as president to fix this humanitarian nightmare.
When I visited the border in Yuma, Arizona last year, I saw the problems causing the crisis in real time. Here are the facts: The number of migrants crossing the border is at an all-time high. The physical barriers in the most highly-populated crossing zones have huge gaps. Border Patrol is utterly demoralized. And the Migrant Protection Act is no longer in effect.
Does the Biden administration seem to care about any of this? No. I will take immediate action to address what’s causing the border crisis and this humanitarian nightmare on day one of my presidency.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/border-fix-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=10)
|
* * *
---
| Discover our latest [Kennedy 2024 merchandise](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqY7clOS3V4M0N_bQWU4eY8DgZmNXgu4AttV9MFg0k6JcR2JpbU0SSSY73_ba7eAF81VBGDm_EG8iBpER_1eW0Ik5ag5GQ5A2g3b60ZgoTu_b1kzAoQ1D2o2OIfYbyzYf8Q&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=11), suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future.
---
---
* * *
Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House.
[DONATE >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?=&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=12)
|
* * *
---
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=13) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=14) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=15) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=16) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=17)
---
---
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=18) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024!
Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!
| |
---
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

Would you like help donating?
Call: [805-728-9443](tel:8057289443) and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_4_24_nd1&n=19).

Biden Has Cracked Down On Big Business Mergers And Monopolies. Are
Americans Better Off Because Of It?

The Biden administration has pursued a more aggressive antitrust
approach than previous administrations, filing numerous lawsuits

name: ICYMI News
subject: Bring The Federalist Papers to your home
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl9g0si4sb0c8vd056n02lbf4rps2kp60714g6sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztjr6ga7pschfdub9do69q8sa1sq8mcu9ppmoqso_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za5t94p6dohr8dp951onsepr0jkehu0aplho0lfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlaohtca2b5bk1gbtpgim1g670ukvud7h29s6eg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5v49sequ6ioh8pp5tng7pdgb44kh77t532l3tho_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4r4qh1kl98ooid91l9m2la0qem8l54omj1l7jgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chimeo72c9h2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|

Dear Concerned American},

Should so-called doctors be allowed to sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children – even children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be permitted to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse often behind the backs of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in America. In fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a Missouri Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children sent for "gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in the last five years.

**That's why I'm emailing you today asking you to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and Senators demanding they take immediate action to ban the transgender child sexual mutilation and chemical castration procedures**.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul Broun, and I’m more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology that has swept through our schools, media, and entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between children and their parents and destroying family morality and faith.

Will you join with millions of pro-family Citizens to defend our children from transgender child sexual mutilation?

**[Click here to sign the petition to Congress demanding they ban all gender transition procedures for minors immediately](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1MTE80NjE4NSJ9/6IBUeVmoc6IBL-f0WrrBWA)**!

Puberty blockers, hormone supplements, and drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures with horrific side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And in a sea of lies and misinformation, few adults understand the true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender lobby wants them confused and isolated from any dissenting voices. *** _I've seen an entire generation of youth_ come out of their schools confused and assaulted by the transgender ideology attacking gender and their sense of self, persuading them to seek poisonous and severely harmful procedures to change their bodies to "fit in" with the transgender world. *** **I've seen families torn to pieces as the newest generation of children, who are fed radical transgender values with their cereal, clash with bewildered parents over a child's so-called" gender identity."** *** _In a growing number of States_ , children are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations or chemical castrations from their parents by teachers and counselors. *** _Meanwhile, the transgender lobby_ rabidly shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or studies on the harmful effects of child sexual mutilation. *** _They even more rabidly suppress_ any study of the massive number of children who abandon gender transition after the fact...

... and are left with bitter regrets, twisted bodies and awful consequences. _The best way to put a stop to it all is by passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering these procedures to minors_.

Our children, the most vulnerable members of our society, are being conned into irreversible procedures that alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or identity – it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are not equipped with the life experience or emotional maturity to make such grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about their bodies and their futures.

**[Sign your petition today demanding Congress step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1MTE80NjE4NSJ9/Q80jYA8nDRrD_eeaTtl9gA)**.

14 states have already passed bans on transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being challenged in court.

But states like California and New York will not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling for blood at the restrictions being placed on them.

**That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.**

The success of this campaign relies on the power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

**[So please, sign your petition, share, and chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO recruit more signers and win the fight](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1MTE80NjE4NSJ9/7lVyr1DmUBnftsZqn3986g)**.

In addition to recruiting more petition signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution will help fund:
* _Hard-hitting advertisements_ to highlight and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender centers.
* _Targeted petition deliveries_ to key elected officials demanding they take action to defend children.
* _Phone calls to likely supporters_ to raise awareness and recruit new members.
* _Radio and TV ads_ exposing everything the transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds permit.

So once you have signed, I ask that you make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO’s fight to stop child sexual mutilation.

**[So please sign your petition, share, and chip in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100 today](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1MTE80NjE4NSJ9/eDUAMaKovStk2ylAFPFBJQ)**.

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I’m more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

_CitizenGO represents millions of members and supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration_.

The best way to do that is with a Federal ban on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people power to succeed.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to sign your petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25 contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvdXZwd3Zid3c1aj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1MTE80NjE4NSJ9/vvYjc36qK86wIGBMGGoHPQ)**.

**In addition to signing your petition and donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a way you prefer.**

---
| CitizenGO is a community of active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16 countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages.
---
_Not produced or emailed at taxpayer expense._
* * *
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM2LWI0NzBhZTU0ZDlmNjRmMjg5MWQ2ZGU0Nzc4MjJmYzlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/zAdJftu_QEEEIYI9FWWFEg) to unsubscribe.

body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW19YmHimN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW19YmHimN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Get “The Federalist Papers”on DVD
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrrs4h0662tvj17r19alt1k1jrj9cec9cfaojvf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim9pb4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z58mg0ftoennnrb0qlkeih8q5b7d9kopkhea8uk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim9pb4cph2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjog1a99nd5ee5i9e8pumn683o7m7032f3h434u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim9pb4cph2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5vs79pq601jvamslbkjkvt167fi5b3ev4ee7qg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chim9pb4cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12797%2E878179%2EonRdNJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12797%2E878179%2EonRdNJ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12797%2E878179%2EonRdNJ) to request fewer emails. name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWHQxmHiEN
Heritage Foundation

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHQxmHiEN

Hello,

As a fellow conservative, you likely
already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon
you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far
left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the
best thing to do.

In these trying times, we conservatives
must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to
promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; our
Constitution.

That's why I'm writing today. I'd like
to offer you the chance to gain free access to Heritage's Guide
to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles
against those on the far left.

In this free digital interactive guide,
you'll find:

Useful, clause-by-clause analysis
of the entire Constitution and each amendment

Input from more than 100
constitutional scholars and legal experts including President
Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese

A thorough review of what the
Constitution actually says and how it applies today

A copy of the Constitution and the
documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation's
history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number
of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being
swayed towards greater government control over our lives-they
want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and
redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased
regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open
borders.

It is for this reason that we need to
educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the
freedoms promised to us in the Constitution.

Because if we don't truly understand
the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not
fight to defend those freedoms.

To get your free access today and to
help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has
refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will
you activate your free access by clicking this link today?

If so, please use this link to activate
your access to the guide today:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/

This resource has been hailed across
the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it
one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think
you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each
day.

With this powerful Guide in hand,
you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently
defend the vision of our Founding Fathers.

I hope you'll claim your copy today.

Thank you,

Alexander Hyatt

Membership Programs

The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE |
Washington, D.C. 20002

You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:

name: Kamala Harris
subject: South Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Joe Biden and I just won the historic first-in-the-nation South Carolina primary. | | |
---
Peter, On Saturday night, our campaign won South Carolina’s historic first-in-the-nation primary. **South Carolina Democrats led the way to victory for Joe Biden and me in 2020, and they’ll do it again this year.** To keep up this momentum, we need a groundswell of grassroots support _nationwide_ \-- made up of folks just like you, Peter. That’s why today, I’m asking you to rally around our campaign once again as we look ahead to the general election -- and a likely rematch with Donald Trump. [**We need a big surge in donations right now to be ready to take the fight to Donald Trump. Can we count on you to make your first contribution of $25 -- or any amount meaningful to you -- to our campaign today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiLNytnDSWgHt8d9f6wOc1Urszclvu1KzC4vEohj_Ig1Q6eX8AcF565aiTlr57rgP5v70axTvP80B5MH6kjzAIbydlg3G1mSumHbmKf9_LJJumyt8xfgAGj4dhFoOGTjB5XDCe0AdILA47w7qeYFuWK9ebvE553sR2070QrhAD68hzLVvuqLYur59ejgzIVc7ri8c5mrBZ1fOUxDi4WGT2r3IFZ2FBiizt0kY61X4ZaKj-YaUIKwr2uNw1Ztao_7n2WVp2vK90wuyRrF53WY-v0fWO6fMWVcf_LapyrxdFqMbBrMqSBuX-kFzdcPFIe85FvmF0p2T_XMdYh4UD5fixgW/43l/X6Spf8DEQ32rHZgCd2QeAA/h0/5Rv0wU92uGXUNTijnLaSUhku-9jmrNcqrbIzKsbT0P8) Every $25 contribution to our campaign means so much more than the dollar amount. Every contribution is a sign that you -- and so many other Americans just like you across the country -- are standing up for what you believe in. It shows that you believe in defending our basic freedoms. That you believe in our democracy. And that you’re willing to fight for it. **If we all stand up together to fight for what we believe in, we’ll win this election. That’s why I’m asking you to contribute $25 today, Peter.** **Here’s my personal link you can use to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reelect-joe-and-kamala](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiLNytnDSWgHt8d9f6wOc1Urszclvu1KzC4vEohj_Ig1Q6eX8AcF565aiTlr57rgP5vS9D8lO2RfE6_YTr1oZUVEvyAGuTPNLZIotI_BdcpEoiXs3JSdd7rUVVgKC7vv0_woH_pGMcT3EJ6zu_yL6IVGLYnTZEh_d-gvvuolnTOGqOygBZJJzkRrq5zQo1lgiVB9aY_goM5FHXVXM6xJoluakY2TsVhGjTL6B2rB1HTlOsPBf26K7JWkFOK1XSTO8EOW_ZhwJfhQA8FvwCp9KeDNlH6ZYswQ-PSOsFu_LptaQvYNmrFofmoKrW0ZhTwonWEDXrzpKeqlKcseAkpz2Nmm/43l/X6Spf8DEQ32rHZgCd2QeAA/h1/5DgeuSlVJmGYmEQYPz-JF_s5iN7aD7mdk9tDkz59V3E)** Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris

body:
Barack Obama is calling on Democrats to eliminate the filibuster!
https://secure.everyaction.com/sHnqoseRZUS4VdbzE5RyPA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240205_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/sHnqoseRZUS4VdbzE5RyPA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240205_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
JOIN US: Add your name to our petition telling Congress to abolish the filibuster ASAP!! >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/sHnqoseRZUS4VdbzE5RyPA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240205_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]SIGN ON [https://secure.everyaction.com/sHnqoseRZUS4VdbzE5RyPA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240205_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
The filibuster is the one thing standing in the way of our progress – and the MAGA Republicans are using it to tank President Biden’s entire legacy!
If we’re going to protect abortion access , the right to vote , and our democracy itself, we’re going to need to get rid of the filibuster once and for all.
And with Barack Obama rallying support from Democrats, it’s the perfect time to take action. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: Governor Mike Dunleavy Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancyforalaska/dunleavyendorsesdahlstrom?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=a5e1ce8847&e=a20d8ad2ed)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)
**Governor Mike Dunleavy Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress**
**Anchorage, AK** \- Today, Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy endorsed his Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom in her campaign for U.S. Congress.
**“It's my pleasure to express my support for Nancy in her congressional campaign,"** said Governor Dunleavy. **"Nancy's exceptional commitment and conservative values resonate with our state and we've achieved much for Alaska together. I'm confident Nancy will stand up against federal overreach in Congress and safeguard Alaskan values. Her candidacy represents my preferred choice to advance our state’s interests.”**
| | | | | | | | | Governor Dunleavy first appointed Nancy Dahlstrom to serve as the Commissioner of the Department of Corrections, after her time in the state legislature, where she focused on improving public safety for Alaska. In 2022, Dahlstrom joined Dunleavy’s reelection campaign as the candidate for Lt. Governor and the ticket won on the first ballot with over 50% of the vote.
---
|
---
The race for Alaska’s at-large Congressional District will be one of the most competitive in the country in 2024. Since Dahlstrom’s entrance into the race, Inside Elections has [shifted](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7006024f44&e=a20d8ad2ed) the race towards Republicans, citing her strength as a “candidate who can appeal to the various wings of the state party.” Dahlstrom has also secured endorsements from Speaker of the House Mike Johnson and Winning for Women, which supports conservative women “who share core values of economic freedom and strong national security.”
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._
|
---
| | | | [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7ad6b20218&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7e18fb2219&e=a20d8ad2ed)| [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=446c06dd76&e=a20d8ad2ed)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Faulconer?=
subject: NEWS: Farm Bureau of San Diego County Backs Kevin Faulconer’s Campaign For County Supervisor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Supervisor 2024 - FPPC ID 1461674**
body:
NEWS: Farm Bureau of San Diego County Backs Kevin Faulconer’s Campaign For County Supervisor | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/43e7cea664bf/news-farm-bureau-of-san-diego-county-backs-kevin-faulconers-campaign-for-county-supervisor?e=784f78234b)
---
| |
---
| |
# FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
FEBRUARY 2, 2024
#
CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com

**Farm Bureau of San Diego County Backs Kevin Faulconer’s Campaign For County Supervisor**
SAN DIEGO, CA – The Farm Bureau of San Diego County endorsed former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer for County Supervisor. This latest endorsement showcases the former Mayor’s continued momentum after outraising Supervisor Terra Lawson-Remer in a district that has failed to re-elect an incumbent since 2016.
**“The upcoming election will be a critical turning point not only for the economic well-being of farmers and growers but the entire community as well, and Kevin Faulconer represents the change we need to move forward in a positive direction,” said Dana Groot, Farm Bureau President. “His proven ability to collaborate and bring people of differing viewpoints together to solve major public policy challenges make him the best choice for Supervisor. The Farm Bureau is proud to endorse Kevin Faulconer for Supervisor and we look forward to doing all we can to help him win in the upcoming election.”**
**“I’m proud to add the Farm Bureau of San Diego County to the growing list of supporters seeking change and action on the issues that we care about the most,” said Kevin Faulconer, former San Diego Mayor and candidate for Supervisor. “We can’t afford four more years of Terra Lawson-Remer’s lack of action on homelessness and dangerous policies that will make every day living more expensive for people in our county. This will change as soon as I’m elected Supervisor – we will take action to reduce homelessness just as I did while I was Mayor and we’ll put a stop to Terra Lawson-Remer’s dangerous policies that will raise taxes on hardworking Californians.”**
In their own press release, the San Diego Farm Bureau Board of Directors determined Faulconer’s deep understanding of issues that are critical to local agriculture along with his strong proven record of success as a two-term Mayor of San Diego tackling issues like reducing homelessness, making housing more affordable, and improving public safety made him the most qualified candidate in the race for District 3.
Since entering the race in July of 2023, Faulconer has raised over 500,000 from local donors and amassed attracted a growing number of endorsements from local organizations, including San Diego Working Waterfront, The Lincoln Club Business League, the San Diego Restaurant Association, the Building Industry Association, the Associated General Contractors of San Diego, and Associated Builders and Contractors of San Diego. As Supervisor, he’ll lead on pressing issues like reducing homelessness on day one – working to clean up the streets and get people the help they need to turn their lives around, just as he did as Mayor of San Diego, where he presided over double-digit decreases in homelessness.
To learn more about Kevin Faulconer and his campaign for Supervisor, visit www.kevinfaulconer.com###

---
---

Friend, Rick Scott’s extremist allies in Tallahassee aren’t even trying to hide it: **If there’s a chance you’ll vote blue, they will make it as hard as possible for you to cast your ballot.**
That's why they've introduced new legislation to END universal mail-in voting just months before a critical election in a state known for razor-thin margins!

This legislation to end mail-in voting is just another blatant attempt to restrict our right to vote. And friend, we can’t let them get away with it!

February 5, 2024 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Matt Dolan Has “Massive Fundraising Advantage” Over GOP Opponents, Best Positioned to Defeat Sherrod Brown.

2. Matt Dolan Stands with East Palestine One Year After Train Derailment.

3. Matt Dolan Highlights Biden’s Failure to Secure America’s Southern Border.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
| | |
---
_**Matt Dolan Has “Massive Fundraising Advantage” Over GOP Opponents, Best Positioned to Defeat Sherrod Brown.**_
* Matt Dolan is entering the home stretch of the primary campaign with a significant cash-on-hand advantage over his two opponents.

* The latest fundraising reports show that Dolan has $4.4 million in cash on hand, more than 4x his closest competitor.

* Survey research this week from Emerson shows that Matt Dolan is the strongest general election candidate against Sherrod Brown.

* Each day, it becomes even more evident that Matt Dolan is the candidate best positioned with the resources, message, and record of conservative results to win this primary and defeat Sherrod Brown in November.

---
| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=df38171e014b40c4b483c61eb56b1fca&_e=H_41kN45HTrfGRXxIP25KaGABBF10ABaK3Yf-dBxh4uJ9EzE-rYMqp-7azWZ4ENtEjjMhz2avtCasuHC-9xWedfrrLKBHjjl6XWrPXzlkHCCYB2nxyPbmmhhDpEgut-OHaQKM9NKpxztqp7R7OvXd6gtGDpUCwg-TdfccZSHS2sJekPl40Z8H9OOdRkHaszDPMCMW0GjStFtUIJhHku41-3EjtAV67Zpm9N6nhOHpNA%3D)
---
| | |
---
_**Matt Dolan Stands with East Palestine One Year After Train Derailment.**_
* Matt Dolan shared his thoughts on the one-year anniversary of the derailment with Fox News: “Actions speak louder than words, and the fact that it has taken Joe Biden so long to visit East Palestine is a sad reflection of his priorities,” Dolan said. “It’s important that his year-long absence does not distract from the hard work that has been done by local leaders, first responders, and many others who have worked to demand accountability and results for the people of East Palestine. In the U.S. Senate, I will never stop working to build upon their progress and deliver results for Columbiana County, the Mahoning Valley, and our entire state.”

* In November, East Palestine’s public leaders, including Mayor Trent Conaway, came together to endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate.

---
| | [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=df38171e014b40c4b483c61eb56b1fca&_e=H_41kN45HTrfGRXxIP25KYlI6snaZX9o2SYy4iQmAF3GK7R3fqcpVPJO7F6uld-Er4Sdgy_3J_3_Ij7cV7atUxwXvRiW8elNMym-QJTq1Fim3VL01co5i1aOlkzSQpBRlQe-acHcg8EogX-RattebR7I56Gyrx_I-q-DLAO5HSvd4nMwo2rs-JSOwjP0FNlPG_1yjoIyO6pVlQ6IWAQ7TMqt0ekIjjCGSM5wpwqTLFBRsmIX8ElJNwkj22Oqtfdr-Y3QkUCysvwBxvelwDIDfa5R_KxPTOp_3lHxhQ4FnqS5VwY48Ek12g2D9FSzaY08)

clean_body: | | | February 5, 2024 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio | Three Things to Know This Week: 1. Matt Dolan Has “Massive Fundraising Advantage” Over GOP Opponents, Best Positioned to Defeat Sherrod Brown. 2. Matt Dolan Stands with East Palestine One Year After Train Derailment. 3. Matt Dolan Highlights Biden’s Failure to Secure America’s Southern Border. Get up to speed... | | | Matt Dolan Has “Massive Fundraising Advantage” Over GOP Opponents, Best Positioned to Defeat Sherrod Brown. Matt Dolan is entering the home stretch of the primary campaign with a significant cash-on-hand advantage over his two opponents. The latest fundraising reports show that Dolan has $4.4 million in cash on hand, more than 4x his closest competitor. Survey research this week from Emerson shows that Matt Dolan is the strongest general election candidate against Sherrod Brown. Each day, it becomes even more evident that Matt Dolan is the candidate best positioned with the resources, message, and record of conservative results to win this primary and defeat Sherrod Brown in November. | | | | | Matt Dolan Stands with East Palestine One Year After Train Derailment. Matt Dolan shared his thoughts on the one-year anniversary of the derailment with Fox News: “Actions speak louder than words, and the fact that it has taken Joe Biden so long to visit East Palestine is a sad reflection of his priorities,” Dolan said. “It’s important that his year-long absence does not distract from the hard work that has been done by local leaders, first responders, and many others who have worked to demand accountability and results for the people of East Palestine. In the U.S. Senate, I will never stop working to build upon their progress and deliver results for Columbiana County, the Mahoning Valley, and our entire state.” In November, East Palestine’s public leaders, including Mayor Trent Conaway, came together to endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate. | | | Matt Dolan Highlights Biden’s Failure to Secure America’s Southern Border. Matt Dolan spoke with Brian Thomas on 55KRC about the critical need for America to finally seal and secure its southern border. name: GIFFORDS
subject: We hate to put this thought in your head...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But this could be our reality if we don’t step up and take action now
#

Friends -
In exactly nine months, we’ll be waking up on Election Day. All across the country, people will cast their votes in races at every level — from local school boards to the White House and everything in between.
Even though Election Day may feel far away, we have to make a choice today.
Will we put in the work now so we have the resources to maintain our slim gun safety Senate majority, take back the House, and reelect Joe Biden?
**OR**
Will we sit back and allow Mitch McConnell to become Senate Majority leader again, and let Donald Trump back into the Oval Office?
We hate to put this thought in your head, but this could be our reality if we don’t step up and take action now.
[**We’re counting on you. Will you chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? In this critical election year, there is no time for us to slow down.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240205-1-30&t=1&akid=7604%2E3935704%2EGS14sx)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Alfonso?=
subject: We need your help! Join us THIS SATURDAY!
body:
This Saturday, Team Alfonso will be in Battle Creek collecting petition signatures to get Joseph Alfonso on the ballot this August. | | | | |
---
# JOIN US IN MAKING A DIFFERENCE THIS SATURDAY!
This Saturday, Team Alfonso will be in Battle Creek collecting petition signatures to get Joseph Alfonso on the ballot this August. We are well on our way to reaching our goal of **2,000 signatures**. However, the work is far from over. We need YOUR help to cross the finish line.
**Join us on February 10th from 2 pm to 3:30 pm, at Café Rica located at 62 E Michigan Ave.**
By attending this event, not only do you get the opportunity to help the Alfonso campaign by giving your signature, but you can meet Joseph and take the opportunity to get to know his goals for West Michigan. **We look forward to meeting you!**
If you are unable to attend but would still like to support our campaign **we ask you to please share** information on our petition through social media and your personal networks. With just a couple of clicks, you can help us reach a wider audience!
**Where: Café Rica: 62 E Michigan Ave, Battle Creek, MI 49015****When: February 10th from 2 pm to 3:30 pm**
Sincerely,Team Alfonso
| [SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS: DONATE TODAY!](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=fa83b1f0b5&e=16d812e81c)
---
| [ANY QUESTIONS? SEND US A MESSAGE!](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=06a54a8086&e=16d812e81c)
---

clean_body: This Saturday, Team Alfonso will be in Battle Creek collecting petition signatures to get Joseph Alfonso on the ballot this August. | | | | | JOIN US IN MAKING A DIFFERENCE THIS SATURDAY! This Saturday, Team Alfonso will be in Battle Creek collecting petition signatures to get Joseph Alfonso on the ballot this August. We are well on our way to reaching our goal of 2,000 signatures. However, the work is far from over. We need YOUR help to cross the finish line. Join us on February 10th from 2 pm to 3:30 pm, at Café Rica located at 62 E Michigan Ave. By attending this event, not only do you get the opportunity to help the Alfonso campaign by giving your signature, but you can meet Joseph and take the opportunity to get to know his goals for West Michigan. We look forward to meeting you! If you are unable to attend but would still like to support our campaign we ask you to please share information on our petition through social media and your personal networks. With just a couple of clicks, you can help us reach a wider audience! Where: Café Rica: 62 E Michigan Ave, Battle Creek, MI 49015When: February 10th from 2 pm to 3:30 pm Sincerely,Team Alfonso | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Alfonso for Congress P.O Box 1375 Holland, MI 49422 * USA or |

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: Terrorism on TikTok?!
body:
| | | [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=222cc27469d9408b97cb91c5e81de74e&_e=g-H_KMRXRpsezfCcKqJgB2pRHlXKINfTZmIqZ0Mw9iafBamGv7mR7YhLXQ6UQGfTOkxZYNoSLNgz6DpNxxPzsnwz_tNoAWtCy8pNVociJN6f6KU2Y5FoXcefGPyJBA4oYvmuXzQw6qVaqwI2joxzX6aN1mQZsL3Dtru9IQRSPKcn7lKqOe9Z44zsvdxUftsuR2qOJExvqUuA-BMbiIjkR24QPdCWXEBjWnOn-0DnDBVoX8vQtDyzxpEHqhwDcXprlr5q5gUtTbNivEbNQ9d8ymmwKpUFKbIv46xIIRPD3v7kPrU72gdli67PQVTXhW3563ObiaAbVXUIf-6gzc_SoY-69-7-a27XFgrQwBbbyNF8PvLT8J0O4kJ3m-f5nmSn)

As a veteran, a congressman, and a parent, I’m extremely disturbed.

Our kids are being inundated with **pro-terrorist messaging on TikTok.**

From defending Hamas to _even praising Al Qaeda_ , these messages are extremely dangerous to the next generation.

**I’m taking action to STOP this new wave of terrorist sympathy in America, but I want your opinion.**

[Are YOU worried about pro-terrorist messaging on TikTok?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=222cc27469d9408b97cb91c5e81de74e&_e=g-H_KMRXRpsezfCcKqJgB2pRHlXKINfTZmIqZ0Mw9iafBamGv7mR7YhLXQ6UQGfTOkxZYNoSLNgz6DpNxxPzsnwz_tNoAWtCy8pNVociJN6f6KU2Y5FoXcefGPyJBA4oYvmuXzQw6qVaqwI2joxzX6aN1mQZsL3Dtru9IQRSPKcn7lKqOe9Z44zsvdxUftsuR2qOJExvqUuA-BMbiIjkR24QPdCWXEBjWnOn-0DnDBX9w6_Hm4TYbmif480wNX0thh0Vc9UEdOZ87LhSpfZQjbaN3t_I-JQRbiG_RZgSSwjAZvAHgp9WyEYMvn5D-tpIlG1SoPfN98yhQOVsM3DGJ88BLehosR6eijTrJ6utZafScWvnSmTMHRT4z_GxLgxr)

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: ⛅️ To all of Elissa Slotkin's supporters, please don't click away from this important message. ⛅️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1107%2E135344%2EH2Zii5)

⛅️ To all of Elissa Slotkin's supporters, please don't click away from this important message.⛅️
This isn't the first time we're emailing about our February fundraising drive, so we're asking you to help us reach our fundraising goals for the month.

Now, if everyone reading this donated even $3, we would not only have a huge number of donations, but we would reach the incremental goals we need to hit in order to win this race.
And that's especially important, because there's already outside spending in this race boosting one of Elissa's opponents, and the DeVos family is donating at a huge scale to defeat us.

Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that Elissa rejects corporate PAC money makes things harder than they could be. So she's relying on people who understand how important this race is -- and Michigan is -- to chip-in before the end of February.

This campaign is sustained by donations of a small percentage of Elissa's supporters. Without those donations -- of all sizes -- we wouldn't be able to afford to run a winning campaign.
That's why we need your help. Elissa feels strongly about her decision to reject corporate PAC money, because at its core, this campaign is powered by people. People like you.

Our average donation online is around $40. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you're choosing to power this campaign today.
[**If Elissa Slotkin winning this race and Democrats winning in Michigan seems worth $3 to you, we're asking for you to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation to Elissa Slotkin's campaign today. Thank you.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240205-1-600k&t=2&akid=1107%2E135344%2EH2Zii5)**

| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-feb24.XXfcj1&refcode=em240205-1-600k&t=24&akid=1107%2E135344%2EH2Zii5)**

Thank you for making your donation today. We've got a ways to go before reaching very real goals we've set for the month, and your support means a lot to Elissa.
Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240205-1-600k&t=27&akid=1107%2E135344%2EH2Zii5)**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight | | | BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation. Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — that's 1 in every 5 Americans! Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us: Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Peter, thanks to those who donated to our end-of-January fundraising goal to get our ballot access campaign off the ground. **We couldn’t have done it without you!**

Your support allows us to:
* Recruit and train volunteers
* Access the voter database system to canvass, mail, and phone bank supporters
* Get on the ballot! ✅

I’m overwhelmed by the kindness and energy my campaign team has already received this cycle, and can’t wait to see just how far we’ll go together in the race for 2024.

The hard work is just beginning, and my team and I are thrilled to get rolling. I want to make sure that you’re staying up to date with everything happening on the campaign trail – **[follow my campaign website for all the latest.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78435370/453382960/-889327999?refcode=02022024_MD_EOMTY_outdistrict_TY_1&refcode2=73e12da2-3fc4-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2UxMmRhMi0zZmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W6oPbgIq7ASwhguX7m8ChIYYHPqn52heeXwtmyaeTxs=&emci=cd200035-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=73e12da2-3fc4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=36373569)**

Sincerely,

Madeleine [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78435374/453382964/-889327999?refcode=02022024_MD_EOMTY_outdistrict_TY_1&refcode2=73e12da2-3fc4-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2UxMmRhMi0zZmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W6oPbgIq7ASwhguX7m8ChIYYHPqn52heeXwtmyaeTxs=&emci=cd200035-18c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=73e12da2-3fc4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=36373569)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. subject: Pervez Agwan is Pro-Choice. Her Body, Her Choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Agwan For U

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp3h6galjubiqktubuc9hmiotqf5dalj88krbu3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chhm6o72cth2bs)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zji1ot5e5hvbirqph6hn8nl0omjhrvs9an5hqcg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chhm6o72cth2bs)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1r87fk203duk33n9qjj984ls0fk4atoie5le3d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chhm6o72cth2bs)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zolipkdsoe4vakol59i794abglkmdi27868ff24g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chhm6o72cth2bs)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk3rggmtc1g9icmm0fscskkf7o445mnk3k4kb5hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37chhm6o72cth2bs)
---

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

This newsletter will keep you up to date on all the things Jen Kiggans is up to around town on the Campaign side of the house. We look forward to sharing stories around the district and keeping you up to date with all the happenings on the campaign trail! This newsletter is for unofficial campaign activities; not official U.S. House of Representatives updates. KICKING OFF 2024: Jen Announces Her Re-Election Campaign https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dbada5fb602a8eefcaed4bea392450ba5907a977b1aa0a37c2933352a907ed4a35511ac4a28f29af19cee5fe8c67776cfb7ece28766a083824d Jen officially launched her 2024 re-election campaign, highlighting her commitment to servant leadership. Be sure to check out our official launch video, which captures Jen’s impressive track record and dedication to addressing key issues for Hampton Roads voters. A special thanks to the over 500 supporters who gathered in Virginia Beach to help kickoff the campaign! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dbada5fb602a8eefcaed4bea392450ba5907a977b1aa0a37c2933352a907ed4a35511ac4a28f29af19cee5fe8c67776cfb7ece28766a083824d >" alias="Watch the launch video HERE >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">WATCH THE LAUNCH VIDEO HERE >> JOIN TEAM KIGGANS FOR A GRAND OPENING https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba28c6e188dbfd0c1f946ac3416ecc133e8f24b1e2c2698fda828128c805d5f2310652428f5b1c6a826aed3ab787e3f9b97045c2b6fe0de02d You're invited! As we work to bring Jen to victory this coming November, we are excited to host a grand opening for the new GOP Battlestation in Virginia Beach. On Saturday, February 10th, join Jen and NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson for our official office opening. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba28c6e188dbfd0c1f946ac3416ecc133e8f24b1e2c2698fda828128c805d5f2310652428f5b1c6a826aed3ab787e3f9b97045c2b6fe0de02d GET MORE DETAILS & RSVP HERE WHAT JEN WAS UP TO IN JANUARY… Jen attended the Republican Party of Virginia Beach Legislative Sendoff dinner. As a former state legislator, Jen enjoyed catching up with many friends! Jen attended the General Assembly Session Kickoff luncheon in Richmond, where they discussed the upcoming legislative agenda and listened to Governor Glenn Youngkin speak. Jen got to meet some new voters and check out the newest cars on the market at the Hampton Roads Auto Show! Jen toured Audacy in Virginia Beach which produces many local radio shows. Be sure to catch Jen on the airwaves soon! Jen celebrated Happy National Spouse Day on January 26th with her husband, Steve, a retired F-18 pilot. Jen shared her story with campaign and caucus staff at the Republican State Leadership Committee and National Republican Congressional Committee Majority Makers Breakfast. Jen in the News - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba6b1504d27a678757d7afb2e5101031fe01d96e63fb311f4618c6da565af4694deafd876a6c0bf293e13a9822e0b976c42f58fd41c3dad70f Virginia Congresswoman Jen Kiggans aims to protect health care workers' mental health - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba5b25fa3759f4e2916243fe19a6f2e169c5d8ead81b28e13295eda901731640a2760a2e5181546c711a5cff55f054493f64d8ba3b3abf1786 Congresswoman Jen Kiggans to launch 2024 campaign for House re-election in Virginia Beach - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba98123cfd3026f3eeb08c6545d6a843d15ff9dcbc3dd04308006f552d6b0373d1241bba30491acdf31cf215ae729b1eaeb0cfce4be80b2d0f Virginia Congresswoman Jen Kiggans serves as a new Vice Chair of the Conservative Climate Caucus. - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba43fd03d7251d510efea595462ed899189a29e46d118411947152a96badf365d2a7383ca8e60c8b069b6a32e102e649e7e6c3377121ee2a16 Kiggans Votes to Avoid Government Shutdown . - https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dbaef3bfb75a1ef0c51ba01b58f7007a60c77d6c55646307f449210a439c7f61f887c02e3397c6c9dfa58ff2b9b3be3017a2906e2f090eecdcf Rep. Jen Kiggans drafts bill in response to Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin's hospitalization . Team Kiggans on the Road Check out some of the January highlights our team has been up to this month. Team Kiggans helped staff the polls for John Napier's special election for Virginia Beach City Council. Our team attended the Hampton Gun Show to talk with voters and get ballot access signatures for Jen. Members of the team attended the Republican Party of Virginia Beach Saturday Breakfast and gave an update on the campaign. Team Kiggans attended the Accomack Republican Party Meeting and had people help get Jen on the ballot. Staff attended the Chesapeake GOP Emergency Meeting to watch the Republican Party endorse their local slate of candidates. HOW YOU CAN HELP Want to be more involved with Team Kiggans? We could use YOUR help. Use the links below to become a volunteer or donate today! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba6b91eeb2d2875bfb7216e3ddf927218adc997e40e4a7130e458bd1c756233828bdc45732ba3f99fa41cc02c8c7fea022aac19406f4ee3932 SIGN UP TO BE A VOLUNTEER https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dbaee6b4c55fcfb716937c960ee075cc49273464bd9ba2de680f8ac8ccbaf7038b6316f926b5398221b636ab8f3b5ad39170dca1bcf6102be03 DONATE TODAY Don’t Forget To Sign Up For Permanent Absentee Ballots To help secure victory for the Republican Party, make sure you sign up for Permanent Absentee Ballots. Utilizing Permanent Absentee Ballots to our advantage is key to us winning any elections going forward. Permanent Absentee Ballots are secure, legal, time-saving, and endorsed by Governor Youngkin and Republican leaders across Virginia! You can still vote on Election Day if you have a Permanent Absentee Ballot; just bring your ballot to your normal polling place on Election Day! "I have personally signed up for and used the permanent absentee ballot… and I encourage all to do the same." - Former Rep. Thelma Drake https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dbabc3200a2cc05e3cc2219e0ec5dbe8b208c188a54784b75d19428aaa3bfdf6506744dff469b1f3cf1405684f97ea619e3d6e003d593e97b06 REQUEST PERMANENT ABSENTEE BALLOT HERE To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=a81e8ba7fde42dba5d9058435a45d4ebccdbde967599ea43cafd1b24fbd96eb2c5fe4d30b2aa0f9fbd5b5fd09814620e22ba335f37f1420d97bb85af86f9e3fa here . body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I’m the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c73de6769a7e403687f35516e3805014&_e=nVC2eyvLcadyC1KoIuqoD18d-zXk-DVtoIZHRLGCQjroQAzLnllIh9v9X14Ylmow5-FdNqcwyol1OlznEvDpXIEO1f7OOdTfFRZkmbB48r7rDs4JuNr8iJV1YwN4yPWn_mx3Lpa6L_vFM15madvFG6hRK7VP_iLKVBFsA781PndH5BvxLTiUS7LY1ovW9HQ-YW1gdlTQg3henBVC8IC4PWeMv3WH-12vs3xFoS9ZZarZzqWgvtr97soGyXpHf1jo2w3VCrzJ2H9ZeVJiDmK2tSsh5NfAIpvBKgBSr8JbvmowD_QXrhvLlnOipEwygKYxRyC64qCWVPyzJqZvxLQMkUj15GKFqwkFAih6WfHUk2EUN7tB66l0oDabbKBIMZau28a7WEFcgQQ4umFtauUG3ngvDpmX83yldGai1xRKcFCLb9Kvj4FK8oPshmVQTA9s4jZ5fQ-aCMLQl4tr31QlUntfRImHBIW0_Dd8jgfgKs-6QHBQWTMqNuQtPgq2Bhq2jZVbZFKFAYIq3g-mpZNaDg%3D%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c73de6769a7e403687f35516e3805014&_e=nVC2eyvLcadyC1KoIuqoD18d-zXk-DVtoIZHRLGCQjroQAzLnllIh9v9X14Ylmow5-FdNqcwyol1OlznEvDpXIEO1f7OOdTfFRZkmbB48r7rDs4JuNr8iJV1YwN4yPWn_mx3Lpa6L_vFM15madvFG6hRK7VP_iLKVBFsA781PndH5BvxLTiUS7LY1ovW9HQ-YW1gdlTQg3henBVC8IC4PWeMv3WH-12vs3xFoS9ZZarZzqWgvtr97soGyXpHf1jo2w3VCrzJ2H9ZeVJiDmK2tSsh5NfAIpvBKgBSr8JbvmowD_QXrhvLlnOipEwygKYxRyC64qCWVPyzJqZvxLQMkUj15GKFqwkFAih6WfHUk2EUN7tB66l0oDabbKBIMZaujH2Kwi9d_MgZuYK95golVrWhmN0aqXUt4fowIEFrk3SN38HwNokwf2w9oFCERCdCwJG1w6XY_x_2PzcY6kclBsPOdTqGCgIK6PuEnKcyvt1UB8FK5sVuXBMxbfeRPzKba-Qc1FR_rR6BEPtGhUZ9YQ%3D%3D)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c73de6769a7e403687f35516e3805014&_e=nVC2eyvLcadyC1KoIuqoD18d-zXk-DVtoIZHRLGCQjroQAzLnllIh9v9X14Ylmow5-FdNqcwyol1OlznEvDpXIEO1f7OOdTfFRZkmbB48r7rDs4JuNr8iJV1YwN4yPWn_mx3Lpa6L_vFM15madvFG6hRK7VP_iLKVBFsA781PndH5BvxLTiUS7LY1ovW9HQ-YW1gdlTQg3henBVC8IC4PWeMv3WH-12vs3xFoS9ZZarZzqWgvtr97soGyXpHf1jo2w3VCrzJ2H9ZeVJiDmK2tSsh5NfAIpvBKgBSr8JbvmowD_QXrhvLlnOipEwygKYxRyC64qCWVPyzJqZvxLQMkUj15GKFqwkFAih6WfHUk2EUN7tB66l0oDabbKBIMZauQ8XqQfw_2uPIFYz1PAwps1FA1hm3scf7VzBBrUGROSdttLfVtFU_NzmsP4dm5QGVnBfdmD2S46prrRQrlmAREBa1W-I4ldeysFURYgK8EM59YOjMW4pA0gV9dftwWsvCXcefBnROj5G5YgSNm5A9vg%3D%3D)
---

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAZI PILIP TODAY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c73de6769a7e403687f35516e3805014&_e=nVC2eyvLcadyC1KoIuqoD18d-zXk-DVtoIZHRLGCQjroQAzLnllIh9v9X14Ylmow5-FdNqcwyol1OlznEvDpXIEO1f7OOdTfFRZkmbB48r7rDs4JuNr8iJV1YwN4yPWn_mx3Lpa6L_vFM15madvFG6hRK7VP_iLKVBFsA781PndH5BvxLTiUS7LY1ovW9HQ-YW1gdlTQg3henBVC8IC4PWeMv3WH-12vs3xFoS9ZZarZzqWgvtr97soGyXpHf1jo2w3VCrzJ2H9ZeVJiDmK2tSsh5NfAIpvBKgBSr8JbvmowD_QXrhvLlnOipEwygKYxRyC64qCWVPyzJqZvxLQMkUj15GKFqwkFAih6WfHUk2EUN7tB66l0oDabbKBIMZauG9Gf7SxHRVCmB2PmIxzcLQhuJfV_3JH40Z8x5mG_WijUjSR--e_xsqcmLGmttAU1HUQmcrPmbmMl4neeyhPU5nVanEbCWMU_K1mb4XWrhZdavEeGbVmc2pAYfxpEO3XkuwpqzvnxbINuHjhHNR2Fig%3D%3D)
---

And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word.

All the best,

Mazi Melesa Pilip
GOP Nominee
Special Election NY-03
