My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7feeb2ec71c546dfab98b4fc022fa1d1&_e=iWbTKeM1VCisRM2DJXmWCDEaeB_1Hck5PqqvflOjqQWEjK3sUk4UEe1pwIt8ZlSaWdy_Ah-dp9XPgZqBnmOLZLl_TQG1NJGu5TiUUDrmClvDuoXO9fyyKXpV1b8n7fwdAhst9ANGUlBzUzbmN8_qQ-51REdzjTm85yegMmRTAO14bb0pWnBhBAmp8Q7F_PcWoeZ29NrqHn4ybXZ0a6IuIib__c_IQSVN5vvwtmNYKaGZOArpx5ObZdPZBb4uAG1qwZIlMxB1Vh_60Rr8H8791bR0hp5XjrHDaUPAwU26c1Sevj6IuF5iJbgvRqRFvsH2oXXl5ew1qLrg3cAyU8hadnF8u1iAglMmgQh8emScaCt0BFif7uTeuvdT3h1-lzAcPFdzCgdtTCRLw012IdUtIQ%3D%3D)

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7feeb2ec71c546dfab98b4fc022fa1d1&_e=iWbTKeM1VCisRM2DJXmWCDEaeB_1Hck5PqqvflOjqQWEjK3sUk4UEe1pwIt8ZlSaWdy_Ah-dp9XPgZqBnmOLZLl_TQG1NJGu5TiUUDrmClvDuoXO9fyyKXpV1b8n7fwdAhst9ANGUlBzUzbmN8_qQ-51REdzjTm85yegMmRTAO14bb0pWnBhBAmp8Q7F_PcWoeZ29NrqHn4ybXZ0a6IuIib__c_IQSVN5vvwtmNYKaHtYjAaZfhz8Aiktd2ewfeEZXq-v6dwX7St9xVaHvSOh1FeSfgW00t_9kehAQBsNwmv-Fvmfk8ferhE1aP3BOoV_cTyf-B6RAQ24L5nbhleBGXNCbYw7yKSP6MhUBMN8DxZtuLwceSs_92gUrSbZLjH8M4VONQRrhcsg-yULVQZ3A%3D%3D)** Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $15 or more today?**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7feeb2ec71c546dfab98b4fc022fa1d1&_e=iWbTKeM1VCisRM2DJXmWCDEaeB_1Hck5PqqvflOjqQWEjK3sUk4UEe1pwIt8ZlSaWdy_Ah-dp9XPgZqBnmOLZLl_TQG1NJGu5TiUUDrmClvDuoXO9fyyKXpV1b8n7fwdAhst9ANGUlBzUzbmN8_qQ-51REdzjTm85yegMmRTAO14bb0pWnBhBAmp8Q7F_PcWoeZ29NrqHn4ybXZ0a6IuIib__c_IQSVN5vvwtmNYKaG1jSRS_3Cs9fNwDLCnNbl1aR1UdI9saqFaoQkHDX4WYzaYFRxqBkmWTDyThD3oQIkMijQMBxsaJEwOTArKJmvy8sUtP2yrLsQlKHG7n8q6pBqfecivPECgLxpMl0BaCNpW8HmBhlnYX4CtpSzCCyz97DD4SnyrSA9maTLC9CAznA%3D%3D)** The California primary is coming up in fast on March 5th and I need to have as many conservative Republican's like you on my side as possible. In California's primary the top two vote-getters make it to the general election. And right now the polls show Adam Schiff polling at #1 and I'm hot on his heels at #2. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a **Republican win**. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: Alaska gets one representative to Congress... That one rep has the challenge of standing as a bridge and a bulwark between Alaska and D.C. to promote energy independence and more.| | | | | | | Alaska Congressional moves toward Republicans | | | The answer is yes. Alaska does matter. Alaska gets one representative to Congress... That one rep has the challenge of standing as a bridge and a bulwark between Alaska and D.C. to promote energy independence and more. That's a task Liberal Democrat Mary Peltola has failed at spectacularly. | | | | Nancy is the current lieutenant governor of Alaska and has a 20+ year career in public service with a track record of bettering the lives of Alaskans and doing what's right. Now, she wants to continue Don Young's 49-year legacy in Congress and continue delivering results for Alaska and America. Nancy's goals include: ➡️ Unleashing Alaska's vast resources ➡️ Reversing Biden's destructive policies ➡️ Securing our country's borders➡️ Growing the # of conservative Women in Congress ➡️ Protecting our freedoms and opportunity This is why Alaska matters. To victory,Nina Digital Desk, Team Dahlstrom for Congre ss | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: Your donation will go further in PA than anywhere else
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX)
Peter, Bob Casey is one of Mitch McConnell’s top targets.
[**Let me explain what it means to be at the top of the GOP’s list. But first, can you chip in $5 or more to keep this seat and our Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240205-1&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX)
Being a top target means that dark money super PACs are going to raise historic amounts of money to flip this seat — a super PAC supporting our opponent already raised $18 million last year, and that’s just the beginning.
It means that Mitch McConnell and his billionaire backers are ready to dump millions upon millions of dollars into PA to flood the airwaves and smear Bob’s record.
It means that Mitch McConnell knows that **if we lose in Pennsylvania, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority.**
And it means that we need to meet every single fundraising goal we set to keep up with our mega-millionaire opponent's war chest.
[**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask: If there’s one campaign you donate to today, can you make it Bob Casey’s? With the Senate majority hinging on this race, your contribution will have the biggest impact in PA.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240205-1&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240205-1-el&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240205-1-el&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240205-1-el&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240205-1-el&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240205-1-el&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240205-1&refcode2=1894_552475_f5kXtX&akid=1894%2E552475%2Ef5kXtX)

— Tiernan Donohue

Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thank you for being on our team. — Tiernan Donohue Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Eggs & Stiff Joints
body:
Top Stories of the Week

Eggs & Stiff Joints

➞ Continue Reading

Jill Biden just sabotaged Joe Biden's speech
in stunning fashion
➞ Continue Reading

The View's Joy Behar is in deep trouble after
making a death threat towards Trump

➞ Continue Reading

Liz Cheney and a fellow RINO just made a
presidential campaign announcement that has heads exploding

➞ Continue Reading

Please read the following message from our
sponsor.

Hi Friend,

Brace yourself... because you may end up
throwing out a lot of the food in your fridge after you finish
reading today's email.

You see, Maryland physician Dr. Brian Paris
says many so-called "health foods" are actually the cause of
sore, stiff joints that make you feel miserable.

"If you're in constant, chronic, excruciating
agony and don't feel well, it has to do with what you're
eating... and just as important... what you're not eating but
should eat," says Dr. Paris.

Dr. Paris found certain foods marketed as
being healthy…

...actually contain a toxic nutrient your
immune system sees as the enemy.

So, every time you take a bite of one of
these foods... your immune system unleashes its "army" to attack
this nutrient.

And since this nutrient enters your
bloodstream once it's digested... your immune system starts
attacking even healthy tissue and organs... causing burning in
your joints and muscles.

Dr. Paris explains, "Most of my patients
assume their joint issues are a normal part of the aging process.
They have no idea eating the wrong foods can cause joint
problems."

The good news is... this problem is EASY to
fix.

"You don't have to completely change your
diet. Just eliminating these 5 foods from your diet - including a
certain kind of vegetable - will do wonders to your life," he
says.

In his entire 20-year career as a doctor, Dr.
Paris has found eliminating these 5 foods to be the most powerful
drug-free defense against joint problems.

So far, he's helped thousands of people at
his private clinic... including some very famous celebrities and
NFL athletes.

Now, he's put his list of the 5 worst foods
(and every other trick he's learned in 20 years) into a free
video available to the public..

So far, hundreds of thousands of Americans
are feeling much better after following the advice in this
video… which is probably why it's going viral on Facebook.

You can watch it for free for the rest of the
day (and be sure to share with any friends or loved ones who
might need to see this). Click the link below to start watching
now:

⇒ The 5 WORST Foods For Your Joints
(Cause Burning & Aching)

body:
Lankford MUST RESIGN Last night, Pseudo-Republican James Lankford released the contents of the highly anticipated "Border Bill." It is worse than wh
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2205.1.5e199972196c86bce9813a178a148420) |
---
## Lankford MUST RESIGN
---
Last night, _Pseudo-Republican_ [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2206.1.41e18d5483c6a32c15443dbd45fb6ea7) released the contents of the highly anticipated "**Border Bill**." **It is worse than what many thought it would be.** Currently, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2207.1.05c4a21509576061f73e87aa259d6a7a) is trending on X (aka Twitter) for all the wrong reasons... being dismantled by **Speaker Mike Johnson** , **Matt Gaetz** , **Donald Trump Jr** and so many others. This "Bill" is nothing more than an **open borders bill** which **increases green cards by 50,000/year** , **gives immediate work permits to every illegal released from custody** and also **sends another $60,000,000,000.00 to Ukraine**... It does not surprise me that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2208.1.85bf4660a728b75d662b019de7e887d2) is carrying the water for the Democratic Party. In 2022, I tried to sound the alarm in Oklahoma about the [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2209.1.3ff28589abb5378d88c866513cc7d6f5) with the help of **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** and **nearly 100,000 Oklahoma Republicans**. Our effort was _unsuccessful_ at the time. However, people are seeing the [www.realJamesLakford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2210.1.3236970b10d36e6dfb21d216bcda8d20) right now. Today, President Trump BLASTED the Border Bill and Lankford.
---
|
---
It is clear that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2211.1.00ffc7b296e670b5d75d2b6d45abb092) is doing his very best to try and keep **Donald Trump** from winning in 2024.
[Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2212.1.6aa7ede3a93ee3f42e6ec8980c105bdf) has been and is a NEVER-TRUMPER.
What is sad is the fact that before the bill was released, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2213.1.7fb09afc20d8983f7de21eb37c6652fd) did a national and local blitz on news stations lying about the contents of the bill...
|
---
|
---
Now that the bill has been released it is clear [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2214.1.de6f16f40bdddbd4087d3998e674a02b) lied over and over.
**The question then becomes why?**
I believe the answer is two-fold:
1\. [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2215.1.32e4d992ae58438da4c341480549c165) does not want a Trump Presidency because he knows his political career will be in jeopardy.
1. | [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2216.1.bfcd14a1abfe06236595c59f03a912e2) does not want a Trump Presidency because he knows his political career will be in jeopardy.
---|---
It is an open secret in Oklahoma that in 2026, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2217.1.48820ffc091071fcd9ec92291c4fd757) plans to run for **Governor of Oklahoma**.
Recently, **Donald Trump Jr** called out [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2218.1.e0263a0275892a8226a03386d500d3b5) on this and said this Border Bill will not help [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2219.1.920fcd1c59c8fcd587914f35a4ff2f94) get elected for Governor in 2026.
1\. [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2220.1.75e98fce440dae9f1ec7e25f8ab3927b) is owned by the Deep State.
1. | [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2221.1.f3a1142b5088edb3773fe87ea5806515) is owned by the Deep State.
---|---
The blackmail on [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2222.1.52a78b4fae17a6f096d4445913c0b288) appears to be substantial.
The story covered by the AP about [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2223.1.ec9d521f16108f43ea735af5910161a6) believing a 13 year old can consent to sex to coverup crimes under his watch at Falls Creek is just the tip of the iceberg.
It is clear: [JAMES LANKFORD MUST RESIGN.](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2224.1.dad561cca0d741dc344e22034a1cf9a8)
|
---
| | [ James Lankford ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6168692.2225.1.b5295477a37fdc7ee2685432c5ea692b)
---

name: Sen. Laphonza Butler
subject: A steeper climb.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Our elected officials must reflect the country they serve. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78440223/453397076/1237601583?refcode=WTEFEN05_20240205_LBBHM_ND_v1s1&sourceid=1052816&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGUxNjkyNi00N2M0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moT3qF0W-2TVoBqUPsZNJHQERDqWRUHHCNj32akAwfE=) Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of Black History Month. I am keenly aware, this and every month, of the Black women on whose shoulders we stand in our struggle for equality in America. Some of them are known to history, and many whose contributions never made it to history books.

The distance our country still has to go when it comes to equal representation in politics is striking. We know that there are not enough Black women in elected office, and we know one reason why. In 2018, Black women running for office raised 55% less than white women. In other words, it's a steeper climb for Black women, and I take it as a personal imperative in my role as the only Black woman serving in the Senate to help level the playing field.

This is a wake-up call for all of us in the political sphere: We cannot have representation, we cannot have _justice_ , without a government that reflects the people it serves. EMILYs List is devoted to raising the critical early money it takes to help Democratic pro-choice women launch, run, and WIN races up and down the ballot and across the country. And that's not just a February promise — _that's a founding principle_.

Even with the work left to be done, I remain hopeful. I know that with every Democratic pro-choice Black woman that EMILYs List endorses, supports, and helps elect, the more we'll see progress and legislation that recognizes our shared humanity and our role in making our nation a more perfect Union. In solidarity,

Sen. Laphonza Butler (CA) EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. Paid for by EMILYs List [www.emilyslist.org](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78440224/453397077/-6845375?refcode=WTEFEN05_20240205_LBBHM_ND_v1s1&sourceid=1052816&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGUxNjkyNi00N2M0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moT3qF0W-2TVoBqUPsZNJHQERDqWRUHHCNj32akAwfE=&emci=f6cc101f-47c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=a8e16926-47c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=5177934) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8aa02e48993642a9b2af410d2bed4d17&_e=6EJZ34IIMobD32pnn-5FkaSnJspDNIfkcyy2Cd_IZZ7jn0AfnMSr6cjAAWhfXxFkJYjya92DyOmE9ljcaaiyQBtnAaAdxr-E8opDVSaiKPjPtkYv_Dfnhfwuub-yrvCq4m4ICyX8FOuORQZ-VWMNEHTdAikOU77ktNGwgYkeM0B3aHHoYE7ARZTbnTh6L6cNaXmlgJ2wsXMPhQN_VTsQyaIUVlGHRzZAobDBXFBjrN4Ctux-Ea_Ejb0Tb2qVJjE4wmDivgcWRWbFQIP4XEHfCIJyICXWXXM1ib07D9zghD5MYaMTbqtEv4LeVE37ZmNY2fvfSlfDksBWeSXPm5DKCdwL59c5Epxccf0z47pp9qIsPsdvWNjiQk9Mun3rGWhQ8X0m2nUvcX-T3JmhgIhBjw%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8aa02e48993642a9b2af410d2bed4d17&_e=6EJZ34IIMobD32pnn-5FkaSnJspDNIfkcyy2Cd_IZZ7jn0AfnMSr6cjAAWhfXxFkJYjya92DyOmE9ljcaaiyQBtnAaAdxr-E8opDVSaiKPjPtkYv_Dfnhfwuub-yrvCq4m4ICyX8FOuORQZ-VWMNEHTdAikOU77ktNGwgYkeM0B3aHHoYE7ARZTbnTh6L6cNaXmlgJ2wsXMPhQN_VTsQyaIUVlGHRzZAobDBXFBjrN7X-2eWi_IoBZraDy1a60626F2SF6N4HEwPHlqsjipoanfq8xxJcp1PItsBonKASYNwEO9HPclM4K__9Qe1M1hcSWlPIULUhPKNr9zFkAmHM1tO3y69wNKoBwIjBEtpREHgcV_tiGDH2j8z3PPVq_eDIOehqPD3_s3Bi125U6_4UQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8aa02e48993642a9b2af410d2bed4d17&_e=6EJZ34IIMobD32pnn-5FkaSnJspDNIfkcyy2Cd_IZZ7jn0AfnMSr6cjAAWhfXxFkJYjya92DyOmE9ljcaaiyQBtnAaAdxr-E8opDVSaiKPjPtkYv_Dfnhfwuub-yrvCq4m4ICyX8FOuORQZ-VWMNEHTdAikOU77ktNGwgYkeM0B3aHHoYE7ARZTbnTh6L6cNaXmlgJ2wsXMPhQN_VTsQyaIUVlGHRzZAobDBXFBjrN460sGo0G1EDYX0gZSeqcex-LM3v2XliqV7TrU9qK0USoaeWu5zAWVr9DjNfXtvg6JjTyE6OfUr4Foia-9UW-KGU9tfqaMFS5-fWFvOM_5kkL0-Gkil5cxZ12uNhqXhrn0glouY4j9gFMO02iD92W-7q9adZOHh0bQL4FTQnP1eOQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---

I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8aa02e48993642a9b2af410d2bed4d17&_e=6EJZ34IIMobD32pnn-5FkaSnJspDNIfkcyy2Cd_IZZ7jn0AfnMSr6cjAAWhfXxFkJYjya92DyOmE9ljcaaiyQBtnAaAdxr-E8opDVSaiKPjPtkYv_Dfnhfwuub-yrvCq4m4ICyX8FOuORQZ-VWMNEHTdAikOU77ktNGwgYkeM0B3aHHoYE7ARZTbnTh6L6cNaXmlgJ2wsXMPhQN_VTsQyaIUVlGHRzZAobDBXFBjrN5NwlnZwG-WTVAUoZy5lnBwqP-d6uc5ISzKE_LQNYThvL7EhDKOcgSrhqCdZ14i_v_UoyX28R1G8xRbBuibCTEwQ0vsxmykgmeFkjyapLdjSSrAypNbIBOztm2Wjb8yeYL5YXYmO0zumn8QQ7htc5LyTsGf2ViVxeOjrbklsJuEiQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zf8zThk7CKzd-GqQln9HBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno57PP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtVUNOJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMDVXA3NwY0IKZbrQGcFliUtbH1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | ~ | | Friend, ~ That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.~ Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, ~ Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. ~ With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate | | | ~ | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. ~ ~ | | ~ | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150Irvine, CA 92618 | | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c33d8c6dda1f4005b8105bbca97c6e53&_e=egXXcS52-eU3lH38eQlahsSR2j5sA7oR4MAocJ3obthUuuWSjKycZhG7RFYAGjxoUpg0B0vF6E1zPvOxQkPn7YReId1Qoc9UyX9RwIM0CSOJStk9g6uuht9MgOQI_Kv2s_gna6cgZOASpW46CoD7mPXNv3N29rEjBE4ekWWFKlh-Qoo03prw3qgH4iCSXJQGJgFFES_UUuD8UPZR_rXsOg3NMrzo9UTtFXKucRh-9cG6C7vrLQL17fZmr-AQHqCMzOWJfnK8QeRYcUxlXZJDtcQv_BjewO0Ws2DfcjJiSyeWwXh7sy5Bn2XkHNtuRA2Yw-5Q2d_hc3DO63j-ffAtevcqVPnGeyYBgV-7_W7kO-3nHEF0eijdRCQzqbCUePIQIMziEbrOLdCmg7ZI55vHxA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c33d8c6dda1f4005b8105bbca97c6e53&_e=egXXcS52-eU3lH38eQlahsSR2j5sA7oR4MAocJ3obthUuuWSjKycZhG7RFYAGjxoUpg0B0vF6E1zPvOxQkPn7YReId1Qoc9UyX9RwIM0CSOJStk9g6uuht9MgOQI_Kv2s_gna6cgZOASpW46CoD7mPXNv3N29rEjBE4ekWWFKlh-Qoo03prw3qgH4iCSXJQGJgFFES_UUuD8UPZR_rXsOg3NMrzo9UTtFXKucRh-9cG6C7vrLQL17fZmr-AQHqCMRa637ED2rUjF4CPJP5Nn2n_7xuGe8Odheo_qF209ni08fKXmiCXawGAzWDUJLFn-4m1Nj5I-Z8SVm2t4HVRE6gw1fqhxSCTQsspA7kdIYQ3XHiJ_ASuXsHw1m7PXNjTuY9oigUrVC1-0LRvoVAkWIw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c33d8c6dda1f4005b8105bbca97c6e53&_e=egXXcS52-eU3lH38eQlahsSR2j5sA7oR4MAocJ3obthUuuWSjKycZhG7RFYAGjxoUpg0B0vF6E1zPvOxQkPn7YReId1Qoc9UyX9RwIM0CSOJStk9g6uuht9MgOQI_Kv2s_gna6cgZOASpW46CoD7mPXNv3N29rEjBE4ekWWFKlh-Qoo03prw3qgH4iCSXJQGJgFFES_UUuD8UPZR_rXsOg3NMrzo9UTtFXKucRh-9cG6C7vrLQL17fZmr-AQHqCMGwBJh_JXOXJbx7y-lkJj6C2V-4kH6AHx2Iee-u5pGtOWBzj7zT68UJWhLxbQGQVREX4d6OXBKtUWfMAGNlJ5eV5XP-JLsf2A3i1iBI2F4GEhO3InQIhRwM8nf_-ZiSqd2CDHqZxtv8WFj8MKO1a9AQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484c35b11bc34c2b832e64a9615e632e&_e=LBlL68arN7SOVgp2a1cF04F4mMjpjc2aaPU2xWWGSbUhv422Nuc70MhdkEQuU3oQOpHPPRprls7dfwSu7lVYY5uKCGd1oZLtCLswgBOJ017CrBcLEnY9suDKQfl7t6w7eWPGGX4Eztl5ca8YeYWXNWqy1RVP7YSWJSA_rs9edEg1IuNlOMQpFHX5iZmpsqZfXcsBVer2s1SlDbavVzWkXmapQSyXhq0yGL6OhVAzbPAltJmfZoTPvhYMeQ1e8IuS9xhX29_cobngQGgtM8u0PLMcpIcU8Wo5p33EfIUo5Y_k2ouHPpt-r4SV0in8ZN_c9sf_NYdHWBG18Djz5dNr2SKxRQ0DDL1mnTOqt3cpvg1Aa8lXbsGMfSQTBLIiSpoCVUyK89VrDDwxy6L2PedgvbpZ6bHSgV6BAQ6wbt4avrQ%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484c35b11bc34c2b832e64a9615e632e&_e=LBlL68arN7SOVgp2a1cF04F4mMjpjc2aaPU2xWWGSbUhv422Nuc70MhdkEQuU3oQOpHPPRprls7dfwSu7lVYY5uKCGd1oZLtCLswgBOJ017CrBcLEnY9suDKQfl7t6w7eWPGGX4Eztl5ca8YeYWXNWqy1RVP7YSWJSA_rs9edEg1IuNlOMQpFHX5iZmpsqZfXcsBVer2s1SlDbavVzWkXmapQSyXhq0yGL6OhVAzbPAltJmfZoTPvhYMeQ1e8IuS9xhX29_cobngQGgtM8u0PJmWLI7BMQHScFL_tPyRYtf9Dtpn1GI2NC82RaAmeXFedHkqPw252B2ldjTNnnpxFmIBOH2P_eemKl0C82JdJMhFEm1PdRzTYZvrSngZkdn6ITHxBMElHhRC4eYLFKvQoiZ06LqynztnxA1VnTogNzk%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484c35b11bc34c2b832e64a9615e632e&_e=LBlL68arN7SOVgp2a1cF04F4mMjpjc2aaPU2xWWGSbUhv422Nuc70MhdkEQuU3oQOpHPPRprls7dfwSu7lVYY5uKCGd1oZLtCLswgBOJ017CrBcLEnY9suDKQfl7t6w7eWPGGX4Eztl5ca8YeYWXNWqy1RVP7YSWJSA_rs9edEg1IuNlOMQpFHX5iZmpsqZfXcsBVer2s1SlDbavVzWkXmapQSyXhq0yGL6OhVAzbPAltJmfZoTPvhYMeQ1e8IuS9xhX29_cobngQGgtM8u0PFSAk23amy5p6MxW6Dumi8A81wYPJzYoIPHGZ7gXxW1JdgMNxK_LT6EI2fLZyzPAGOaZlpvKH9cBsc8SSf1furOzmETd2fTZpZrvYAspwd14k14fCX9ApWBZPenL1NoukRrKjB7c33WkKMCArOBPfFE%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=484c35b11bc34c2b832e64a9615e632e&_e=LBlL68arN7SOVgp2a1cF04F4mMjpjc2aaPU2xWWGSbUhv422Nuc70MhdkEQuU3oQOpHPPRprls7dfwSu7lVYY5uKCGd1oZLtCLswgBOJ017CrBcLEnY9suDKQfl7t6w7eWPGGX4Eztl5ca8YeYWXNWqy1RVP7YSWJSA_rs9edEg1IuNlOMQpFHX5iZmpsqZfXcsBVer2s1SlDbavVzWkXmapQSyXhq0yGL6OhVAzbPAltJmfZoTPvhYMeQ1e8IuS9xhX29_cobngQGgtM8u0PL4mPqheyD73mUp7jqLaJSNLwBhCqfmtxxphLOFr1gMyzHjkrLrWtSMt1zrdnwjN4yZGeER3PmXGGgFnNxk9w6sjN75rLHY1l-o0HtbUZ7hrcRJ1k6lEusse3m_NKFhBgINANNbG9aivFa4bo-5v0m0%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Republican Women's Chairman Val Stiles

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: I didn't have a lot of choices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
And now, Brian Fitzpatrick has made sure service women like me have even fewer. Ashley Ehasz for Congress | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78446472/453411289/-2036188668?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240205_fr_roeresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNlN2E3NS00ZGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCHb8NH9iCLfCUYFHO1R2XYV6QaDHfeWEJCbznb7GQQ=)
---
After I joined the Army, co-pilot, I didn't have a lot of choices. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78446473/453411290/-2036188668?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240205_fr_roeresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNlN2E3NS00ZGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCHb8NH9iCLfCUYFHO1R2XYV6QaDHfeWEJCbznb7GQQ=)
---
What I wore to work every day? No choice. Where I would live? No choice. Who my boss was? No choice. **But one choice I always had? My reproductive healthcare.**
That's a choice Brian Fitzpatrick voted to take away from women in the military last summer.
See, after the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, the Pentagon set a policy to pay for travel to access reproductive healthcare if a service member lives in a state that bans abortion. Fitzpatrick joined with the majority of Republicans last summer to try and overturn that policy. (Luckily, they failed.)
Service members choose to risk our lives for this country. What we don't choose is whether we live in a state that bans abortion or protects it.
And what angers me even more? It's only going to get worse.
Because not only are Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans continuing to go after service members' abortion freedom – Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear he wants a national abortion ban.
**[I'm the only pro-choice candidate in this race. Unlike Fitzpatrick, you can count on me to protect reproductive freedom in Congress because that's what I did on the battlefield. But to get there, I need your help. Will you pitch in your first donation of $10 or more to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78446474/453411291/-2036188668?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240205_fr_roeresend_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNlN2E3NS00ZGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCHb8NH9iCLfCUYFHO1R2XYV6QaDHfeWEJCbznb7GQQ=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: And now, Brian Fitzpatrick has made sure service women like me have even fewer. Ashley Ehasz for Congress | = After I joined the Army, co-pilot, I didn't have a lot of choices. | = What I wore to work every day? No choice. Where I would live? No choice. Who my boss was? No choice. But one choice I always had? My reproductive healthcare. That's a choice Brian Fitzpatrick voted to take away from women in the military last summer. See, after the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, the Pentagon set a policy to pay for travel to access reproductive healthcare if a service member lives in a state that bans abortion. Fitzpatrick joined with the majority of Republicans last summer to try and overturn that policy. (Luckily, they failed.) Service members choose to risk our lives for this country. What we don't choose is whether we live in a state that bans abortion or protects it. And what angers me even more? It's only going to get worse. Because not only are Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans continuing to go after service members' abortion freedom – Speaker Mike Johnson has made it clear he wants a national abortion ban. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being in this fight with me as my co-pilots, Ashley Ehasz 🚁 | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. subject: If they don't like Chris, he's doing something right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr]

Hi Derek,

Chris launched his reelection campaign just a couple weeks ago, and right-wing extremists and their corporate allies are already putting a target on his back.

It's no surprise that the GOP has doubled down on attacks about Chris. They know that PA-17 is one of the closest races in the country. With a small margin holding the chaotic Republican House majority together, a win for Chris is a win for our chances at flipping the House Blue.

But the GOP's corporate allies are also joining the fight against Chris.

[data:image/png;base64,]
“I'm proud that corporate jagoffs like the Kochs, Big Pharma and powerful railroads want me gone." – Rep. Chris Deluzio

READ THE STORY [https://punchbowl.news/archive/12424-punchbowl-news-am/]

I don't know about yinz, but at Team Deluzio, we're not scared of a fight. When corporate bosses and their allies in Congress launch a campaign against us, we know we're doing something right.

Chris is running for reelection to hold corporate forces like the Kochs, Big Pharma, and powerful railroads accountable. But he's up against a GOP that's hellbent on flipping PA-17 red. Will you chip in to become a founding member of his reelection campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=240205_hq_jagoffegs_l1]

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues FBI for Files on Ashli Babbitt – Family Demands Records
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of Aaron Babbitt, the late Ashli Elizabeth Babbitt’s husband, and Ashli Babbitt’s estate against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for all FBI files on Ashli Babbitt.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 5, 2024
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66885&L=31299&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLWZvci1maWxlcy1vbi1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e3cabd03303dbbbcdabb4182f1383a6823028527dcfacfe27538cfd37e798245) | **[Judicial Watch Sues FBI for Files on Ashli Babbitt – Family Demands Records](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66885&L=31299&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLWZvci1maWxlcy1vbi1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e3cabd03303dbbbcdabb4182f1383a6823028527dcfacfe27538cfd37e798245)** Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of Aaron Babbitt, the late Ashli Elizabeth Babbitt’s husband, and Ashli Babbitt’s estate against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for all FBI files on Ashli Babbitt . Ashli Babbitt, a U.S. Air Force veteran, was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66885&L=31299&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmJpLWZvci1maWxlcy1vbi1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e3cabd03303dbbbcdabb4182f1383a6823028527dcfacfe27538cfd37e798245)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66885&L=31304&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjAtYmlsbGlvbi10by13ZWxjb21lLWlsbGVnYWxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7dabc9dcb772a9418354b622d6aae39408c28cdc042ef0f0fc30bd0e3322437b) | **[U.S. Pays Record $20 Billion to Welcome Illegal Aliens with “Refugee and Entrant Assistance”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66885&L=31304&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjAtYmlsbGlvbi10by13ZWxjb21lLWlsbGVnYWxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7dabc9dcb772a9418354b622d6aae39408c28cdc042ef0f0fc30bd0e3322437b)** Among the many burdens that skyrocketing illegal immigration forces upon American taxpayers is the exorbitant cost of rolling out the welcome mat to accommodate, transport and provide migrants with a multitude of services upon their arrival in the United States. In the past two fiscal years the Biden administration has spent an astonishing $20 billion, according to government figures included in a report published by a nonprofit that investigates federal spending. A Health and Human Services (HHS) division known as Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR) does most of the spending, which is considered “refugee and entrant assistance.” In 2022 the agency dedicated $8.925 billion to the cause and in 2023 the cost soared to $10.928 billion. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of Aaron Babbitt, the late Ashli Elizabeth Babbitt’s husband, and Ashli Babbitt’s estate against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for all FBI files on Ashli Babbitt. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Feb 5, 2024 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit on behalf of Aaron Babbitt, the late Ashli Elizabeth Babbitt’s husband, and Ashli Babbitt’s estate against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for all FBI files on Ashli Babbitt . Ashli Babbitt, a U.S. Air Force veteran, was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. ---|--- | | | | | Among the many burdens that skyrocketing illegal immigration forces upon American taxpayers is the exorbitant cost of rolling out the welcome mat to accommodate, transport and provide migrants with a multitude of services upon their arrival in the United States. In the past two fiscal years the Biden administration has spent an astonishing $20 billion, according to government figures included in a report published by a nonprofit that investigates federal spending. A Health and Human Services (HHS) division known as Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR) does most of the spending, which is considered “refugee and entrant assistance.” In 2022 the agency dedicated $8.925 billion to the cause and in 2023 the cost soared to $10.928 billion. ---|--- | | | | | The robust woke movement gripping the nation’s private and public sectors is also threatening judicial impartiality with three federal judges enacting unlawful race and sex discrimination policies that grant oral argument in cases based on a lawyer’s gender and race. The goal is to give young women and minority attorneys greater opportunities to argue in court, according to the judges, who benefit from lifetime appointments. Two of the federal judges—Nancy J. Rosenstengel and Staci M. Yandle—were appointed by Barack Obama and one—David W. Dugan—is a Donald Trump appointee. All three sit on the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Illinois. ---|--- | | | | | “Fani Willis’ politicized and unprecedented prosecution of former President Trump has been further compromised by credible allegations of personal corruption tied to the hiring of Nathan Wade as special prosecutor!” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “That Judicial Watch had to a file a lawsuit to try to get records about this scandal further suggests that there is something to hide.” ---|--- | | | [Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Alleged Cover-Up of Biden Classified Materials at Penn Biden Center ]() [READ MORE]() NY Post Tom Fitton, president of conservative watchdog group Judicial Watch, ripped Soros for pumping money into lax-border policies yet not doing enough to help migrants when they arrive – even at his own doorstep. “It’s not surprising to me that the left doesn’t want to deal with the consequences of their policies in a direct way,” he said. PJ Media Biden's team is still really nervous about special counsel Robert Hur's forthcoming report, which could come this week, because, according to a report from Axios, "they believe Hur's report will include embarrassing details — possibly with photos — on how Biden stored documents." | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team Pramila
subject: Pramila’s countless contributions to the labor movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need an economy that works for every one of us, not just the top one percent.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240205-3473-footer&t=1&akid=3473%2E420207%2EepAwYb)
Peter, we have some exciting news:
A coalition of **15** national and local labor unions just endorsed Pramila for re-election!
**Our movement is growing,**[**chip in to help ensure we have the resources to re-elect Pramila.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240205.ykHlDm&refcode=em20240205-3473&t=2&akid=3473%2E420207%2EepAwYb)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240205.ykHlDm&refcode=em20240205-3473&t=3&akid=3473%2E420207%2EepAwYb)**
We all agree: **we need an economy that works for every one of us, not just the top one percent**.
Pramila is honored to be endorsed by so many vital labor unions in Seattle and across the country. She doesn’t just voice her support—she shows up, she listens, and she doesn’t hesitate to push corporations and powerful interests to respect our rights.
Together, we can deliver real results for everyday people who are working harder and longer than ever, all while corporate profits continue to rise. Pramila will never stop fighting to pass bold legislation to protect workers’ rights, promote unions, and deliver stronger wages for workers everywhere.
[**Chip in today to show your support for Pramila and help us grow our grassroots campaign both in Washington and across the country.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240205.ykHlDm&refcode=em20240205-3473&t=4&akid=3473%2E420207%2EepAwYb)

Together,
Team Pramila

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bce2433496b4fd380b8d71330e3012f&_e=3s5KL1idqQSIyeqybLKbjKHYSAVlyH8m48Ndf8PrkiPj-TmYNF_qeXJUJsTkrL_9GwHqDZNIRoQ7rcXgRq46VnU5dRjHiW6JTgkPIfbr2dlMe3Nbb7ocOYcGTN7Wn0BS26nMNCTu0yX6wFr24JXdziBSlOSDXur2gbWUqim0-P2hUnYL1zprLuJ8VA12VgAHuNoFIZtmyKypi9kcCz8um5EcIgkGahYro-ltTH2apgYEseDjXKlHAWC1ibrm1hH-oa2PJe4ct5-efOVzzplM6fA4a_Z776iJs5JGyZ3idoRaVMVt8ZhcZNBC7vVU1K1QDFc2QZ7qprfMeCn-A70-rqkkNxlHjnw5THf3XyVtbu68kf696MQKk1X-459hJcc9eE9f_jtG0n3TnB17FJgVfERaOc3tasSBDGHNJmzVnpM%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bce2433496b4fd380b8d71330e3012f&_e=3s5KL1idqQSIyeqybLKbjKHYSAVlyH8m48Ndf8PrkiPj-TmYNF_qeXJUJsTkrL_9GwHqDZNIRoQ7rcXgRq46VnU5dRjHiW6JTgkPIfbr2dlMe3Nbb7ocOYcGTN7Wn0BS26nMNCTu0yX6wFr24JXdziBSlOSDXur2gbWUqim0-P2hUnYL1zprLuJ8VA12VgAHuNoFIZtmyKypi9kcCz8um5EcIgkGahYro-ltTH2apgYEseDjXKlHAWC1ibrm1hH-oa2PJe4ct5-efOVzzplM6ddgonD9X8-Pb0xaryWCBl-mC9jAlepsFDs0izHGj4GqsdQsoV7b27RTmoDVYnZLpdJx7fuO2WK10Xb83cE1X8I8ZyLul_SiTRmaLXF_xJZiXB-WrynfXi3wQEHm4j_z9XKffEMLJVz3l4r5wgsQkv0%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bce2433496b4fd380b8d71330e3012f&_e=3s5KL1idqQSIyeqybLKbjKHYSAVlyH8m48Ndf8PrkiPj-TmYNF_qeXJUJsTkrL_9GwHqDZNIRoQ7rcXgRq46VnU5dRjHiW6JTgkPIfbr2dlMe3Nbb7ocOYcGTN7Wn0BS26nMNCTu0yX6wFr24JXdziBSlOSDXur2gbWUqim0-P2hUnYL1zprLuJ8VA12VgAHuNoFIZtmyKypi9kcCz8um5EcIgkGahYro-ltTH2apgYEseDjXKlHAWC1ibrm1hH-oa2PJe4ct5-efOVzzplM6aUkgkPMskX3CBuzAkD0ddNvZMWafynQenz9kNAhn2kiG4MyZF7xonwGZHloFhgu0767FK7QNcpY2XwCTK1z8N-Y6HlvaR6pnPIPnHxY_DBuZpzL7aPJnAvhH09SyRC-28TFhTioulOUb9KfFs5CAS8%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bce2433496b4fd380b8d71330e3012f&_e=3s5KL1idqQSIyeqybLKbjKHYSAVlyH8m48Ndf8PrkiPj-TmYNF_qeXJUJsTkrL_9GwHqDZNIRoQ7rcXgRq46VnU5dRjHiW6JTgkPIfbr2dlMe3Nbb7ocOYcGTN7Wn0BS26nMNCTu0yX6wFr24JXdziBSlOSDXur2gbWUqim0-P2hUnYL1zprLuJ8VA12VgAHuNoFIZtmyKypi9kcCz8um5EcIgkGahYro-ltTH2apgYEseDjXKlHAWC1ibrm1hH-oa2PJe4ct5-efOVzzplM6Xg9iDwi52gUNWNu7mv7d3SJUBRlxn6p_dRKDmf2LGwWusD1aURB_GZOI9NZ-0vJ5IGTrB5LneDJFX8LVKUaWngomKatL-wIU8vUXWDSM2OK6cVXgUlXPnTxRpXmd_xchbTKAtQradybNJ4xNdQuno4%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Hello Peter,

I have a quick roadmap for you for what our plans are for the rest of the year.

Right now, we’re in the building phase, with a couple months between now and the spring where we build the team that is going to keep Georgia blue. We’re hiring up, working with partners across Georgia to develop our field plan.

Then, when the spring starts, we get into outreach mode. We’ll be knocking on doors across Georgia to talk with critical swing voters to make sure they’re on our side. We need to reach as many of these voters as possible because in Georgia, _**every vote counts so much more!**_

As soon as summer ends, our Get Out the Vote operation will be here in full swing. Our team will be doing everything possible to get Georgians out to the polls – knocking on doors, making calls, sending texts, running ads across the state, meeting voters where they’re at to make sure every Georgia Democrat knows when, where, and how to cast their ballot.

**That’s it. That’s the quick runthrough of our plan, just for you.**

[**_And now, I would be remiss if I didn’t ask for your support. You know the plan. You know that right now, we need your support more than ever. As we build our team, we’ll need a huge influx of investment from grassroots supporters just like yourself. If we don’t get that support, then every phase of our plan falls apart. Can I count on you today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78450786/453419333/710125701?refcode=20240205.1_KO_2E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzJmMTE2MC01MWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2_7e2KQAVQ433fNb9AA4fDc1LeniqcZ2NavlHKbSugg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support this campaign has received — because of supporters like you, we continue to defy expectations and keep this an open primary. But public fundraising numbers are out and we have to acknowledge the political landscape that we’re navigating: We’re up against well-seasoned politicians with big donors and deep pockets. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = This grassroots campaign is strong, Peter. More than 50% of our contributions are from everyday people who gave less than $100 and 75% of my donors live right here in the commonwealth. That’s because my message and my vision for a more equitable and fair Pennsylvania is resonating with people. But the road leading up to Primary Day is going to be challenging — I need your help to keep up the fight. = | = Thank you for standing with me, Keir Bradford-Grey * | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

| [S.B. 7](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DOvBWz9ljcFSLM6SaVg4YwMIdWg3mqXk0Tg-lXGuHQM-jcX840Wc98AWHbaO3oYFV3Rybq4tHkxJ32EEON_IOVZfjPImPB2SWbxAi1m7Qnvuk5xEU2UPub3FTzFWHWIyOBJO7E_6BKqKU=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Reeves Hate crimes and discrimination; ethnic animosity; penalties. Provides that it is the policy of the Commonwealth to safeguard all individuals within the Commonwealth from unlawful discrimination in employment and in places of public accommodation because of such individual's ethnic origin.
[S.B. 10](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBRkH1DkKqoG0G2iA_pdHBx_4WBFKRP42JDo2GUsN53vvraV72JKkmo0Hps_NZYKQZ-tfCExxXv8Xk_tUQAp75IFhHwaVMQUUFEEt8pCUWh08PRVyRBaV4Nnj6GGBpPWOduMfyo7fJnwr0=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Reeves Income tax subtraction; military retirement benefits; uniformed services. Expands the definition of "military benefits" to include an income tax subtraction of retirement income received for service in the uniformed services of the United States, which includes the United States Armed Forces, the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and the commissioned corps of the United States Public Health Service. Under current law, the subtraction is only allowed for military retirement income received for service in the United States Armed Forces.
[S.B. 61](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBR4ygQwDHDwxl93p9MTZEG8qXLj7YW1BycIhVsHKpFMuYYPvaonElKI-mtvTjC-6YG2G0JsEbdCtqd4wGqZgLUnw3mVrNOPRHDAwqZ6FmSQ0RjTm5TdTdV3vOKZV_sIsXHlAPe0w3bWag=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Craig Income tax subtraction; firefighter benefits. Establishes an income tax subtraction for up to $20,000 of firefighter benefits in taxable year 2024, up to $30,000 in taxable year 2025, and up to $40,000 in taxable year 2026 and each year thereafter. The bill defines firefighter benefits to include retirement income related to professional firefighting services and benefits paid to the surviving spouse of a firefighter whose death occurred in the line of duty.
[S.B. 79](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DO43epcyAg_V20nHRi0f2-4m5qotHHfKOclK_gDZwOTz7b5FK-ryfVWgv9jSzDF5LMj_PQldB4S1d6PN_ecvRlArNeD70TXdb3Viit9LbuLUWhV7JgQJ7_qP1NHA7YLCUo9Y52eI7vS4w=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Favola Solar-ready roofs for certain government buildings; net-zero energy consumption building design for schools. Requires any executive branch agency or institution and any locality entering the design phase for the construction of a new building greater than 5,000 gross square feet in size, or the renovation of a building where the cost of the renovation exceeds 50 percent of the value of the building, to ensure that such building includes a solar-ready, cool, or energy-efficient roof, defined in the bill.
[S.B. 103](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBRQM7KwTISJXe1VTXXHsg9BumHWSo-Hds3P82P2k35dUJbaXjiLbXgmtytlW5_RZG0PYYxTFXHJDFiX0eftpsloIyZHP-5V959rj3zp3mQXxs4cmhcG5t-IagJY-tdQw4GbyCVXDThNRA=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Sturtevant Motor vehicle sales and use tax; exemptions; transfers; limited liability companies. Provides that no motor vehicle sales and use tax shall be imposed on vehicle transfers from (i) an individual, partnership, or limited liability company to a corporation or limited liability company or (ii) from a corporation or limited liability company to an individual, partnership, or limited liability company if (a) the transfer is incidental to the formation, organization, or dissolution of a corporation or limited liability company in which the individual, partnership, or limited liability company holds the majority interest in both entities and (b) the transfer to a limited liability company is not a precursor to a transfer of control of the assets of the company to avoid motor vehicle sales and use taxes. Under current law, transfers from (1) an individual or partnership to a corporation or limited liability company or (2) from a corporation or limited liability company to an individual or partnership are exempt from the motor vehicle sales and use tax if the transfer is incidental to the formation, organization, or dissolution of a corporation or limited liability company in which the individual or partnership holds the majority interest.
[S.B. 108](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBR7KwHVMcs_xwDGpSUGVRFIx3N8VlZSGb8mkXim8zUaslIj9unYQO2vPRz-WQKNvdE7QnwkmM1LItPIPp439H-MxY94tSZcXQCyIQOh4XKyN6A_TbgYkQqIQharZDdWw5ENZ2D5avHHEM=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Suetterlein Virginia taxable income; standard deduction.
