Allows an adult diagnosed with a terminal condition to request and an attending health care provider to prescribe a self-administered controlled substance for the purpose of ending the patient's life.
[S.B. 344](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DONVmHp7vb3uAtO9Dvh4SHHX3uF0JqrfvTjbsT5oeTdcJLYvzGHVto9eaQ8Tj5lcMFOPkp_OEvswXhZeTeQP_eCpAScCHUMBMTHkoTToLUQ7DR4VbJrSuUoyrzL_ipjkbExqZMAtCYQq8=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Reeves Charitable gaming. Amends charitable gaming law to allow, as a condition of receiving a charitable gaming permit or authorization to conduct electronic gaming, certain organizations to use a predetermined percentage of its receipts for expenses related to the rental of real property where such real property is involved in the operation of the organization and used for lawful religious, charitable, community, or educational purposes
[S.B. 345](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DOxlNUvBC9GgfkbfXvXzLZqwJdYGHexuZi0A2V7A_U9Di7W-AqBsxlEcVbnjV8YiPiQvaAniScNImkzxIYuZRRiSPoPq20wB84Yrt6OEuGtgvwhlUHZB3123IzfFrYJHf91QE69GPECdk=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Reeves Casino gaming; limits on required local referendums. Provides that the governing body of any eligible host city that holds a local referendum on the question of whether casino gaming should be permitted in such city that subsequently fails shall be prohibited from holding another referendum on the same question for a period of three years from the date of the last referendum.
[S.B. 384](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DOR75hg25ooAB5pFvVzV02s7b9EFOU3KD1HSca76h4Ep5HbXPmNNhcF1POU6b5pKULyvy8fRwm4yOhHYGzWsZsbUwlep9tE8Gk4IDOLfLi68qbvWoaPD_m8zagBS5P6K6EERhklf4bLOw=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Sturtevant Human smuggling; penalties. Makes it a Class 6 felony for any person who, with the intent to obtain an unlawful pecuniary benefit, knowingly and with the intent to evade the immigration laws of the United States uses a motor vehicle, aircraft, watercraft, or other means of conveyance to transport another person in or through the Commonwealth and knows or should have known that such person being transported is likely to be exploited for the financial gain of another.
[S.B. 540](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O5GjqpI_L-DO9-J-43Lrtzf00fe_g68Duj6euri-MqOxn_Azp9Q_CxcFSIGPfNv2f7fhc0ymsIMvzedQA1IRQsfeVUIkWIHzNuhh7aH0FSWs07xGeUEVfCZqBEwbVXGlaHBkRaV6uUKjhZxaS9FKwTk=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Bagby Illegal gambling; exemptions. Exempts from the provisions of Code prohibiting illegal gambling the placement or operation of or communication to and from equipment in the Commonwealth associated with the hosting of lottery games duly authorized by another state or jurisdiction and regulated and operated consistent with and exclusively for the benefit of such state or jurisdiction, provided that wagering on such games is legally authorized in such other state or jurisdiction and the individuals wagering on such games are required by the laws or regulations of such other state or jurisdiction to be physically located within the geographic bounds of such other state or jurisdiction at the time the wager is initiated or placed.

Eliminates the age requirement to claim the individual income tax subtraction for military benefits beginning in taxable year 2023. | [S.B. 78](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBR1yHMTw40aSm9E0P3SXvslX5UDdeI_gIkmyJEmVTOd8Azkj-rSaUTHriET9AD2DAfQtrCC-1VCn-W3OoIhoesMxKB93afzQAI1abfXYSm0dL6gX7dvSwe0qHnYzQwc4lx6kNzrF7evcE=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Favola Campaign advertisements; independent expenditures; electioneering communications; disclaimer requirements. Broadens the scope of disclaimer requirements for campaign advertisements to include electioneering communications, as defined in the bill, and messages advocating for the passage or defeat of a referendum.
[S.B. 107](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBRSMAEVmpbMf7dBy6ALCzdYDN9lYlV2cm3phTj1L_wNCWqtq43Diksgj_OCf2KYpz8e-733I_V1VS9rLxcdFR5nByLnQeSbkCaoKwaArggb4d8F3eqA3AKZF9zyeMke2ALO9MvnVIx1PA=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Suetterlein Campaign finance; fundraising during special sessions prohibited. Prohibits campaign fundraising by a member of the General Assembly or statewide official on any day the General Assembly is scheduled to meet during a special session. Currently, such campaign fundraising is prohibited only during regular sessions of the General Assembly.
[S.B. 326](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBR150X1OTaRglheWZHHagiDRg81xNNhwTeja9396GxvgglywGUVFZ2GrSPyalFwxZ_KjhRtdgPy0s5saBm5IJTjODjnpoNjou196zM40VXOcChpFqIfoNlkWOg6VM2IvNjsxI1MXEId9o=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Roem Campaign finance; prohibited contributions to candidates. Prohibits candidates, campaign committees, and political committees from soliciting or accepting contributions from any public utility, as defined in the bill, and prohibits any public utility or any political committee established by such public utility from making any such contribution.

| [S.B. 712](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O703dAEFH0vRWUwQZTJWfgEkOYypCjmhNUtbAv63GxGOOncwWFdZSM2rcPy1yShsQIDVkcdVyHqaNHKX5IRNVjZQQcDtftw0QX0aQjIOigm006bQUytKFBzNX4mRYurTmTnneTOlMDOaPXzGrz5C8iU=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Marsden Release of hunting dogs; state highway or right-of-way. Creates a Class 3 misdemeanor for the intentional release of hunting dogs on a Department of Transportation right-of-way or on a highway owned or maintained by the Department of Transportation to hunt deer without the consent of the Department. The bill provides that a second offense is a Class 2 misdemeanor, and a third or subsequent offense is a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also permits the stopping of a vehicle on a highway for the retrieval of a companion animal from a highway or area adjacent to a highway.

| [S.B. 153](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBRTbQXREH4n-3fs6pEsiKna3OIiDlP7NaAQwMRFKbw5hS5qyjfP8HTNt9G5x-4-G53mfy7BeyCWK0rAW0pO9JSQxpDRAuDvZCUGg6FMJ4U-JJsgQfBUYGK4Yc4MfFtwIWaKE0m9NzI2J4=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Head Medical Ethics Defense Act established. Establishes the right of a medical practitioner, health care institution, or health care payer not to participate in or pay for any medical procedure or service that violates such medical practitioner's, health care institution's, or health care payer's conscience, as those terms and conditions are defined in the bill. The bill provides protections for medical practitioners who disclose violations of the bill or report violations of laws or ethical guidelines for the safe provision of any medical procedure or service. The bill also provides a private right of action for any party harmed by violations of the bill.
[S.B. 237](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3Ozj1Xzq5aIBRP5u1TpSD-ia-omyVOBUJwNJA9rTmRgytduF9sKTNHaAUlj901GX9eZBcUDFP2V0_5M5VGXTROkIsku2Hksm0oazyIbm93Xq5E2Wa-0GL4RmrxOYoZk5QzzkOmOBmj3_UvPP3YY6uWtM=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Hashmi Contraception; right to contraception; applicability; enforcement. Establishes a right to obtain contraceptives and engage in contraception, as defined in the bill. The bill creates a cause of action that may be instituted against anyone who infringes on such right
[S.B. 499](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TLC4-pdsTEJxdtjCi9tSUSt59L-MXLP6v4-_ou1YNnoOH_AwAMo3O703dAEFH0vRix4EwVpXKr0uLNlc3aS7reV58AIRIe0ciT_r_3S-L1xsGSEDLIoKbgDGIGEnChx8-jMdbkri-dCUCUzOnnmX9aeUTb140Zq0FehPp7Pkjjrb1h-uF8eXUQyQsEQkvRNhHLPtDpSvFzA=&c=xJPFjoq8Qru4IvgvqkrXaudlnSQiwKlvh0JjAsnKcS1ADCV6JZ6Qmw==&ch=CpA5eyNU_kp-um5Er3MpJtehsCCoPqfUyr1hcvXMDXnMeiVPdsVTHg==) Patron: Carroll Foy Donor human milk banks, health insurance; coverage for donor human milk. Prohibits any person from establishing or operating a donor human milk bank without first obtaining a license from the Department of Health. The bill directs the Department to establish criteria for the licensure of donor human milk banks and to promulgate regulations by July 1, 2025, that prohibit activities of donor human milk banks that do not meet the licensing standards and requirements

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | Senate Bills Up TUESDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for TUESDAY BILLS TO WATCH Tuesday's Dockets | | == | nothing on the docket | | == | == Patron: Reeves Hate crimes and discrimination; ethnic animosity; penalties. Provides that it is the policy of the Commonwealth to safeguard all individuals within the Commonwealth from unlawful discrimination in employment and in places of public accommodation because of such individual's ethnic origin. == Patron: Reeves Income tax subtraction; military retirement benefits; uniformed services. Expands the definition of "military benefits" to include an income tax subtraction of retirement income received for service in the uniformed services of the United States, which includes the United States Armed Forces, the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and the commissioned corps of the United States Public Health Service. Under current law, the subtraction is only allowed for military retirement income received for service in the United States Armed Forces. == Patron: Craig Income tax subtraction; firefighter benefits. Establishes an income tax subtraction for up to $20,000 of firefighter benefits in taxable year 2024, up to $30,000 in taxable year 2025, and up to $40,000 in taxable year 2026 and each year thereafter. The bill defines firefighter benefits to include retirement income related to professional firefighting services and benefits paid to the surviving spouse of a firefighter whose death occurred in the line of duty. == Patron: Favola Solar-ready roofs for certain government buildings; net-zero energy consumption building design for schools. Requires any executive branch agency or institution and any locality entering the design phase for the construction of a new building greater than 5,000 gross square feet in size, or the renovation of a building where the cost of the renovation exceeds 50 percent of the value of the building, to ensure that such building includes a solar-ready, cool, or energy-efficient roof, defined in the bill. == Patron: Sturtevant Motor vehicle sales and use tax; exemptions; transfers; limited liability companies. Provides that no motor vehicle sales and use tax shall be imposed on vehicle transfers from (i) an individual, partnership, or limited liability company to a corporation or limited liability company or (ii) from a corporation or limited liability company to an individual, partnership, or limited liability company if (a) the transfer is incidental to the formation, organization, or dissolution of a corporation or limited liability company in which the individual, partnership, or limited liability company holds the majority interest in both entities and (b) the transfer to a limited liability company is not a precursor to a transfer of control of the assets of the company to avoid motor vehicle sales and use taxes. Under current law, transfers from (1) an individual or partnership to a corporation or limited liability company or (2) from a corporation or limited liability company to an individual or partnership are exempt from the motor vehicle sales and use tax if the transfer is incidental to the formation, organization, or dissolution of a corporation or limited liability company in which the individual or partnership holds the majority interest. == Patron: Suetterlein Virginia taxable income; standard deduction. Removes the sunset on elevated standard deduction amounts for single individuals and married persons that was scheduled to expire for taxable years beginning on and after January 1, 2026. == Patron: Craig Personal property tax relief; qualifying vehicles; reimbursement and appropriation. Provides for a portion of the general fund surplus at the close of the immediately preceding fiscal year to be appropriated for increased car tax relief. == Patron: Rouse Virginia Small Business Economic Development Act established; regulation of skill games; registration; penalties. Establishes the Virginia Small Business Economic Development Act for the purpose of providing a regulatory and registration scheme for skill game machines in the Commonwealth == Patron: Hashmi Parking Lot Solar Development Program and Fund; report. Directs the Department of Energy, in consultation with the Department of Environmental Quality, to establish by January 1, 2025, a Parking Lot Solar Development Program for the purpose of encouraging development of distributed parking lot solar projects up to one megawatt in size in the Commonwealth. == Patron: Hashmi Health care; decision-making; end of life; penalties. Allows an adult diagnosed with a terminal condition to request and an attending health care provider to prescribe a self-administered controlled substance for the purpose of ending the patient's life. == Patron: Reeves Charitable gaming. Amends charitable gaming law to allow, as a condition of receiving a charitable gaming permit or authorization to conduct electronic gaming, certain organizations to use a predetermined percentage of its receipts for expenses related to the rental of real property where such real property is involved in the operation of the organization and used for lawful religious, charitable, community, or educational purposes == Patron: Reeves Casino gaming; limits on required local referendums. Provides that the governing body of any eligible host city that holds a local referendum on the question of whether casino gaming should be permitted in such city that subsequently fails shall be prohibited from holding another referendum on the same question for a period of three years from the date of the last referendum. == Patron: Sturtevant Human smuggling; penalties. Makes it a Class 6 felony for any person who, with the intent to obtain an unlawful pecuniary benefit, knowingly and with the intent to evade the immigration laws of the United States uses a motor vehicle, aircraft, watercraft, or other means of conveyance to transport another person in or through the Commonwealth and knows or should have known that such person being transported is likely to be exploited for the financial gain of another. == Patron: Bagby Illegal gambling; exemptions. Exempts from the provisions of Code prohibiting illegal gambling the placement or operation of or communication to and from equipment in the Commonwealth associated with the hosting of lottery games duly authorized by another state or jurisdiction and regulated and operated consistent with and exclusively for the benefit of such state or jurisdiction, provided that wagering on such games is legally authorized in such other state or jurisdiction and the individuals wagering on such games are required by the laws or regulations of such other state or jurisdiction to be physically located within the geographic bounds of such other state or jurisdiction at the time the wager is initiated or placed. == Patron: Carroll Foy Military benefits income tax subtraction; age requirement; emergency. Eliminates the age requirement to claim the individual income tax subtraction for military benefits beginning in taxable year 2023. Under current law, only taxpayers 55 years of age or older may claim the subtraction prior to taxable year 2024. The bill contains an emergency clause. == Patron: Marsden Casino gaming; eligible host localities. Adds Fairfax County to the list of localities eligible to host a casino in the Commonwealth and provides that any proposed site for a casino gaming establishment considered by Fairfax County | | == Senate Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == == == == == | | == | == Patron: Favola Campaign advertisements; independent expenditures; electioneering communications; disclaimer requirements. Broadens the scope of disclaimer requirements for campaign advertisements to include electioneering communications, as defined in the bill, and messages advocating for the passage or defeat of a referendum. == Patron: Suetterlein Campaign finance; fundraising during special sessions prohibited. Prohibits campaign fundraising by a member of the General Assembly or statewide official on any day the General Assembly is scheduled to meet during a special session. Currently, such campaign fundraising is prohibited only during regular sessions of the General Assembly. == Patron: Roem Campaign finance; prohibited contributions to candidates. Prohibits candidates, campaign committees, and political committees from soliciting or accepting contributions from any public utility, as defined in the bill, and prohibits any public utility or any political committee established by such public utility from making any such contribution. | | == | == Patron: Marsden Release of hunting dogs; state highway or right-of-way. Creates a Class 3 misdemeanor for the intentional release of hunting dogs on a Department of Transportation right-of-way or on a highway owned or maintained by the Department of Transportation to hunt deer without the consent of the Department. The bill provides that a second offense is a Class 2 misdemeanor, and a third or subsequent offense is a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also permits the stopping of a vehicle on a highway for the retrieval of a companion animal from a highway or area adjacent to a highway. | | == | no docket | | == | == Patron: Head Medical Ethics Defense Act established. Establishes the right of a medical practitioner, health care institution, or health care payer not to participate in or pay for any medical procedure or service that violates such medical practitioner's, health care institution's, or health care payer's conscience, as those terms and conditions are defined in the bill. The bill provides protections for medical practitioners who disclose violations of the bill or report violations of laws or ethical guidelines for the safe provision of any medical procedure or service. The bill also provides a private right of action for any party harmed by violations of the bill. == Patron: Hashmi Contraception; right to contraception; applicability; enforcement. Establishes a right to obtain contraceptives and engage in contraception, as defined in the bill. The bill creates a cause of action that may be instituted against anyone who infringes on such right == Patron: Carroll Foy Donor human milk banks, health insurance; coverage for donor human milk. Prohibits any person from establishing or operating a donor human milk bank without first obtaining a license from the Department of Health. The bill directs the Department to establish criteria for the licensure of donor human milk banks and to promulgate regulations by July 1, 2025, that prohibit activities of donor human milk banks that do not meet the licensing standards and requirements | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home. YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time. This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING. Above I have listed the dockets for THIS TUESDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Tuesday that are of interest to you. Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely? Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill. It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Tuesday's docket. | | CHESTERFIELD VA TEA PARTY MEETING TOMORROW | When: Tuesday, February 6 Time: 7pm -8:30pm Where: The Great American Ranch 13995 Raised Antler Circle Midlothian, VA 23112 Legislative Update Overview of bills that passed, failed How to watch committees online | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you. If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars? It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly? Thank you in advance for your continued support. After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. name: Martin Sheen
subject: It's Martin Sheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, it's Martin Sheen. I’m sure that you weren’t expecting to hear from me today, but I felt like I had to reach out -- not as an actor or former (fictional) president, but as an activist and fellow concerned American.

Democrats have accomplished so much under President Biden -- making historic progress fighting climate change, passing meaningful gun safety reforms, and creating _millions_ of jobs. **But all of that progress, and all that we still have to do, could be taken away if Trump's MAGA Republicans take back the Senate this fall.**

**[That's why I'm asking you to make a matched $5 contribution to the DSCC today. Together, we can and _must_ defend our Democratic majority and protect the progress that we've fought so hard for. >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17354?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240205-MartinSheen-SheenWhatsNextRFFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240205-MartinSheen-SheenWhatsNextRFFR-Pros-sl1&akid=13464%2E9716520%2EHbhwsQ)**

**So, I’m sure you’re asking now: What’s next?** Well, we all have a choice to make -- every day from now until Election Day. We can choose to act and take our country's destiny into our own hands, or sit back and hope for the best. Friend, I know what my choice is. _What's yours?_

**Right now, a group of generous donors is personally TRIPLING the first $10,000 given to this email, to make sure Democrats have the resources to defend our Senate majority. So please, choose to fight for our democracy today:**

**[Will you rush $5 (becomes $15) to help us defend the Senate and keep fighting for progress? Your support could truly make all the difference.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17354?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240205-MartinSheen-SheenWhatsNextRFFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240205-MartinSheen-SheenWhatsNextRFFR-Pros-sl1&akid=13464%2E9716520%2EHbhwsQ)**

Thank you,
Martin Sheen

clean_body: | | | Friend, it's Martin Sheen. I’m sure that you weren’t expecting to hear from me today, but I felt like I had to reach out -- not as an actor or former (fictional) president, but as an activist and fellow concerned American. Democrats have accomplished so much under President Biden -- making historic progress fighting climate change, passing meaningful gun safety reforms, and creating millions of jobs. But all of that progress, and all that we still have to do, could be taken away if Trump's MAGA Republicans take back the Senate this fall. So, I’m sure you’re asking now: What’s next? Well, we all have a choice to make -- every day from now until Election Day. We can choose to act and take our country's destiny into our own hands, or sit back and hope for the best. Friend, I know what my choice is. What's yours? Right now, a group of generous donors is personally TRIPLING the first $10,000 given to this email, to make sure Democrats have the resources to defend our Senate majority. So please, choose to fight for our democracy today: Thank you, Martin Sheen | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0e8abd89b1442ecb81d19e282b2ddd2&_e=NQ_ik_GXvKWecERMCWvKnO2eJvV6ZcgqMDEalFgnOpn3n1gMA5OWO_nF4CAPE2mqahN1sV9KaVS9RKCPmTp-hi9P876Hyk4oiP8HTuNCM3hldGhqGH11swqWTp5Q1g_112C0UV9dDeV78ZCdBY4RvqlkqP4wUo3B5pJS8gBH8WN0eYzJT7EHnkkUBHa0RM0SV32EisyQos6uYjCm88JkNJ5FmCErhmaDY0ejptt0cNVEvoblVSXrooYes4qTUdXrS7B-UV-CiE00jkjpAg_1npS-5MDASgjOACgmBfYvt96eG9uGVEAeWg1jWdfP6Agqk_RhPP99CnOr2yoVVuTqlrxJ2nQ1lO7M1im2n4nXIMO6Wm1reY7qY9-qb0L0m2fARMlhpmcqXhSpV17K00JyXIcHGw8PjCAGtXU9Res9I9Y%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0e8abd89b1442ecb81d19e282b2ddd2&_e=NQ_ik_GXvKWecERMCWvKnO2eJvV6ZcgqMDEalFgnOpn3n1gMA5OWO_nF4CAPE2mqahN1sV9KaVS9RKCPmTp-hi9P876Hyk4oiP8HTuNCM3hldGhqGH11swqWTp5Q1g_112C0UV9dDeV78ZCdBY4RvqlkqP4wUo3B5pJS8gBH8WN0eYzJT7EHnkkUBHa0RM0SV32EisyQos6uYjCm88JkNJ5FmCErhmaDY0ejptt0cNVEvoblVSXrooYes4qTUdXrS7B-UV-CiE00jkjpAg_1njWBz_AMMZbtn2TyoQBDJQriBW9h1aD8hq9KOd1kuSawJ9vdfoRWJDDVi2DBbOci9sZkeByBRAqqTEgcGZEYZcCDITCJzvKH8VxbqSM3PgTj3c5zW8fOj_warqBurts3V6QpvQX1yw8bLOaIgAWm_bU%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0e8abd89b1442ecb81d19e282b2ddd2&_e=NQ_ik_GXvKWecERMCWvKnO2eJvV6ZcgqMDEalFgnOpn3n1gMA5OWO_nF4CAPE2mqahN1sV9KaVS9RKCPmTp-hi9P876Hyk4oiP8HTuNCM3hldGhqGH11swqWTp5Q1g_112C0UV9dDeV78ZCdBY4RvqlkqP4wUo3B5pJS8gBH8WN0eYzJT7EHnkkUBHa0RM0SV32EisyQos6uYjCm88JkNJ5FmCErhmaDY0ejptt0cNVEvoblVSXrooYes4qTUdXrS7B-UV-CiE00jkjpAg_1nniDjxb-puRNv7qhNCj2pM3LHctyF9DBpl0iqtU_4NrPZrEiGTcr3axxUR40RmsOnHE0rwtXEGAb8DB4lnzl7Awa-pv9Pqd5-ms9OmDzqfsr2dz3him7HgjEJi0QVhNpZxUExaEe_ukyXqbBgJ2Mz8o%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. As Auditor General, I cut through the bureaucratic red tape and delivered real results to working Pennsylvanians — including defending our elections and saving taxpayers over $2 billion in government waste, fraud, and corruption.
Now, I’m running for Attorney General to continue the battle against extremism — but I can’t win this toss-up race without help from dedicated supporters like you.

As Auditor General, I cut through the bureaucratic red tape and delivered real results to working Pennsylvanians — including defending our elections and saving taxpayers over $2 billion in government waste, fraud, and corruption. Now, I’m running for Attorney General to continue the battle against extremism — but I can’t win this toss-up race without help from dedicated supporters like you. = Thanks so much for your support, – Eugene | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Katie Porter
subject: One month to Election Day: an honest look at where things stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)
Derek, we are just one month until Election Day and ballots begin being mailed to voters TODAY. Here’s where things stand right now:
* Recent polls show between 20-25% of voters are still undecided.
* A poll from late last week shows us tied for second place with our Republican opponent. In California’s primary, the top two candidates, regardless of party, advance to the general. **We’re at risk of being pushed out of the general election because of this celebrity Republican.**
* We’re running TV and digital ads, planning events across the state, and mobilizing our supporters. But we’re being outspent every single day by another candidate in this race.

**Right now we have more money going out the door than we have coming in. It’s our most critical time to reach voters, and because I don’t take corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money, I really count on supporters like you. [Can you make a donation of $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240205-1?refcode=em20240205-37316&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37316_3422442_1EcYgO&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240205-1?refcode=em20240205-37316&refcode2=37316_3422442_1EcYgO&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)
Thanks so much!
Katie Porter
**California voters:** Make sure you have a plan to vote and that your voter registration is up to date. [You can find information about when, where, and how to vote here](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19968?t=2&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO).

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240205-37316&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=37316_3422442_1EcYgO&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=37316%2E3422442%2E1EcYgO)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

|

I’m running for the United States Senate because I don’t want my daughter to grow up with fewer rights than I had. Reports like this remind me how much is at stake: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78453741/453424883/959448484?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQxOTY4NDktNTVjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gTCL_4uPN0jax3x3t0S9moSgAzXBnSNkzO8mRosxGlg=) | [CHIP IN & FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78453742/453424884/959448484?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQxOTY4NDktNTVjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gTCL_4uPN0jax3x3t0S9moSgAzXBnSNkzO8mRosxGlg=)
---
At the moment, New Jersey is a safe haven for girls and women who simply want to make their own healthcare decisions without government interference, but if Republicans win in November, no state will be safe from their extreme, anti-freedom agenda.
**We don’t just need Democrats in Washington; we need fearless Democratic women who will make defending reproductive freedom their top priority.** That’s exactly who I am and who I will be.
We also need candidates willing to run with reproductive freedom at the heart of their campaign. Protecting abortion access and women’s rights is a winning issue. When people of all political backgrounds hear what is at stake, they will turn out and vote.
[**So will you chip in today to help me secure the Democratic nomination, win in November, and fight for reproductive rights from New Jersey to Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78453743/453424885/959448484?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWQxOTY4NDktNTVjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gTCL_4uPN0jax3x3t0S9moSgAzXBnSNkzO8mRosxGlg=)

We don’t just need Democrats in Washington; we need fearless Democratic women who will make defending reproductive freedom their top priority. That’s exactly who I am and who I will be. name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Big Wins for the Movement in January! Dr. Cornel West Heating Up Across 50 States
body:
Exponential jumps in volunteers and donations, while more states are including Dr. West on the election ballot! Join your fellow siblings in solidarity, and remember the revolution is not being televised!

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=1)
---
To All Our Dear Siblings, Each month we'll share a report on the growing progress of our historical movement to bring TRUTH, LOVE, and JUSTICE into our collective conversation and retire the corporate duopoly. **January brought exponential jumps in grassroots campaign volunteers and donations as Dr. West met crowds across the nation; more states have added Dr. West to their 2024 election ballots, and the Justice for All Party is launched to give voice to the marginalized.**
---
* * *
---
## **Dr. West On the Ballot: State by State**
**_Alaska & Oregon First to Add Dr. West to their General Election Ballots, Dr. West to compete in the California & Nebraska Primary Elections_**
---
|
---
| Supporters in California should [register with the Peace and Freedom Party](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=Ej5vaBQ1PeQtsQeJm5xagh1mufUDDoOOBrk42hcRuK0&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=2) by February 20th to vote for Dr. West in the Primary election. Every state requires independents to meet unique rules to be allowed alongside corporate duopoly party candidates on state election ballots. As a result, Dr. West will either stand as the candidate of likeminded independent parties, or in some cases as an independent candidate, based on state regulations in order to secure Ballot Access in all 50 states. [Support ballot access for Dr. West in your state.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/petitioning_launch?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=3)
---
* * *
---
## **Gatherings from Coast to Coast**
**In ten appearances across the nation,** Brother West passionately outlined the foundations of his vision for the 2024 presidential campaign. The movement seeks to be a beacon of hope for the everyday poor and working people of the globe, while standing against the forces of greed and selfishness. The campaign is founded on our potential as a people to create transformational change rooted in justice and kindness through the election and beyond. [Watch Brother West’s Recent Speech in Portland, Oregon](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZzXLDgMZokGq7-SkOogqj9&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=4)****
---
* * *
---
|
---|---
|
## **Justice for All Party**
On January 31, 2024, Dr. Cornel West announced the establishment of the historic Justice For All Party (JFA)—a grassroots, people-powered vehicle founded to help secure ballot access in specific states and galvanize local communities toward transformational change. [View the full press release here.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/justice_for_all?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=5)
---
|
---
* * *
---
## **Donations & Volunteer Signups Break Records!**
**January brought unexpected jumps in new supporters, as word of Dr. West's message of love-centered leadership continues to spread across communities nationwide.** Online donations doubled month over month from December to January, and the online volunteer community has exploded, with ballot access teams being formed in alignment with a 50-state strategy. The groundswell of support reflects how many resonate with Brother West's message, yet since the revolution is not being televised—your help is needed to share the message! Please considering volunteering today.
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=6 "VOLUNTEER NOW") [VOLUNTEER NOW](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=6)
---
* * *
---
## **Raise a Hand for TRUTH, LOVE, & JUSTICE: Give Five Today**
Brother West does not accept corporate donations, relying on the heartfelt support of individual supporters to keep momentum behind this movement. If you are able, raise your hand in solidarity today to "Give Five" toward this important effort to give voice to the silenced and uplift our fellow siblings everywhere. _****_
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=7 "PLEASE DONATE TODAY") [PLEASE DONATE TODAY](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=7)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_2024_solidarity_report&n=8)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: More News is Good News
body:
We're back in the press, earning media across our state thanks to your donations! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/more-news-is-good-news?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2b7fc53cbc&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=21dd6e8006&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen. You earned us even more media.
Remember this Lewistown photo?
[**Your donations earned us 600 words in the Lewistown News-Argus.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=8ae2e6fc77&e=805e709ff8)
**You can’t buy that kind of media.** I should know; I grew up in the news business!
And look at our big story in [Glasgow](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=dec69f73e1&e=805e709ff8). That’s on top of our[ radio sit-down](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=2614f877f2&e=805e709ff8) interview! Or our [leading story in The Phillips County News](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=612fdc03c2&e=805e709ff8). We did more than make the front page, we remained the most popular story on their website all week!
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=ec98d3c339&e=805e709ff8)
**Remember the**[**front-page story**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=cae8458a61&e=805e709ff8)**in Havre?** The same visit led to [coverage in the Blaine County Journal too!](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=38337eaf35&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=0c15a48c80&e=805e709ff8)
Six publications sharing our story with thousands of Montanans after my 4-day road trip that you helped fund!
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=0d55919c1d&e=805e709ff8)
[Donations](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=133b1091fb&e=805e709ff8) to this campaign go further than [donations](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=76b6e25aa6&e=805e709ff8) to most campaigns and a heck of a lot further than donations to my MAGA opponent, #ChristiWho. She might have the backing of the Far-Right and their fundraising machine, but we out-work her every day.
[Chip in right now to help us continue the fight.](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=54bf4593ed&e=805e709ff8)
_**Donations this week will help us prepare for County Fair Season**_. We order from Montana companies, so your money helps our small-town businesses.
Thank you,Jesse James Mullen
| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=a7e3749b74&e=805e709ff8)
---
|
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=fadf26729a&e=805e709ff8)

name: ABOLISH the Electoral College [FFR]
subject: re: Sen. Elizabeth Warren's 𝙩𝙝𝙧𝙞𝙡𝙡𝙞𝙣𝙜 announcement! »
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
She’s 100% right
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20728%2E4449941%2EBB0Wo9)

**Elizabeth Warren stunned us:** []() We’re launching another URGENT ad campaign to abolish the Electoral College and protect our Democracy.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Let's schedule a discussion.
To enhance accessibility, my team is scheduling out my digital one-on-one time with voters and supporters.
votedrbob.com/cc [votedrbob.com/cc]
If you'd like a call to address an issue or talk shop, I'm eager to connect sometime this month.
SCHEDULE A CALL [votedrbob.com/cc]
Friend,
Our district has been flown over and ignored for far too long. You deserve a candidate and a representative committed to constituent care and engagement.
Your feedback is important.
I want to hear from you.
Being a good listener is the #1 quality of a leader. Feel free to use this opportunity to make a campaign suggestion, ask a question, offer criticism, or whatever's on your mind.
As always, you can reply directly to these e-mails. I see them, read them, and reply to every one of them , but I'd also be grateful for the opportunity to chat on the phone.
Here's my February availability for a one-on-one meeting: votedrbob.com/cc [http://votedrbob.com/cc?fbclid=IwAR0xWORKwfpIDWQJrIlNqWDJ8OgL6MkMKlvAVQpqPiuA1NU84_ne-CPJbYQ] . I hope there's a convenient time and look forward to talking soon.
Thanks,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
PS: Your contributions help fund my ability to directly reach voters. Thank you for your continued support and generosity.
FUND OUR OUTREACH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

SCHEDULE A CALL [votedrbob.com/cc] Friend, Our district has been flown over and ignored for far too long. You deserve a candidate and a representative committed to constituent care and engagement. Your feedback is important. I want to hear from you. Being a good listener is the #1 quality of a leader. Feel free to use this opportunity to make a campaign suggestion, ask a question, offer criticism, or whatever's on your mind. As always, you can reply directly to these e-mails. I see them, read them, and reply to every one of them , but I'd also be grateful for the opportunity to chat on the phone. Here's my February availability for a one-on-one meeting: votedrbob.com/cc [] . I hope there's a convenient time and look forward to talking soon. Thanks, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan and the UP Democrat, MI01 [] PS: Your contributions help fund my ability to directly reach voters. Thank you for your continued support and generosity. FUND OUR OUTREACH [] Or, send a check to FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: Bring The Federalist Papers to your home
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gZ1LmSbyqWcrzPbpCQjwJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRno8j-P0S-aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtZmVkZXJhbGlzdC1wYXBlcnM_c2M9MDA0NzBOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgpluqQtwWWJLjrvUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gZ1LmSbyqWcrzPbpCQjwJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRno8j-P0S-aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtZmVkZXJhbGlzdC1wYXBlcnM_c2M9MDA0NzBOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgpluqQtwWWJLjrvUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gZ1LmSbyqWcrzPbpCQjwJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRno8j-P0S-aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtZmVkZXJhbGlzdC1wYXBlcnM_c2M9MDA0NzBOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgpluqQtwWWJLjrvUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gZ1LmSbyqWcrzPbpCQjwJg~~/AARclAA~/RgRno8j-P0S-aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtZmVkZXJhbGlzdC1wYXBlcnM_c2M9MDA0NzBOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZlZGVyYWxpc3RwYXBlcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgpluqQtwWWJLjrvUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=52510903a4724371b60eebc034794240&_e=XME2yufRxHU53YDa7j-WCABoyFEx7Ty-DjTT0daJvu4ix2IwOEcQZ5b7Fze9fVatGcn0Y3Ar3LLaxvWaMDQuNf-9igVvyi6giUHhyQZYh63os9qhETlMTLVt8aZ3mH8btvzUKXf3_botglLimsbqzNznuCx_pK9OukFAKnxS_RXIF1Lo_bg_sejaP5X-mq6KXdcPRDoFxmXveosFGIic10BUwHcO7cY8tXYCxzl0CD4PoivRQTQVYV0FJRSYgnUT71QATzrmboM6Ybjhr_ByCRGYIqJ2grg6uV88yNw2qtj_HWzx9-pdy55k8vJQsCyoFQdCvO7FuLOnt5mrKbq4uLkm6NvvlIN-y3c_ujUQ6OtpzsjaK6FkfB_PL6VB_3vRjtJcNpTo5If29OAmbEmg0vYsYieSgN9gLwmocLl2-A0%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

clean_body: You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Andy is battle-tested; he's defeated three straight millionaire self-funder candidates and won twice in a district that Donald Trump carried. He's helped Democratic candidates up and down the ballot win races, and with so much at stake, we need him leading the charge for the Democratic Party in New Jersey. We can't leave anything to chance. The National Republican Senatorial Chair said: "New Jersey could become a competitive race." If it does, New Jersey could be the state that hands Mitch McConnell the Senate majority. We can't let that happen. If Andy is the candidate for Senate, we'll be able to energize and mobilize voters across our state, and New Jersey won't even be close. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell won't win here if we have a strong Senate candidate at the top of the ballot. = More soon, Team Andy Kim | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78456222/453432879/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJkYjE2OWUtNTljNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj4mYnRN1b-hLVtUOIMoIjAllLKuxKdDCHK0cRLwfo4=&emci=96db169e-59c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=9bdb169e-59c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter, it’s The Copper Courier team. We’re COURIER’s Arizona newsroom – one of ten COURIER newsrooms in battleground states across the country.
In a moment, we’re going to share with you a bananas story we broke about _PragerU_ and right-wing misinformation in Arizona’s public schools. But, before we get to that, **[we’re humbly asking for you to chip in $17 or more now so we can continue to provide Arizonans with critical local news coverage ahead of the 2024 elections. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78456223/453432880/-593472309?refcode=20240205_EM_PragerUAZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJkYjE2OWUtNTljNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj4mYnRN1b-hLVtUOIMoIjAllLKuxKdDCHK0cRLwfo4=)**
Alright, Peter, if you’ve never heard of the right-wing media company _PragerU_ , buckle up.
Last week, _PragerU_ announced “a partnership” with Arizona’s superintendent of education. The deal means public schools can now use their content in their curriculum.
_PragerU_ has repeatedly come under fire for controversial courses, like “How to be a Rational Patriot,” “Mateo backs the blue,” and “How To Embrace Your Masculinity.”
**And they even have guest courses from pundits like Tucker Carlson and Candice Owens. **
**Arizonans should know that Tucker Carlson and Candice Owens may soon teach their kids misinformation in public school classrooms.** But with local newsrooms shutting their doors or getting gobbled up by right-wing media conglomerates, trustworthy, local reporting is hard to come by.
**That’s why we were proud to be the first to break the story:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78456224/453432881/-593472309?refcode=20240205_EM_PragerUAZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJkYjE2OWUtNTljNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cj4mYnRN1b-hLVtUOIMoIjAllLKuxKdDCHK0cRLwfo4=)
_The Copper Courier, January 31, 2024_

subject: ALERT: IL GOP Unveils New Logo Instead of New Leadership
body:
Although the IL GOP has unveiled its fresh, new look, what remains unchanged is the same stale leadership that only losses elections and fights Trump.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/f22ef4ab1d87/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-9641780?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=cb3b5bcc33) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=cb3b5bcc33)

https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3b5bcc33-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Unveils New Logo Instead of New Leadership, as Pro-Choice, Anti-Trump State Party Violates Platform and Perfects the Art of Losing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/02/il-gop-unveils-new-logo-instead-of-new-leadership-as-pro-choice-anti-trump-state-party-violates-platform-and-perfects-the-art-of-losing.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3b5bcc33-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Over the weekend, Illinois Republican Party chair Don Tracy sent out a mailer to registered Republican voters with a special gift enclosed – a Sustaining Membership Card for the 2024 election year embossed with your name in gold – and a message that this card “speaks volumes about your patriotism” and “it’s a testament to to your investments in our Party and our candidates.”

The letter goes on to say that “it’s not always easy being a Republican in Illinois, but this year, there is hope.”

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4d6718c6d2f4/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6691322?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
Welcome to Teichert on the Trail, our weekly email highlighting the latest news and events from the campaign as retired Air Force Brigadier General John Teichert crisscrosses the state to earn the hearts, minds, and votes of Marylanders in the race to be their next U.S. Senator.
**Teichert in the News**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=1898e00775&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Monday, General Teichert joined Marni Hughes on [NewsNation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2497121a19&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the deadly attacks in Jordan that killed three Americans over the weekend. When asked about retaliation options facing the Pentagon, Teichert responded, “We have been striking some of these proxy groups now for a while, though again, very weak and very late. But there are Iranian positions around the world–especially in Iraq and in Syria, and some Iranian boats in international waters. Those types of targets now are very much on the table to try to reestablish the deterrence that we've lost at least three months ago, if not three years ago.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=5324415666&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Tuesday, General Teichert joined David Webb on [Sirius XM](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=dc9591eed6&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss the current conflicts in the Middle East and perceptions of American strength. General Teichert stated in part, “For the last three years, we have lost our ability to deter, and now the President talks about regaining deterrence–ultimately the best way to regain it is never to lose it. And because he and his policies have demonstrated weakness chronically for the last three years, it’s going to be extremely difficult to get back to a deterrent posture until we have an administration that exudes strength, capability, will, and resolve.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=d852c51721&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert was pleased to join [NewsNation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ad53661ad7&e=1b1fb1ad9f) again on Wednesday to discuss threats made to the U.S. by Iran after the drone strikes that killed three Americans over the weekend. Teichert stated in part, “If we are scared to stand strong and demonstrate strength, capability, will, and resolve, then we are just going to continue to see this series of attacks like we’ve seen 170 of in the last four months. But the problem with deterrence is that it only works when you demonstrate strength, and the more weakness is perceived by Iran, the more likely it is that they’re going to continue to sponsor these types of attacks.
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3ab623e2b4&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert was thrilled to join Bob Miller on [The Morning News Express](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=f5e9193d72&e=1b1fb1ad9f) over at WFMD to discuss his bid for the U.S. Senate seat in Maryland and the conflict between Texas and federal border patrol agents over razor wire on the southern border. The General said of the issue, “There is a multi-faceted crisis going on at the border that is caused by the Biden Administration. It’s a public health problem, a public safety problem, a humanitarian crisis and a national security crisis. It starts by securing the border, and that should be a partnership between the federal government and the states- not this wrestling match where the Biden Administration is opening the border to Chinese fentanyl and national security threats when states like Texas are just trying to survive and hold off the onslaught because of the failure of policies in the Biden Administration.”
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4e26a5fe48&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John Teichert joined C4 and Bryan Nehman on [WBAL](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=5095f8ecf8&e=1b1fb1ad9f) this week to further address the attacks on American troops in Jordan, and how the U.S. should respond. Teichert said, “There are Iranian sites within Syria, Iranian bases, that would be perfect targets for us to strike. We've only hit proxies thus far. The Iranians don't care if he hit proxies, we can hit proxies all day, but until we start taking the fight to Iranian positions, specifically it’s less escalatory to do so in Syria or maybe Iranian ships, like the ones that are helping the Houthis target out nautical flow through the Red Sea. Those are great targets in an international space that would be less provocative but would hurt Iran in a way that would cause them to finally respect us.”
|

**Teichert on the Trail**

|

# Endorsement Alert!
This week, General Teichert was honored to receive endorsements from Wicomico County Sheriff Mike Lewis and Allegany County Sheriff Craig Robertson. Read why they support John Teichert for U.S. Senate [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=c9a32eb353&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
**Thoughts by Teichert**
On January 27th, John Teichert honored Holocaust Remembrance Day by reading scripture and reminding us the importance of preserving the Holocaust’s memory and fighting against modern forces that strive for similar goals. Watch his full video [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=72c474a2af&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=0325216dc8&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
In his latest blog, General Teichert reflected on his own interactions with security forces personnel as Commander of Joint Base Andrews and Edwards Air Force Base, and how leadership, not politics, can instill support for law enforcement and restore order to Maryland streets. Read his full article [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=fda1eab2ca&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert shared his thoughts on America’s insufficient national security strategy against current and future threats using his 33 years of experience in the Air Force and his experience as commander of Edwards Air Force Base. Read his full article published by[ Real Clear Defense](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=91f38919c9&e=1b1fb1ad9f).
|
---
# Upcoming Events
This coming week, General Teichert will continue to campaign around the state of Maryland and meet with as many voters as he can. Here are some of the places he’ll be in case you’d like to come stop by!
**Women's Republican Club of Kent Island and Queen Anne's County** February 15th at 7 PM El Jefe Mexican Kitchen & Tequila Bar1235 Shopping Center Rd, StevensvilleMD 21666, USA
**Garrett County GOP Candidate Forum** February 17th from 12–5 PM Garrett College Performing Arts Center687 Mosser RoadMcHenry, MD 21541
**Allegany County GOP Candidate Meet and Greet** February 19th from 10AM–7PM Allegany County Fairgrounds11400 Moss AveCumberland, MD 21502, USA
**Leisureworld Republican Club** February 21st at 1:30 PMClubhouse I3700 Rossmoor BlvdSilver Spring, MD 20906, USA

|
---
Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out [teichertformaryland.com](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ecb66b565f&e=1b1fb1ad9f) and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list!

Those types of targets now are very much on the table to try to reestablish the deterrence that we've lost at least three months ago, if not three years ago.” On Tuesday, General Teichert joined David Webb on to discuss the current conflicts in the Middle East and perceptions of American strength. General Teichert stated in part, “For the last three years, we have lost our ability to deter, and now the President talks about regaining deterrence–ultimately the best way to regain it is never to lose it. And because he and his policies have demonstrated weakness chronically for the last three years, it’s going to be extremely difficult to get back to a deterrent posture until we have an administration that exudes strength, capability, will, and resolve.” John Teichert was pleased to join again on Wednesday to discuss threats made to the U.S. by Iran after the drone strikes that killed three Americans over the weekend. Teichert stated in part, “If we are scared to stand strong and demonstrate strength, capability, will, and resolve, then we are just going to continue to see this series of attacks like we’ve seen 170 of in the last four months. But the problem with deterrence is that it only works when you demonstrate strength, and the more weakness is perceived by Iran, the more likely it is that they’re going to continue to sponsor these types of attacks. John Teichert was thrilled to join Bob Miller on over at WFMD to discuss his bid for the U.S. Senate seat in Maryland and the conflict between Texas and federal border patrol agents over razor wire on the southern border. The General said of the issue, “There is a multi-faceted crisis going on at the border that is caused by the Biden Administration. It’s a public health problem, a public safety problem, a humanitarian crisis and a national security crisis. It starts by securing the border, and that should be a partnership between the federal government and the states- not this wrestling match where the Biden Administration is opening the border to Chinese fentanyl and national security threats when states like Texas are just trying to survive and hold off the onslaught because of the failure of policies in the Biden Administration.” John Teichert joined C4 and Bryan Nehman on this week to further address the attacks on American troops in Jordan, and how the U.S. should respond. Teichert said, “There are Iranian sites within Syria, Iranian bases, that would be perfect targets for us to strike. We've only hit proxies thus far. The Iranians don't care if he hit proxies, we can hit proxies all day, but until we start taking the fight to Iranian positions, specifically it’s less escalatory to do so in Syria or maybe Iranian ships, like the ones that are helping the Houthis target out nautical flow through the Red Sea. Those are great targets in an international space that would be less provocative but would hurt Iran in a way that would cause them to finally respect us.” | Teichert on the Trail | | | | | | | | | | | Endorsement Alert! This week, General Teichert was honored to receive endorsements from Wicomico County Sheriff Mike Lewis and Allegany County Sheriff Craig Robertson. Read why they support John Teichert for U.S. Senate | Thoughts by Teichert On January 27th, John Teichert honored Holocaust Remembrance Day by reading scripture and reminding us the importance of preserving the Holocaust’s memory and fighting against modern forces that strive for similar goals. Watch his full video In his latest blog, General Teichert reflected on his own interactions with security forces personnel as Commander of Joint Base Andrews and Edwards Air Force Base, and how leadership, not politics, can instill support for law enforcement and restore order to Maryland streets. Read his full article General Teichert shared his thoughts on America’s insufficient national security strategy against current and future threats using his 33 years of experience in the Air Force and his experience as commander of Edwards Air Force Base. Read his full article published by. | Upcoming Events This coming week, General Teichert will continue to campaign around the state of Maryland and meet with as many voters as he can. Here are some of the places he’ll be in case you’d like to come stop by! Women's Republican Club of Kent Island and Queen Anne's County February 15th at 7 PM El Jefe Mexican Kitchen & Tequila Bar1235 Shopping Center Rd, StevensvilleMD 21666, USA Garrett County GOP Candidate Forum February 17th from 12–5 PM Garrett College Performing Arts Center687 Mosser RoadMcHenry, MD 21541 Allegany County GOP Candidate Meet and Greet February 19th from 10AM–7PM Allegany County Fairgrounds11400 Moss AveCumberland, MD 21502, USA Leisureworld Republican Club February 21st at 1:30 PMClubhouse I3700 Rossmoor BlvdSilver Spring, MD 20906, USA | Thank you for joining John on the trail as he looks to become the next U.S. Senator for the State of Maryland. Make sure to check out and see how you can donate, get involved, and join the mailing list! | | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Teichert for Senate. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Teichert for Senate PO Box 3782 1296 Cronson Blvd Crofton, MD 21114-3782 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or | | [Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
