name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: View from the Campaign Trail: Filing my candidacy, fighting FSSA cuts, big interviews & more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Last week, I️ filed my candidacy. Plus, my interview with NewsNation and fighting FSSA's proposed cuts to to the Attendant Care Program!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

As I momentarily step off the campaign trail, I'm excited to share some experiences of the past week. Your unwavering support and the energy across Indiana continue to fuel our mission to build a better future for our great state!

Read on for the highlights!

** Officially in the Race!
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last week, I️ delivered 8,000 verified signatures to the Secretary of State's office and officially filed my candidacy for Governor.

This would not have been possible without the support of thousands of Hoosiers and every member of #TeamCrouch (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/teamcrouch?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZX1ZJWkeYUreQ9MRN2Ss6y3MEFB3FBsho8UQyh5TMprPQ638l56v0e4rkHssvM3tGTXX5-PmtRGsb94A22WtP7YCb5f9c6AsTMlm1I-bpVb0l-O1bcinuTaah__5WBidSNynSRN9933NhKyO-Y_jd4eoG1j0Gi-POF8710P4aLS3DHVo6sgTZQCb5BcQC6Li8Q&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) who generously volunteered their time. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

If elected, I pledge to lead the charge to Axe The Tax and address critical issues—standing firm against China, securing our southern border with the Indiana National Guard, and advocate for the most vulnerable: the unborn, the elderly, the disabled, and those struggling with mental illness and addiction.

** IN THE NEWS: Lt. Gov. calls on FSSA to pause timetable to Indiana’s attendant care cuts (https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

I won't stand idly by while the lives and livelihoods of Hoosier families with medically complex children are being threatened. We will all be judged on how we care for the most vulnerable among us.
https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
READ THE ARTICLE (https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** SEEN ON SOCIAL: My Commitment to Axe The Tax (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana/posts/pfbid031PXBRVyHVvaSy64gyupyUHdS1aRC6CR3Ju8oSMvwVv1p1689YvsdQuuSFox8HwFl?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Every dollar in government has a name and a face—Hoosiers working hard to earn it. Let's seize the opportunity to give back and #AxeTheTax (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/axethetax?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZUnfeod6fFXWma9beejMJVCDtDP-OiaDO-R4QbKR3PeUXunLlslDGMnaI0tvvXNNHtyzxLDI1PzKn8O75afufBwXqBW46S_U9j2Mt4lg4TEmCYXb-VSgpGaJNWpoNvL6eIB2d4KYdSl0S4UDDm4dP2HOP1fQs9_i8U460Uv4jE8lBODO1TVS4GaY1g2nXNC4Ks&__tn__=*NK-R&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . It's time to prioritize people over government.
https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
LEARN MORE (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** IN THE NEWS: My interview with NewsNation on protecting Indiana land (https://www.newsnationnow.com/world/china/chinas-us-land-grab-key-issue-elections/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

The threat of foreign adversaries like China buying up our farmland is real.

When I saw that land near NSA Crane Naval Base was at risk of being bought up, I stopped it. This is not only about food security, but about national security.
https://www.newsnationnow.com/world/china/chinas-us-land-grab-key-issue-elections/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
READ THE ARTICLE (https://www.newsnationnow.com/world/china/chinas-us-land-grab-key-issue-elections/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Hamilton County Axe The Tax Roundtable
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

This week kicked off with a dynamic roundtable in Hamilton County, where local leaders and I engaged in insightful discussions on enhancing our economy.

A focal point of our dialogue was my comprehensive plan to eliminate Indiana's state income tax.

** Kicking off my 'Community Cares' tour in Greenfield
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In the spirit of continued community outreach, we hosted our first "Community Cares" meeting in Greenfield.

It was an honor to have Greenfield Mayor Guy Titus and Noblesville Mayor Chris Jensen join the conversation.

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

For nine years, I've been traversing our state, engaging with communities, and listening to your concerns.

This meeting is a crucial part of that ongoing effort—to understand what matters to you and to share, transparently, who I am, what I stand for, and my commitment to you as your governor.
READ MORE (https://www.greenfieldreporter.com/2024/02/02/crouch-meets-with-hancock-county-officials-to-discuss-policies/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Tippecanoe County Republican Women's Brunch
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Tippecanoe County Republican Women's Brunch was a gathering filled with enthusiasm, where we delved into important discussions about the future of our great state.

The empowering voices of the women in attendance resonated strongly, highlighting the integral role they play in shaping Indiana's path forward.

I'm truly appreciative of the warm welcome and insightful conversations that unfolded during this event.

** ICYMI: Endorsements (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------
I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to connect with you and communities across Indiana. Your insights, ideas, and support are instrumental as we work together to build a brighter future for our beloved state.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=4742bc4624-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_01_31_02_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4742bc4624-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.

clean_body: Last week, I️ filed my candidacy. Plus, my interview with NewsNation and fighting FSSA's proposed cuts to to the Attendant Care Program! Friends and fellow Hoosiers, As I momentarily step off the campaign trail, I'm excited to share some experiences of the past week. Your unwavering support and the energy across Indiana continue to fuel our mission to build a better future for our great state! Read on for the highlights! Officially in the Race! Last week, I️ delivered 8,000 verified signatures to the Secretary of State's office and officially filed my candidacy for Governor. This would not have been possible without the support of thousands of Hoosiers and every member of #TeamCrouch () who generously volunteered their time. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. If elected, I pledge to lead the charge to Axe The Tax and address critical issues—standing firm against China, securing our southern border with the Indiana National Guard, and advocate for the most vulnerable: the unborn, the elderly, the disabled, and those struggling with mental illness and addiction. IN THE NEWS: Lt. Gov. calls on FSSA to pause timetable to Indiana’s attendant care cuts () I won't stand idly by while the lives and livelihoods of Hoosier families with medically complex children are being threatened. We will all be judged on how we care for the most vulnerable among us. READ THE ARTICLE () SEEN ON SOCIAL: My Commitment to Axe The Tax () Every dollar in government has a name and a face—Hoosiers working hard to earn it. Let's seize the opportunity to give back and #AxeTheTax () . It's time to prioritize people over government. LEARN MORE () IN THE NEWS: My interview with NewsNation on protecting Indiana land () The threat of foreign adversaries like China buying up our farmland is real. When I saw that land near NSA Crane Naval Base was at risk of being bought up, I stopped it. This is not only about food security, but about national security. READ THE ARTICLE () Hamilton County Axe The Tax Roundtable This week kicked off with a dynamic roundtable in Hamilton County, where local leaders and I engaged in insightful discussions on enhancing our economy. A focal point of our dialogue was my comprehensive plan to eliminate Indiana's state income tax. Kicking off my 'Community Cares' tour in Greenfield In the spirit of continued community outreach, we hosted our first "Community Cares" meeting in Greenfield. It was an honor to have Greenfield Mayor Guy Titus and Noblesville Mayor Chris Jensen join the conversation. For nine years, I've been traversing our state, engaging with communities, and listening to your concerns. This meeting is a crucial part of that ongoing effort—to understand what matters to you and to share, transparently, who I am, what I stand for, and my commitment to you as your governor. READ MORE () Tippecanoe County Republican Women's Brunch The Tippecanoe County Republican Women's Brunch was a gathering filled with enthusiasm, where we delved into important discussions about the future of our great state. The empowering voices of the women in attendance resonated strongly, highlighting the integral role they play in shaping Indiana's path forward. I'm truly appreciative of the warm welcome and insightful conversations that unfolded during this event. ICYMI: Endorsements () Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. () Last but not least... I am deeply grateful for the opportunity to connect with you and communities across Indiana. Your insights, ideas, and support are instrumental as we work together to build a brighter future for our beloved state. Onward and upward, Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! Facebook () Twitter () Instagram () Website () mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com) Get Involved! Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more. GET INVOLVED () Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers! Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future. If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events: For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at: heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) . DONATE () Show Your Support - Get Suzanne Crouch Merchandise! As our campaign gains momentum, I'm excited to introduce a way for you to show your support and wear your pride for Indiana on your sleeve (literally)! SHOP () DONATE () ============================================================ Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch Copyright © 2024 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

body:
We’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan and Pennsylvania. These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Here at the DLCC, we’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan and Pennsylvania.** These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy, and if we want any chance of continuing last year’s winning streak of over _30 special election wins_ , we need your support. 📍**In Pennsylvania,** the House is TIED 101-101. The upcoming special election is _crucial_ to defending Democratic control. Extreme Republicans are itching for payback, so we can’t afford to lose _a single seat._ 📍 **In Michigan** last year, our Democratic trifecta repealed an archaic abortion ban and safeguarded abortion rights. Now, the House is TIED 54-54, and our trifecta is at risk. With _two_ special elections later this year, it’s _imperative_ that we win _both_ specials if we want to protect our majority. **These races will set the tone for our upcoming elections this year. We’ve built an expansive target map for 2024; not just to defend our democracy, but to BREAK Republican supermajorities and put an end to their cruel, far-right agenda. But to truly make an impact, we need your help.** [Will you rush a $7 donation today to block Republicans from gaining any more power and help state Democrats secure victories in key battleground states like Michigan and Pennsylvania? clean_body: We’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan and Pennsylvania. These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy. | | | | | ---|--- Here at the DLCC, we’re gearing up to face majority-defining special elections in Michigan and Pennsylvania. These elections are not just about winning seats; they're about safeguarding our democracy, and if we want any chance of continuing last year’s winning streak of over 30 special election wins , we need your support. 📍In Pennsylvania, the House is TIED 101-101. The upcoming special election is crucial to defending Democratic control. Extreme Republicans are itching for payback, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat. 📍 In Michigan last year, our Democratic trifecta repealed an archaic abortion ban and safeguarded abortion rights. Now, the House is TIED 54-54, and our trifecta is at risk. With two special elections later this year, it’s imperative that we win both specials if we want to protect our majority. These races will set the tone for our upcoming elections this year. We’ve built an expansive target map for 2024; not just to defend our democracy, but to BREAK Republican supermajorities and put an end to their cruel, far-right agenda. But to truly make an impact, we need your help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Your contribution is vital in these early stages of 2024. It supports our candidates on the ground and fuels our campaigns to ensure every vote and every voice is counted and heard. Thank you, Team DLCC P.S. Don't underestimate the power of your donation. Friend,
---
Once again, a left-wing dark money group has launched a misleading attack ad against me.
---
They’re running this misleading ad daily in the Milwaukee media market and showing no signs of slowing down. Their most recent ad buy brings their total to **$1.7 million spent against me on Milwaukee TV ads in the last 6 months.**
---
In 2023, more money was spent attacking me than **any Republican in Congress.**
---
**_Now, they’re ramping up their attacks for 2024._**
---
They’ve been running false and misleading attacks against me because they know control of the House runs through Wisconsin’s First Congressional District.
---
Their most recent attack against me was labeled **MOSTLY FALSE** by PolitiFact.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=d3d4293653d14ebf8daa24bdd9fe426d&_e=0fVM0RfaJ3kjXCBwKmO7lCLueWhNSNaYP1aHGoPORhAMf9Sqhp3Bfph3yaabHkim7RFl8nEQ7BE9GxN7KXuahfo0-OaTJVF0uS8tOMfByc5boMHObFEmtFSIzsGm-UMqJ3kID4shSXiyl5YQTpIK-cuYld6jG-iBHuC9MRh3X7dnzkdAQUaxE1r4x9YVfTWRCj5BITxX4OS8mNNycsrM1QHFeD27xnmMSmT6ZuLS7MgrX5uDS_gs4oaG0d11ltIGtCKS86SyLQHXTdVrO616-Jk3bjauv0OZseTdjNbco0u1iDlVTa1kGSMP61fc-S7e8-znGKgEpAuQCbXXnGMe12Ji_oD3HE9kk9Bh4zRd1fniaumr5gbWNIoREFoUV1YQ5zHkJKAcWOPlJ7wELozo13Yg0KPQgxdg0LLkoKmaYN584aiYVc-5wjpTtO2Mz5x-PF2kxRk94AjYVhLpvX7a_TNl1V7Dro1D8VtNr6QjiiQ%3D)

House Republicans currently have a 2-seat majority. It’s one of the smallest majorities in American history.

If we want to keep our majority in 2024, we must win Wisconsin’s First Congressional District.

I need your help to fight back.

clean_body: | Friend, Once again, a left-wing dark money group has launched a misleading attack ad against me. They’re running this misleading ad daily in the Milwaukee media market and showing no signs of slowing down. Their most recent ad buy brings their total to $1.7 million spent against me on Milwaukee TV ads in the last 6 months. In 2023, more money was spent attacking me than any Republican in Congress. Now, they’re ramping up their attacks for 2024. They’ve been running false and misleading attacks against me because they know control of the House runs through Wisconsin’s First Congressional District. Their most recent attack against me was labeled MOSTLY FALSE by PolitiFact. House Republicans currently have a 2-seat majority. It’s one of the smallest majorities in American history. If we want to keep our majority in 2024, we must win Wisconsin’s First Congressional District. I need your help to fight back. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

subject: China put a bounty on the head of one of my speakers
body:
This is practically a death sentence if she returns to Hong Kong.

[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L2OnDAUxfGnMR3IH9hAQREF0USTIk1KdLHvgDXGtmzDat5-NavZettfcaT_-X9bbmCd9dtfOHB86LSkvIRYludV6916WDjlbU15TeXCKjOaQStQFY6sox1TbSdYtY9KakPlwAH6fuAdXSU18q56wYRUjLLKjq8dyqlkg6AtbVTf6ZWiNndUA8iBtBQcptI8EKMOfkuYc8J4rs5q8I0OR-XGvZSYifhF-Ez4_Ayn365gNeYm4XU1OhA-G5uzNeiLCR6KDT7XEYiYz3IsGo4IdvNETGs4fXkSrl5-oLHnQcSU8Mo7JHx7DmfSSMQU4S1FEzH9-f2v_u55uw6-oC9ETC5soUqjiR_WOZtVR1q6HWDdV0P58eTPAAAA__82SoNl)
Friend,

The Chinese Communist Party has placed a 1 million dollar bounty on one of the Dissident Project speaker's heads. Do you want to know how she found out?

Frances Hui woke up at seven in the morning and discovered dozens of texts and calls asking her if she was okay after the announcement.

**This is practically a death sentence if she returns to Hong Kong.**

A lot of us expected this to come, but it was definitely shocking news.

Her activism in the U.S. for Hong Kong, democracy, and freedom is now criminalized in Hong Kong. However, that hasn't stopped Frances' advocacy. Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America and a speaker with the Dissident Project.

The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide.

[Your generous support helps our speakers share their stories at no cost to the schools. Please consider donating to the Dissident Project by clicking here >>>](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0L0OmzAUxfGnMRvI-IswMFRFLFU6dOloXewbsGJsyza0efsqVTp3_Q1H-p-fd30H513YvsOB09NknYuOqerX1ZrdBdCMMtFS1lKp-8ZOdjQKVINTP9ChV2LgfbNPapRM0odlvF8ZF8KKBx2spPIGysBNNm5671BGZT9yKminboNZKRr7QDWCHImg4DHX7omYTAxbxlIypnP1zkDoTDwaP-21pkL4F8IWwpZXPMN2RWewdBmvqzORsMW6UpzFUG0MUF0MpU1A-HLWQxs4ErgtED6v8Qz1RZh6-4HWnQfhc8ar7JDx4yWe2SDhc4KPVEP4_O3rj_Zfz8dNDBVDJXyu-Ltq78Kzb_Jk0y_nvStqIIJuBzj_t6T-9-o_AQAA___TxoYW)

[Donate](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0LHumzAQx_GnMRvI2MQuA0NVxFKlQ5eO1nE-wArYlm2o8vZVonT-r5_hTt_fn7u5g9udX3_BQcMDk0nZhFjM86pxcx6M4KKruaj5zbSVHWyPClRFQ6u5blWnZVttgxY0A_GZNAfUQtmFtBSkO1gWrfu2csPrDhf81vaSd7xR3zTOnNAupHq49azjsFMqzYMoYvBropwTxXPeHYJvMBzVPmylxMzkdyYmJqZnOP16BYeUm0TX1WBgYrIuZ2fJFxs8FBd8riMwOZ3lMAhHBLd6Jsc5nL48mVAvP8i682ByTHTlDRJ9PIczITE5RvhIQSbHnz9-1_97Po7BF_KFyfH9lsx8lhJ8lQYb_7p9d1lp1vH1ALe_Y8qXa_8LAAD__wc8iLM)

This isn't the first time the CCP has threatened Frances Hui for her pro-democracy advocacy.

**Back in 2019, she received death threats for organizing solidarity rallies in Boston to support the Hong Kong pro-democracy movement. Her personal information and photos were shared widely around the Chinese community. Some threatened to protest her activities in front of her church and her home. **

At a rally she organized in August of that year, the Chinese consulate mobilized hundreds of Chinese people to show up. They exchanged messages about bringing firearms to the rally and threatening to shoot her!

The intense standoff between the two sides later turned physical when a man tried to start a fight with members of the community. He then followed Francis to her dorm in an attempt to intimidate her. Local police came and escorted him away, but he faced no repercussions.

[Please donate $20.24, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously afford to get this story in front of high school students nationwide >>](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0DEPnCAYxvFPg5sGQeAcHJoal-Y6dOlI8OU9JYdAAG3v2zfXXOeuv-FJ_s_Pu74b513YvpsDpydknYuOqerX1cLugtGMsqGlrKVC942d7AjSyAanXlHVy0HxvtknsT6ElHhTKx3NwNeeKoGK9ivcwIIQjZveO5RR0Y-cDrSTNwUrRbAPlKMRIxmo8Zhr90RMEMOWsZSM6Vy9AxM6iEfjp73WVAj_QthC2PKKZ9iu6ABLl_G6OoiELdaV4iyGamMw1cVQ2mQIX856aDBHMm4LhM9rPEN9ESbffqB150H4nPEqu8n48RLPDEj4nMxHKhA-f_v6o_3X83GIoWKohM8Vf1ftXXiyJk82_XLeuyIVGeh2GOf_ltT_Xv0nAAD__5JAhqw)

[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyE0LuOnTAUheGnMR3INwwUFFEQTTQp0qS0NvY-YA2-yDZMzttHE53U037Fkv71-02_gTtd2H-Cx_ndZJ2Ljqnq592awwXQnHLZUt7SXrPGznYyClSDMxvowJQcBGuOmU-TGgHpYAc2MiqZ5OND2q2XVvXcqMbNnzuU055NgkraqXEwG0VjH6gm6CciKZyYa_eOmEwMe8ZSMqZrO52B0Jnom3M-ak2FiG-Er4Svz3iF_Y7OYOky3ndnIuGrdaU4i6HaGKC6GEqbgIj1ql4b8AncHohYtniF-iRcfbpH6y5PxJLxLgdkfHmJVzZIxJLgJdUQsfz4_qv93_NyE0PFUIlYHvFPwI-inYcdmzzb9OHO0xU1EEl3D-78F1O_fPtvAAAA__9W4Ydc)

Frances spent the rest of her senior year of college living in constant fear of being watched and followed.

Four years later, although one of the operatives involved in spying on her activities was indicted by the Department of Justice for acting as a Chinese agent in the U.S., many others have not faced any consequences.

**It 's chilling to imagine that some of these people continue to walk around freely and harass dissidents in broad daylight on American soil.**

But these acts of intimidation will not stop Frances from advocating for freedom and democracy.

She is working with the Dissident Project to share her experience with high school students. They need to hear that evil authoritarian governments aren't a thing of the past.

**Your generous donation gives students a chance to hear her story.**

clean_body: This is practically a death sentence if she returns to Hong Kong. Friend, The Chinese Communist Party has placed a 1 million dollar bounty on one of the Dissident Project speaker's heads. Do you want to know how she found out? Frances Hui woke up at seven in the morning and discovered dozens of texts and calls asking her if she was okay after the announcement. This is practically a death sentence if she returns to Hong Kong. A lot of us expected this to come, but it was definitely shocking news. Her activism in the U.S. for Hong Kong, democracy, and freedom is now criminalized in Hong Kong. However, that hasn't stopped Frances' advocacy. Frances Hui is the first Hong Kong activist to receive political asylum in America and a speaker with the Dissident Project. The Dissident Project provides high schools with access to informed, intelligent perspectives from speakers who have lived under current and former socialist states worldwide. This isn't the first time the CCP has threatened Frances Hui for her pro-democracy advocacy. Back in 2019, she received death threats for organizing solidarity rallies in Boston to support the Hong Kong pro-democracy movement. Her personal information and photos were shared widely around the Chinese community. Some threatened to protest her activities in front of her church and her home. At a rally she organized in August of that year, the Chinese consulate mobilized hundreds of Chinese people to show up. They exchanged messages about bringing firearms to the rally and threatening to shoot her! The intense standoff between the two sides later turned physical when a man tried to start a fight with members of the community. He then followed Francis to her dorm in an attempt to intimidate her. Local police came and escorted him away, but he faced no repercussions. Frances spent the rest of her senior year of college living in constant fear of being watched and followed. Four years later, although one of the operatives involved in spying on her activities was indicted by the Department of Justice for acting as a Chinese agent in the U.S., many others have not faced any consequences. It 's chilling to imagine that some of these people continue to walk around freely and harass dissidents in broad daylight on American soil. But these acts of intimidation will not stop Frances from advocating for freedom and democracy. She is working with the Dissident Project to share her experience with high school students. They need to hear that evil authoritarian governments aren't a thing of the past. Your generous donation gives students a chance to hear her story. Friend, please click on any button below to show your support. Dissident Project speakers have the power to show students across the country the value of freedom, what can happen when it's taken away, and what you have to risk to get it back. So far, they 've shared their stories with nearly 15,000 American students, and with your support, we can reach even more this year. Your donation is critical to our success. Please click on any button below to show your support. Thank you for showing your support, Casey Given The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rep. Eric Swalwell
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-feb2024-fr-february?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend,

This month, we commemorate Black History Month. Also known as African American History Month, the month-long recognition has been designated during the month of February by every U.S. President, dating back to 1976.

Friend, Black History Month is dedicated to both remembering the rich history and making a pledge to never stop learning about the contributions of Black Americans since before our nation’s founding. But Black history is not just in the past — it is always being written.

At a time when Black History is being politicized and used as a political weapon from the right, I stand in support of teaching the truth about racism in America — past and present.

Friend, we can’t understand history when we refuse to listen honestly to Black struggle and triumph. I am committed to standing up against those who think such important history is nothing but a political ploy.

So this February, I ask that we all take time to honor Black History Month — an annual celebration of the achievements by Black Americans and a time to celebrate their role in our country’s history.

With gratitude,

— Eric Swalwell

Today, I just want to say thank you.

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=iBWor1g%2FIZIQ6myAN9oCOkhTJQVFQbEXyNHKWuox1Ab%2BUjAMSQub5lwg%2B1asJKZx3%2B2c5NrV%2Bnf5ujnP7myTVTmndHPKAs7prnUT%2BnnpXLTuFMfT1uYB%2FxRs4Ogy1O6odpesSfpmIurZ37d6KEUVf6DHbG%2FMyfaydTrNqFXCYouNu%2Bp5Ldo6c6lIF6l58Ez3hs27YVRfkADJyUvnGRbC6EvBhqbyoaKSoW88rf1I4brpgtkRL77avFawiKNqrfxmLFFvMe3TKSlEtCGGCxqsGcglHvv38AE%2Fkd8zCTPP6MyPJwlVBLpifwA9%2BWMm%2FrnVvnE9%2FuXMj1oIiTtk31sSCfc%2FkdArVEBcfXlYxZFNL1XzVxW28Hy9XVh8UT0NLz8DnFZN3NC0BHFtPvvYignjmRwXCavkg2gYeKBsE2QASA7LeyUcbyXV%2BmT%2FvwPBhXDx)

| | Happy February! Today, I just want to say thank you.

I am beyond grateful for the overwhelming support this campaign received just in the last month. We more than crushed our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and it is all thanks to supporters like you.

Hitting our first major fundraising goal of the election year is a big deal. It will make the difference between enduring another term of Perry extremism... or firing Scott Perry.

**Together, I know we can make sure he loses his seat for good.**

Scott Perry relies on millions of dollars in dark money to fund his campaign, but thanks to you, our grassroots campaign can win. **Every single dollar makes a difference, and I truly mean it.** When you donate $20, $10, or even just $5, you help me reach voters disillusioned with Perry's "leadership" and actually work with our community to come up with solutions for us here in Pennsylvania and the rest of America.

We are gaining momentum, and we are not just one step closer to firing Scott Perry, but also to **flipping the House blue.** Come Election Day, we have a real shot at winning, and I know that we can do this because I have the best team on my side (you!).

Thank you for all of your hard work and support,

Janelle
---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: We’re pushing hard, and gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re pushing hard to bring new voters onto the rolls so that we can win
critical elections in Texas. And while we’ve been successful in recruiting
volunteers to do this work through online events, nothing beats being on
the ground.

So last week, I left El Paso to lead organizing drives across the state.
We started off in Dallas and Fort Worth, then continued on to Austin, San
Antonio, and Houston. And I’ve got to tell you — the response truly
exceeded my expectations.

I was shocked not only by how big volunteer turnout was in each city, but
by how many people signed up for the toughest work of becoming a Volunteer
Deputy Registrar (VDR) with our team.

VDRs are essentially “super volunteers” who are the heart of our program.
To become one, you have to take a training, pass an exam, and get
deputized by your county elections office. Once you’re deputized, you can
legally register Texas voters.

Since Texas Republicans have banned online, automatic, and same-day voter
registration, these volunteers are the heroes we need in this moment and
the key to ensuring that every eligible voter can participate in our
elections.

And they’re already getting after it, nine months out from the general
election:

In 2020, Powered by People registered more than 200,000 voters and helped
produce the highest turnout that Texas had seen in nearly three decades.
And we did it with less than a third of the VDRs who have signed up with
us so far in 2024 — so just imagine what we can accomplish this year if we
keep up the momentum.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240205.SZEQBW&refcode=ema20240205-238978&t=1001&akid=238978%2E444211%2EXdG00J ]I hope you’ll support this work with a donation of $3 or
whatever you can today. Every dollar will go toward recruiting more
volunteers, registering more voters, and increasing Democratic turnout in
critical elections across the state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240205.SZEQBW&refcode=ema20240205-238978&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=238978%2E444211%2EXdG00J ]DONATE $3

We’re off to a great start. So let’s keep it going, and push even harder
if we can. Winning Texas is a matter of time and effort. The more effort
we put in, the less time it will take to get there.

The people of this country are counting on us.

Beto

subject: The Biden Administration Is Once Again Trying To Fix Something ThatAin’t Broke
body:

Peter, I have exciting news to share:

**Ballots are mailed out for our March 5th primary election starting TODAY!**

This is a key moment in our grassroots campaign. Voters across CA-47 now have the opportunity to cast their vote in our race.

But our work is far from over. Over the next few weeks, it’s critical that we continue to reach undecided voters with my vision for Orange County – we can’t afford to let CA-47 turn red.

**[Will you chip in $3 to boost our efforts? Every dollar helps fund our voter outreach efforts, including our TV ads, yard signs, mailers, and emails like this one.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78457935/453439225/1033648996?refcode=em-2.5.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0NWMyYWItNWVjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IHxUgqVZxsLXmdoqbRAXZQDRO9BTb_6q_2HMdCFNf38=)**

I know I’ve said it before, but with everything at stake I need to say it again: This is a must-win seat.

Political experts agree. Dave Wasserman of the _Cook Political Report_ said, “If Dems can’t keep this seat [CA47], they have no hope of winning House majority.”

Democratic leaders across California and in Washington know I am the only candidate in this race who can defeat our extreme GOP opponent Scott Baugh in November and protect our community. With a Democratic House majority, we will protect a woman’s right to choose and build a better economy for Orange County and beyond.

Now that ballots are going out today, voters have the power to decide. And here’s the truth: Polling shows that once undecided voters learn about our campaign, they overwhelmingly support us over our opponents.

**[But the first step is making sure they hear about our movement. That’s where you come in: Will you chip in $3 to help us increase our voter outreach when it matters most?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78457937/453439227/1033648996?refcode=em-2.5.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0NWMyYWItNWVjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IHxUgqVZxsLXmdoqbRAXZQDRO9BTb_6q_2HMdCFNf38=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I have exciting news to share: Ballots are mailed out for our March 5th primary election starting TODAY! This is a key moment in our grassroots campaign. Voters across CA-47 now have the opportunity to cast their vote in our race. But our work is far from over. Over the next few weeks, it’s critical that we continue to reach undecided voters with my vision for Orange County – we can’t afford to let CA-47 turn red. = | **= I know I’ve said it before, but with everything at stake I need to say it again: This is a must-win seat. Political experts agree. Dave Wasserman of the Cook Political Report said, “If Dems can’t keep this seat [CA47], they have no hope of winning House majority.” Democratic leaders across California and in Washington know I am the only candidate in this race who can defeat our extreme GOP opponent Scott Baugh in November and protect our community. With a Democratic House majority, we will protect a woman’s right to choose and build a better economy for Orange County and beyond. Now that ballots are going out today, voters have the power to decide. And here’s the truth: Polling shows that once undecided voters learn about our campaign, they overwhelmingly support us over our opponents. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Golden State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
Derek,
When I first announced I would be running for the Senate about a year ago, I pledged that we would build a grassroots movement that wouldn’t leave anyone behind.
**And that’s exactly what we’ve been doing.**
My team and I are leaving no stone unturned to reach voters in every corner of California.
With tens of millions of voters across the state, and **29% of these voters still undecided according to a recent poll** , we have a lot of ground to cover to reach as many voters as we can.
**[Will you pitch in $5.80 to help me reach voters in all of California’s 58 counties? We’re building the largest grassroots movement this state has ever seen, but it’s only possible with your support.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2845?c0=feb2024_abs_em.Hcrozj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $5.80](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2846?c0=feb2024_abs_em.IrRF87&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2024_abs_em.m10vJ_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2024_abs_em._zw4_y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2024_abs_em.4tOU9G&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2024_abs_em.f59tWU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)
---
We’re leaving no corner of our great state out of sight. Because as California's next Senator, I’ll be representing each and every person in the Golden State.
I’ll fight for them day in and day out.
To lower housing costs. To expand affordable healthcare access. To improve our infrastructure and expand rural broadband access.
But to do all this, I need your help in these final four weeks of the primary election.
**[That’s why I am asking you to pitch in $5.80 to help us win in all of California’s 58 counties.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2845?c0=feb2024_abs_em.Hcrozj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=5359%2E5257348%2Elc5yo_)**
Thank you,
Adam

Hi Peter, it’s Tom Suozzi. Fight for Progress asked me to reach out with an important message. I’m writing to ask for your support so we can win the NY-03 special election in just 8 days.

[_**I really need everyone reading this to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress right away. Let me explain why.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78458396/453441100/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkZTZmYjk1LTYwYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0NxnpsWjCTX5NfkQ4QH5lLopfCvuh9s_aBoxWAwA5-w=)

With under 1 week left until this critical special election, polling is in the _**margin of error**_ , and far-right outside groups are spending **nearly $5 million** against me in these final days. Early voting is already underway, and we’re running out of time to make our final push to voters.

Peter, we can’t afford to fall short here. The whole nation will be watching NY-03. Climate change, immigration reform, gun safety, reproductive rights–all of it is at stake on February 13. As the nation looks to Long Island to see which way we will go, we’ve got to make it clear–**we need a government that can solve our problems and get things done!**

[_**So Peter, I’m humbly asking–with so much on the line and the whole nation watching, will you rush a split donation right away to help me win this special election and elect Democrats around the country?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78458397/453441101/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-02-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkZTZmYjk1LTYwYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0NxnpsWjCTX5NfkQ4QH5lLopfCvuh9s_aBoxWAwA5-w=)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is what I want to accomplish in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for working people. Here’s what I want to accomplish once I get there:
**Putting people in charge of their own lives:** Politicians like Josh Hawley are obsessed with controlling every aspect of our lives. I’m committed to restoring abortion access and protecting reproductive freedom in all 50 states by ending the filibuster and codifying Roe v. Wade — finally giving people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities.
**Holding politicians + corporate elites accountable:** Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the massive corporations responsible for stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and it’s why I’m holding myself and my campaign to that same standard.
**Showing up for working Missourians:** Real workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds writing the rules we all have to live by. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country.
**A Marshall Plan for the Midwest:** DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on corporate handouts and forever wars. Now, it’s time to invest in the workers and communities that make our country strong so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and finally start making stuff in America again.
**I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there.[So Peter, will you make your first donation of $10 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43360?refcode=em20240205-4756&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4756%2E614464%2ENj2D4T)**

clean_body: Peter — I’m running to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for working people. Here’s what I want to accomplish once I get there: Putting people in charge of their own lives: Politicians like Josh Hawley are obsessed with controlling every aspect of our lives. I’m committed to restoring abortion access and protecting reproductive freedom in all 50 states by ending the filibuster and codifying Roe v. Wade — finally giving people the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and economic opportunities. Holding politicians + corporate elites accountable: Too many of our leaders have been bought off by the massive corporations responsible for stripping our communities for parts. That’s why I’m fighting to ban insider trading for members of Congress and abolish ALL corporate PAC donations to campaigns — and it’s why I’m holding myself and my campaign to that same standard. Showing up for working Missourians: Real workers are tired of corporate elites and frauds writing the rules we all have to live by. I’ll always stand on the side of working people by continuing to fight for the right to organize and pushing back against anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams in Missouri + all across the country. A Marshall Plan for the Midwest: DC politicians spent decades wasting trillions of dollars on corporate handouts and forever wars. Now, it’s time to invest in the workers and communities that make our country strong so we can rebuild our forgotten towns and finally start making stuff in America again. I’m ready to represent Missouri and stand up for everyday people in the U.S. Senate — but I need your help to get there. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: With your help, we can accomplish all this and more. Thanks for helping us get it done, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

clean_body: We think of Arizona’s First Congressional District as the Super Bowl of American politics in 2024. = Peter, this upcoming weekend, people across America will be enjoying the Super Bowl with family and friends. At Andrei’s house, they will be cheering on the Chiefs (and especially their great #87 and Taylor Swift’s boyfriend, Travis Kelce), or else his daughter will be very, very mad. So we have a simple ask for you today: = | = We think of Arizona’s First Congressional District as the Super Bowl of American politics in 2024. Pundits have made it clear this is a “toss up” race that won’t just help decide who controls the House, but also who controls the White House. Together, we’ve already broken the all-time Congressional fundraising record in Arizona. But the road ahead won’t be easy. Andrei’s grassroots campaign isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs, and we’re up against the darling of corporate interests: David Schweikert. Colorado is known for its beautiful mountains and breathtaking landscapes, but there’s another reason you should be paying attention to this state: **Corporate polluters, including the fossil fuel industry, have made 80216 one of the most polluted zip codes in the country.** And the communities in North Denver and Commerce City are living with the devastating health consequences. It's _infuriating_ and _unacceptable._ And we need to fight like hell to put an end to the fossil fuel industry’s stranglehold on our elected officials. _Jane won’t back down, and neither should we._ **_[Last week, Jane met with local leaders and activists fighting to reverse the harm these industries have done to their communities& pledged to fight alongside them. Click here to read The Denver Post’s coverage of Jane’s visit and learn more >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78458905/453442967/1240937746?refcode=ea.c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MGI0MzI5LTYxYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ihlVo4TFHJUfwxLPsdnxCUsWCAWIzZWYRWSpyHfUYto=&emci=606daec5-3ec4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)_** | [**LEARN MORE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78458907/453442971/1240937746?refcode=ea.c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MGI0MzI5LTYxYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ihlVo4TFHJUfwxLPsdnxCUsWCAWIzZWYRWSpyHfUYto=&emci=606daec5-3ec4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=c70b4329-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=4823105)

Jane’s goal is simple: replace the politicians who are deep in the pocket of the fossil fuel industry with climate champions who will fight like hell to move our country in the right direction.
The Jane Fonda Climate PAC works to elect climate champions all around the country, mostly in down-ballot races like state legislatures, mayors, comptrollers, city council members, and county executives that can have major impacts on climate action in their communities.
But Jane can’t do this work on her own; none of us can. But together, we can build a community of supporters, activists, donors, and community leaders who can take action together and elect a new generation of climate champions to office. This is what the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is all about.

Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "_How can we do better this year?_ "
And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now.
You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights, in California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights.
But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further stripped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded.
**And 2024 is not going to be _any_ easier.

This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, _your_ life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized.**

**[That's why I'm counting on _you_ and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share your top priorities of 2024. Your response will help me shape my fight for you this year, so please: Will you take my 2024 Priorities Survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78459485/453444729/316244704?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1331-su-nd&refcode=jtk1331-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDRhNWZkYy02MWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DhxfSESh9BJDOEUopDAyRkUrLbYiEpCo5yvMlRFbtKU=&emci=5579eae2-69c0-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=804a5fdc-61c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=25369504)**

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **BREAKING: I’m running for Congress**

[**I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I’m running for Congress. Last year, I came within 5,800 votes of unseating one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country -- and now, I have an unprecedented chance to finish the job. I’ve set an ambitious goal -- $5,000 raised before midnight -- to get my grassroots campaign off the ground. I’ll explain why in a second -- but if you don’t have time to read my whole email, can I count on your $10 before midnight? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61549?t=6&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
* * *
I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

But my run for Congress isn’t about me.

**I’m running for my parents.**

They worked night and day on factory lines to give my brothers and me a shot at the American Dream.

[**Now I’m running to make sure all Americans -- our families, our workers, our small businesses -- can have the same opportunities I did. That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you personally: Will you rush in $10 split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before midnight to help me kick off my campaign strong? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61549?t=7&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)

**I’m running for my kids, Ava and Luca.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61549?t=8&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ) _My family!_ I want nothing more than for my children -- and every child -- to have the greatest opportunities possible.

But Don Bacon is in Congress fighting for cheap political points rather than families like mine and yours.

[**I’ll be honest: We need a voice in Congress fighting for our families, not corporate CEOs. So can you split $10 and help me get this campaign off the ground? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61549?t=9&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)

I never liked asking you for money.

But last year, I lost to Don Bacon by less than 6,000 (!!!) votes.

And in a presidential year, all eyes will be on our district and its pivotal electoral vote.

So believe me when I say -- I’ll need a strong grassroots team behind me every step of the way.

[**I know I can defeat Don Bacon. But DC Republicans have funneled him more than $1.8 MILLION to protect his seat and continue his voting record against our families. That’s why I need to kick off this campaign with a massive show of support -- $5,000 before midnight -- to get my message out and flip this seat for Nebraskans. Can I count on your $10 split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right away? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61549?t=10&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tony Vargas and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61550?t=11&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61551?t=12&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61552?t=13&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61553?t=14&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61554?t=15&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)
Thanks for your support,

Tony
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12831%2E878179%2EbAU0EZ)

Friend,

It’s no secret that Democrats could—and should—do so much more to fight for and champion the needs of rural America.
The good people of Ohio’s Fourth congressional district know when politicians are lying to them, telling them what they want to hear, or are completely unfamiliar with the challenges and opportunities of life in small town and rural America.
They are looking for someone and something real—a candidate who, even if they don’t necessarily look or sound exactly like them, is a person that they can trust. A person of their word, who says what they mean and means what they say.
**Tamie is showing up in the rural parts of this district, because it is the right thing to do but also because it’s just who she is.** She shows up for her communities. It’s what successful leaders do. And the results are beginning to show.
[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTIzNjkzMzM5Nzk1Nzk4ODUsXCJyXCI6MTEyMzY5Mzc2MDEzODQ2NDgxfSIsInMiOiJlNjAyNTIwOTU5OTdjZDhiIn0)
| | [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTIzNjkzMzM5ODc5Njg1MDAsXCJyXCI6MTEyMzY5Mzc2MDEzODQ2NDgxfSIsInMiOiJkN2FmMWNjZjZkZTk4N2Q5In0)
---
|
---
The path to winning in Ohio runs through our small towns and rural communities, and folks there don’t vote for just anybody: they vote for the person they believe has their interests at heart and who understands them. So as we make this case for getting rid of Jim Jordan, and show the urgent threat to national security that is Jim Jordan in a position of power, **our message is resonating like never before**. Your support for Tamie’s campaign to unseat Jim Jordan is a commitment to all of America that we will not leave anyone behind, that we all matter, that every vote matters. [**We will only win this campaign TOGETHER, and that’s why we need you. Will you show up and help us build the coalition to beat Jim Jordan with a contribution to Tamie Wilson of $10 or more today?**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTIzNjkzMzM5OTc0MDU2OTAsXCJyXCI6MTEyMzY5Mzc2MDEzODQ2NDgxfSIsInMiOiJiNzY0NGJjNDc1NDcwM2NkIn0) [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTIzNjkzMzQwMDY4NDI4NzYsXCJyXCI6MTEyMzY5Mzc2MDEzODQ2NDgxfSIsInMiOiI2ZmNmMjkxOTdkMzI5NTA4In0)

So as we make this case for getting rid of Jim Jordan, and show the urgent threat to national security that is Jim Jordan in a position of power, our message is resonating like never before. Your support for Tamie’s campaign to unseat Jim Jordan is a commitment to all of America that we will not leave anyone behind, that we all matter, that every vote matters. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Tamie will always show up for the people, no matter what party they vote for. And we thank you for showing up for our democracy. -Team Tamie Wilson for US | | | | | | | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | | | | | | Mail checks to: Tamie Wilson for US 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: [INVITATION] Volunteer Kickoff Call — Feb 7th at 7:00 PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1023%2E52803%2Ecm-1TK)

| | Peter, You’ve probably seen our opponent’s TV ads. He’s spent over $30 million to make sure that you’ve seen them, and he’s going to keep spending until everyone in Maryland is sick and tired of them. **But we’re not going to let him buy this race.** I’m going to be honest with you, we need your help. I know you’ve been asked to chip in and support the campaign — but this isn’t a donation ask. We need you to give us an hour of your time. The only way we’re going to beat our billionaire opponent is with the people. This will be won by the many, not by the money. That’s why we are holding our first **Volunteer Kickoff Call** this Wednesday, February 7th. We need volunteers to talk to their friends, send texts, to make calls, to knock on doors, show up in their community, and post online. Join us and learn more about how you can get involved. **[Our first Volunteer Kickoff Call is this Wednesday, February 7th — can you join us?
RSVP here to get the Zoom link.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10005?t=7&akid=1023%2E52803%2Ecm-1TK)** | | | [I'm in!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10005?t=8&akid=1023%2E52803%2Ecm-1TK)
---
**What:** Volunteer Kickoff Call
**When:** Wednesday, February 7th at 7:00 PM
**Where:** On Zoom! RSVP for the link
We need volunteers from every corner of our state to get involved. We have opportunities to volunteer both in person and virtually. Join the call and learn more about how to get involved!
**[RSVP for our volunteer kickoff call here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10005?t=9&akid=1023%2E52803%2Ecm-1TK)** Can’t make it to the call? Find an event in your community **[here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10004?t=10&akid=1023%2E52803%2Ecm-1TK)**
Together we will organize, turn out our communities, and win this race.
See you soon,
Angela Alsobrooks

name: Replace Sinema
subject: All the wrong reasons
disclaimer_text: paid for by Wall Street donors
body:
| | | Peter – 🚩🚩🚩 Last week Kyrsten Sinema made headlines for all the wrong reasons. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhUaSVaOpLEdI6x_DpHPkVfuIN3tYq0qk0GfgN3IAY58Ipi7VvfT1trPi0YnXR99Wl7LCua40y_Dm1QY2zQQvrQtDSgiS8yFe-jnhkZqA6sAKdv-4i3Cc0ehlHZtVFEAYmY4TUPZZHPk15zzL5d2BFVVYYrlEkOx392qv_tzAacBvSBqCLdO3cGELVI1juY0ioEjgS0aEGYvOvmQvx17SBeLi5Ci64GNK_F12tic8QpyShH2Ac0Ef3mZt5UOwGG3HzWdiINA52Ruz62QOVjKm6hbGgVr8cV4ZPx-yefOXPTZYc6lZkGOpXv2rw4Hu0JziCa6JpKIcoNqkupD3A1jfHBogPlxgnuyQ6y1AyHT90zA/43l/3ExXLCd4TY2iLu5G74dStQ/h0/mFd-5MnqGkQBzmNt4EMKBWFwLhZdUHs3XYf_YMOOA1U) Private planes on the taxpayers’ dime. European trips paid for by Wall Street donors. Limos, concerts, and wine. New cars. A personal security detail – to avoid those pesky constituents and reporters. Sinema’s been living the highlife, at everyone else’s expense. Meanwhile, her fundraising has dwindled and time is running out for her to collect signatures to get on the ballot. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

Look, Rick Scott is a fraud.
He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his new attack ad. **But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families.**
Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes.
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. I just wanted to reach out personally to thank you for your help last month.

My team and I told you that we needed to start this election year off on the strongest footing possible — _**and you stepped up in a big way to help us get there.**_

body:
I’m telling the truth, Friend| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f7a5bfc829974282bdebf7aafaf7f03f&_e=fHD1krk8aWmhUwfuGg3_VSsURTLqp0vffW77HuTLjdk966elF1SjnZcbEZb3apSBkOnmbttw1gUzSuVOBo7WuLcelBbrLgvSixTcMbWzumjbE-58ASI2Bf00GPj06TW-d_XkcpkBUlPnqVTuYjBb9Ew-xCU7YnAWJ_YEJETp4dOU8JoEjmyXIMZCskMEt_V3g54Pf4s-eR8Yq9ON5DrrVsf1kqeTeiUQDjkYqLrclgwnh1ZmhNzstI0s336ygK_cL9kr89irbtkm7p5Dcbb-hEZYN0kFsiNKJxvTtq434q-pnRXhGrp5rNRERFyAIxmKhbeCd_-ExbTjJc7jf6KdZUhmjOFE8Ad9CTsjFdGN3VVz7NEJGkFnoAAOwh9IgTadjEl2K7mXw31yScKsv0Vp70AJct8qLwEd9Lr2NrQ2HD8%3D)
---
Friend, A $25 donation won’t bring about world peace. I’m sick and tired of politicians lying to you in an attempt to get you to part with your hard-earned cash. You’ve probably gotten at least a few emails from politicians making promises they can’t keep. But I’m going to try something that politicians never do: **[tell you the truth.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=f7a5bfc829974282bdebf7aafaf7f03f&_e=fHD1krk8aWmhUwfuGg3_VSsURTLqp0vffW77HuTLjdk966elF1SjnZcbEZb3apSBkOnmbttw1gUzSuVOBo7WuLcelBbrLgvSixTcMbWzumjbE-58ASI2Bf00GPj06TW-d_XkcpkBUlPnqVTuYjBb9Ew-xCU7YnAWJ_YEJETp4dOU8JoEjmyXIMZCskMEt_V3g54Pf4s-eR8Yq9ON5DrrVsf1kqeTeiUQDjkYqLrclgwnh1ZmhNzstI0s336ygK_cHUinHa7IGXRGaCXW8tOyjUxZP9A6slNLld2w7h_PMQd9Cqt-O1mTRXOzzXlmRDhlOgq2mjPwSr6Bdcmzmd8Q05sRUDmbtpHe8_vpM0jm2JgxuTP0b_IFh440uZBxzC0gtYvesD5n80v3bClY9riMZQ3hgrmuw0h-ShYLr5XgGGg%3D)** My name is Mike Rogers. I’m an Army veteran, former FBI special agent, and candidate for U.S. Senate in Michigan — a state where elections could be decided by just **HUNDREDS** of votes. And to make the stakes even higher, the result of my race could very well determine which party wins the Senate — and chart our country’s path for a generation. That’s not a lie. It’s not an exaggeration. It’s the straight truth. Friend, your donation isn’t going to bring about world peace. * * *
I am honored to be endorsed by the California Federation of Teachers!
Just like me, they believe every child in America, regardless of their background, deserves an excellent education, and just like me, they fight for a strong public education system, workers’ rights, and social justice.
In Congress I will advocate for equitable funding for all students from Pre-K through post-secondary education, a minimum annual salary of $60,000 for teachers, free school lunches, tuition free access to higher education, and universal child care.
**Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you boost my campaign’s mission to create a more equitable education for our nation’s students and better resources for our nation’s educators.**
******[Our pro-education campaign relies on your support to get out the vote. Will you pitch in to flip CA-23 to blue and make meaningful progress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KMVF-guj6bi-hQXDWsR23bIDpdT5PKUUHoRv7VJ6b9EnD4tuZ59hijzoHHmcBif2gwHeNsOJUbORut-vOIcJkT0lR_qV-w-ARZwqY-Ac7cRhZf3A1GiQ4nyOJ1M2BT83C8EFLxD_zQgdDAaqYdbXm5E_Gt5oizhInwyuQMpSoqcV1h3TLbhdiDxWsh2NszxXMzIgHSGjGfEexxaN0rAbhgY4Es3Vu1T_BUXdxG7PuW5Fhcjl4wYTHH1l3h3b0VydPfxeuoB3EZeRRssvjTD_gGzftdA7cbMNl5HdQl09ODUkWmMHi9H0KYplevfZ6rZtOZKVu0HAg7SsNDEHFApSIVgB1vZ97xzzRpxN8cUWBrK3Q/43l/UBzF0GRvSAS9s9QHYQ00aQ/h2/nAZ3Un20esLNGKfCYfaKii0RJ-BUUThMXtp-aDWfuqA)

clean_body: | | | I am honored to be endorsed by the California Federation of Teachers! Just like me, they believe every child in America, regardless of their background, deserves an excellent education, and just like me, they fight for a strong public education system, workers’ rights, and social justice. In Congress I will advocate for equitable funding for all students from Pre-K through post-secondary education, a minimum annual salary of $60,000 for teachers, free school lunches, tuition free access to higher education, and universal child care. Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you boost my campaign’s mission to create a more equitable education for our nation’s students and better resources for our nation’s educators. ** you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. I am running for California’s 23rd District to champion a better future for California and the country. That means we need to support our educators and our schools so they can provide our youth with a top notch education. Teachers and students deserve elected leaders who will ensure that they have the tools to teach, learn, lead productive lives and support a thriving democracy. **** for your support, Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. body:

| |

---
I know what it's like to keep chaos at bay, Friend.

_As a Captain in the U.S. Army, I kept America safe from the Soviet Union in the final days of the Cold War.

As Director of the CIA, I had the responsibility to protect our nation's citizens from her enemies.

During my time in the House of Representatives, I defended our common values from the radical Left.

As Secretary of State, I ensured that America's interests **always** came first._

So Friend, I need you to listen very closely when I tell you this: _**the Republican House Majority is the only thing that stands between order and chaos!**_

The radical Left wants more than anything else to take our House Majority so that they can continue to leave American interests in the dust. If they take the House Majority, they'll continue to drive our economy into the ground, they'll make Americans less safe with bad policy domestically and abroad.

_We**cannot** lose the House Majority, Friend._

I'm writing you today because I'd like you to meet the veteran, father, and Christian that is standing in their way. His name is Brandon Williams. **And, Friend, he is the ONLY thing keeping the radical Left 's chaos at bay.**

_Navy Veteran Brandon Williams_
Brandon is a Christian, father, and veteran. He's a political outsider, and he's made an excellent Congressman. **But he 's in _serious_ trouble right now.**

Brandon won his seat by just 1% of the vote, which has made him Democrats TOP TARGET this year! He needs all the help he can get to hold this seat.

**To make matters worse** , he fell short $2,849 on his January End of Month Goal! If Brandon doesn't raise $2,849 by midnight, he will miss his goal. And if he misses this goal, the Left will ramp up their attacks.

**Brandon can 't afford to miss this goal. The fact is, conservatives can't afford to let Brandon fall short.**

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Kari + Kyrsten
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Another Arizona poll was released last week showing Ruben trailing Kari Lake by a couple points. We have to turn these polls around. FAST.
#

Peter,
We send a lot of emails your way, and we appreciate you going through your inbox and opening this one.
And we know you can’t donate to every email we send — not by a long shot. But we’re hoping you might chip in to this one.
If you’ve got a minute, please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** Another Arizona poll was released last week showing Ruben trailing Kari Lake by a couple points. We have to turn these polls around. FAST.
**THEN:** Kari Lake held a fundraiser with two wealthy QAnon activists on Friday — a dangerous and violent anti-government conspiracy theory at the heart of the MAGA-right.
**NOW:** We’re expecting Kyrsten Sinema to decide whether or not to run for re-election any day — and we need to ramp up our fundraising to be ready for whatever she decides.
Arizona is the seat Democrats need to win to hold the Senate. And the fate of the Senate depends on how strong our fundraising is. If everyone reading this chipped in $5 or $10 Ruben would have everything he needs to win this race.
But not everyone chips in. That’s why we need you. We need people who know how important this Senate race is, people who understand how important their donations are to our campaign to chip in what they can, when they can.
Can we count on you?
[**Use this link and contribute $5, $10, whatever you can to help Ruben win in Arizona and defend our Senate majority. With hundreds of people chipping in alongside you, it’s going to add up fast.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-feb24.-zvZm_&refcode=em240205-1-120&t=1&akid=1929%2E734936%2EkxhQPo)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78460985/453449466/-251759529?refcode=header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYxMmVmMDgtNjZjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ptKfaRURcR1tm8XvfyMJvXILun4AqTj1-NyPVvmc3xg=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78460986/453449467/-1849040369?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.05_B1_BHM_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYxMmVmMDgtNjZjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ptKfaRURcR1tm8XvfyMJvXILun4AqTj1-NyPVvmc3xg=) Peter, This Black History Month, I’m reflecting on the leaders who came before me and paved the way for progress. No one quite bears that torch like my great-great-grandfather Robert Smalls. As a ship pilot, he put his life on the line steering himself and several other enslaved Black Americans to freedom during the Civil War. He later came back and served as a representative here in South Carolina – the same seat I’m running to represent. I’m committed to carrying on my great-great grandfather’s legacy of action – both in the Lowcountry and in Washington. But right now, shamefully, there are too many Republicans who want to use my great-great grandfather’s courageousness for their political gain. I won’t stand for it because the simple fact is, you can’t honor Robert Smalls with empty words and dismember his legacy at the same time. From rolling back voting rights to attempting to erase Black history in schools, our very democracy is at stake. We won’t be able to keep up this critical fight for justice unless we take back our Democratic House majority, but I can’t do it without your support.
