clean_body: Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click = | = Peter, This Black History Month, I’m reflecting on the leaders who came before me and paved the way for progress. No one quite bears that torch like my great-great-grandfather Robert Smalls. As a ship pilot, he put his life on the line steering himself and several other enslaved Black Americans to freedom during the Civil War. He later came back and served as a representative here in South Carolina – the same seat I’m running to represent. I’m committed to carrying on my great-great grandfather’s legacy of action – both in the Lowcountry and in Washington. But right now, shamefully, there are too many Republicans who want to use my great-great grandfather’s courageousness for their political gain. I won’t stand for it because the simple fact is, you can’t honor Robert Smalls with empty words and dismember his legacy at the same time. From rolling back voting rights to attempting to erase Black history in schools, our very democracy is at stake. We won’t be able to keep up this critical fight for justice unless we take back our Democratic House majority, but I can’t do it without your support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = \- Michael = | | Paid for by Michael B. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: In case you missed it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Read more about my plans in 2024: |
#
---
I recently delivered my _sixth_ State of the State Address, team. And I understand that not everyone had the chance to tune in. I want to make sure that you all know _exactly_ what I’m planning to do in 2024, which is why I want to take a few moments to highlight a few of my plans for Michigan. **[Before I discuss some of my plans for Michigan in 2024, will you chip in to Fight Like Hell PAC to support our work of creating a better future for Michiganders?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461029/453449600/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdkMzRkMWYtNjZjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YSP4Vu8MBo7OEY6KlL-8SV-iWOuaEu-O0ZLWaztMYtc=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461030/453449601/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdkMzRkMWYtNjZjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YSP4Vu8MBo7OEY6KlL-8SV-iWOuaEu-O0ZLWaztMYtc=)
---
I talk _a lot_ about issues like abortion rights in our emails.
And trust me, you’ll continue to hear from me about our plans to protect abortion rights in Michigan and around the country in 2024 and beyond.
But I want to take some time to highlight my plans for other issues that will also make a real difference in people’s lives.
**Here are a few other things we’ll be working on in 2024:**
🏡 | Too many hardworking people pay more than half their income in rent or mortgage in Michigan. That’s why I want to expand supply, lower costs, and support thousands of good-paying jobs by making the **largest investment ever** in Michigan for affordable housing.
---|---
🛠️ | We’ve been busy **fixing the damn roads** and everything else since I took office, but there’s still work to be done. That’s why we’re going to continue to rebuild Michigan’s infrastructure in 2024 by working on projects like the Detroit Airport and bridges in Grand Rapids.
📚 | Every student deserves the opportunity to pursue their dream, and that’s why I’ll be fighting like hell to make **community college free** for every high-school graduate.
**There are going to be people who oppose us every step of the way.**
But we didn’t let them stop us in 2023, and we’re not going to let them stop us in 2024 either.
**[My ability to do good work for the people of Michigan depends on people like you. Will you continue to ensure that we can improve the lives of all Michiganders by chipping in to Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461031/453449602/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdkMzRkMWYtNjZjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YSP4Vu8MBo7OEY6KlL-8SV-iWOuaEu-O0ZLWaztMYtc=)**

clean_body: Read more about my plans in 2024: | I recently delivered my sixth State of the State Address, team. And I understand that not everyone had the chance to tune in. I want to make sure that you all know exactly what I’m planning to do in 2024, which is why I want to take a few moments to highlight a few of my plans for Michigan. = | = I talk a lot about issues like abortion rights in our emails. And trust me, you’ll continue to hear from me about our plans to protect abortion rights in Michigan and around the country in 2024 and beyond. But I want to take some time to highlight my plans for other issues that will also make a real difference in people’s lives. Here are a few other things we’ll be working on in 2024: 🏡 | Too many hardworking people pay more than half their income in rent or mortgage in Michigan. That’s why I want to expand supply, lower costs, and support thousands of good-paying jobs by making the largest investment ever in Michigan for affordable housing. ---|--- 🛠️ | We’ve been busy fixing the damn roads and everything else since I took office, but there’s still work to be done. That’s why we’re going to continue to rebuild Michigan’s infrastructure in 2024 by working on projects like the Detroit Airport and bridges in Grand Rapids. 📚 | Every student deserves the opportunity to pursue their dream, and that’s why I’ll be fighting like hell to make community college free for every high-school graduate. There are going to be people who oppose us every step of the way. But we didn’t let them stop us in 2023, and we’re not going to let them stop us in 2024 either. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I can’t wait to work with this grassroots team to fulfill my vision for Michigan in 2024. Let’s do this. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Susan Wild
subject: Protecting the right to IVF
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
While the GOP continues to attack reproductive healthcare and put more restrictions and bans in place, I will fight to protect a woman’s right to choose what’s best for her and her family

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461294/453450732/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-02-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTM3YmNkNi02N2M0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vq9AfGnDmAc8FzfRo_no2i-_FC1GE4Q5enU7-MSTRdk=)

| Peter,

Last month, I joined my colleague Senator Tammy Duckworth to introduce legislation to protect the right to access assisted reproductive technologies like IVF.

Since the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , Republican-controlled states across the country have not only sought to restrict abortion access but also restrict individuals’ access to basic reproductive healthcare, including IVF.

**As someone who struggled with fertility issues, this is personal to me. As a mother of two, my children, Clay and Adrienne, mean the world to me, and when I hear how many women across the country struggle to get pregnant (1 in 5), I feel for them.**

Fertility treatments and IVF are expensive and difficult as it is for families across the country, so the last thing we need is more restrictions and obstacles for individuals trying to conceive.

While the GOP continues to attack reproductive healthcare and put more restrictions and bans in place, I will fight to protect a woman’s right to choose what’s best for her and her family. The government has no place in an individual’s reproductive decisions.

**I will continue fighting for expanded protections for reproductive healthcare, but I need your support to keep me in this fight.[_Will you contribute to my campaign today to ensure we have what it takes to win and flip the House blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461295/453450733/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-02-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTM3YmNkNi02N2M0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vq9AfGnDmAc8FzfRo_no2i-_FC1GE4Q5enU7-MSTRdk=)**

name: National Security Alerts -- via GOP
subject: Are you ignoring us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILL PAC
body:
We’re sorry for being so direct but the circumstances call for urgency – our national security hangs in the balance and we NEED 100% participation for this to work.

| |
---
| | | Are you ignoring us, Friend?

**FIRST:** We sounded the alarm over China's plan to buy up _**ALL**_ of America's farmland

**THEN:** We told you Biden's DOJ stepped in to _**STOP**_ red states from banning Chinese ownership of US land

**NOW:** We're reaching out to you AGAIN because you _**STILL**_ haven't signed our petition to stop this Chinese land grab!

We're sorry for being so direct but the circumstances call for urgency - our national security hangs in the balance and we NEED 100% participation for this to work.

The single most important thing we can do to stop this Chinese assault is to orchestrate a massive response to ban China from owning US farmland in every state.

But we can't do that if patriots like you are on the sidelines.

body:
Please excuse any typos, friend

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461424/453451239/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=)
---
Hey there! I'm writing to you from the campaign trail, so please excuse any typos. My team and I have been crisscrossing our district, talking to Ohioans about what's at stake in this election and what we can do to support them and their families. We've heard from teachers, nurses, small business owners, autoworkers, single mothers, and more. Here are a few pictures from recent stops: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461425/453451240/1037629634?refcode=240205_mk_campaign_trail_img1&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=) _Breaking ground on a major investment to restore and protect islands in the Maumee River watershed, improving water quality and the health of Lake Erie. _ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461426/453451241/1037629634?refcode=240205_mk_campaign_trail_img2&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=) _Joined the Oak Harbor Area Chamber of Commerce at the Camp Perry Conference Center to meet with business owners across Northwest Ohio._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461427/453451242/1037629634?refcode=240205_mk_campaign_trail_img3&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=) _Met with a WWII History class at Fremont Ross High School to discuss the importance of honoring the legacy of those who served._ Friend, it's the honor of my life to fight in Congress for the community where I grew up. My constituents are my friends, my neighbors, my former classmates — talking to you and listening to your concerns is the most important part of my work. We'll never stop meeting Ohioans where they're at, to make sure that every single person in our community has the voice in Washington they deserve. Thank you for helping power that work, friend. **[CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461428/453451243/1037629634?refcode=240205_mk_campaign_trail_b1&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=)** Onward, _— Marcy_
| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.

**Can you donate now to help Democrat Marcy Kaptur win in one of the most competitive races in the whole country?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461429/453451244/1037629634?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=0040e590-68c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78461430/453451245/1037629634?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=0040e590-68c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=240205_mk_campaign_trail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDQwZTU5MC02OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oNwzplZe4N-Hqy3qkEKkPHHjY4Zz2ALfvlTnqzeClIA=)**

name: David Hogg
subject: Shattered expectations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Mark my words, friend: Gen Z will outlive the NRA.
The Daily Beast recently analyzed the NRA’s tax returns. They aren’t pretty.
In fact, the pro-gun group’s revenue has been on the decline for years now, especially since Parkland. Last year, their fundraising was at its lowest point since 2008. And since 2018 they have lost over 1 million members.
I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered—and as their power and influence fade into the dustbin of history, we will replace their corrupt, purchased politicians with a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action to stop the scourge of gun violence in America.
I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda.
With so much riding on the upcoming elections, we’re preparing now so we can elect the leaders we deserve in November. Will you split a $25 contribution to support Leaders We Deserve and Serve America today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
We founded Leaders We Deserve last year to elect the next generation of leadership—and folks across the country are already helping us shatter expectations.
Not only have tens of thousands of people just like you joined our movement and helped spread the word about our mission, we’ve already elected our very first candidate.
In the days leading up to the November election, we hit the streets in Virginia to knock on doors and get out the vote for Nadarius Clark. Thanks to our supporters’ donations, we were proud to invest more than $100,000 to support Nadarius’s campaign.
When all the ballots were counted, Nadarius won by less than 2,000 votes.
Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning these fights in 2024. There is too much on the line for us to lose.
Leaders We Deserve and Serve America can only be successful in November with your continued support, so can you split a $25 contribution or whatever makes sense for you today? Anything you can give will make a difference. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
Thank you for your consideration,
David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: Where does your donation go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

clean_body: [] Peter, Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross. More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most. Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [] CONTRIBUTE [] Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas. I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue. Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [] CONTRIBUTE $5 [] CONTRIBUTE $10 [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Thanks, Kurt [] Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [] Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please unsubscribe:

body:

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: A chance to make history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-lbr?refcode=X_020524_LBRBennet_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-lbr?refcode=X_020524_LBRBennet_act]
Hi there, it's Lisa Blunt Rochester – I'm running to become the first woman and Black person to represent Delaware in the Senate.
This Black History Month, I have been reflecting on so many of the Black leaders and visionaries from the past and who are living among us today. Throughout history, Black Americans have made invaluable contributions to this country despite facing barriers, adversity, and injustice every step of the way.
One of the barriers that we, as Black Americans, have faced is not having sufficient representation in our government – and even today, we still have a long way to go. I'm going to tell you a little bit more about why representation matters, but first, can I ask that you make a split contribution of $20 between my campaign and Michael Bennet? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-lbr?refcode=X_020524_LBRBennet_act&amount=20]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-lbr?refcode=X_020524_LBRBennet_act]
In its 234 year history, the United States Senate has had 2,003 Senators – but only three of them have been Black women. Let me be blunt and say: that is not enough.
Representation in our government is so important. When we see ourselves reflected in positions of leadership and influence, it sends a powerful message that our voices are valued. And it also ensures that our government is working for everyone, not just a select few.
The historical nature of this campaign is not lost on me, but I am not in this fight just to make history. I am in this fight to make sure that every Delawareans’ voice is heard and every perspective is represented.
In order for all of this to be possible, we need to hold the Senate majority. Trump, McConnell, and the MAGA machine are preparing to throw everything they have at Delaware to flip our state red. This would spell serious trouble for our majority.
This Black History Month, I'm asking you to help our campaign increase representation in the Senate by winning in November. I can't do this without your support, so can you split any amount between Michael Bennet and our historic campaign in Delaware? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-lbr?refcode=X_020524_LBRBennet_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [] Hi there, it's Lisa Blunt Rochester – I'm running to become the first woman and Black person to represent Delaware in the Senate. This Black History Month, I have been reflecting on so many of the Black leaders and visionaries from the past and who are living among us today. Throughout history, Black Americans have made invaluable contributions to this country despite facing barriers, adversity, and injustice every step of the way. One of the barriers that we, as Black Americans, have faced is not having sufficient representation in our government – and even today, we still have a long way to go. I'm going to tell you a little bit more about why representation matters, but first, can I ask that you make a split contribution of $20 between my campaign and Michael Bennet? [] CHIP IN [] In its 234 year history, the United States Senate has had 2,003 Senators – but only three of them have been Black women. Let me be blunt and say: that is not enough. Representation in our government is so important. When we see ourselves reflected in positions of leadership and influence, it sends a powerful message that our voices are valued. And it also ensures that our government is working for everyone, not just a select few. The historical nature of this campaign is not lost on me, but I am not in this fight just to make history. I am in this fight to make sure that every Delawareans’ voice is heard and every perspective is represented. In order for all of this to be possible, we need to hold the Senate majority. Trump, McConnell, and the MAGA machine are preparing to throw everything they have at Delaware to flip our state red. This would spell serious trouble for our majority. This Black History Month, I'm asking you to help our campaign increase representation in the Senate by winning in November. I can't do this without your support, so can you split any amount between Michael Bennet and our historic campaign in Delaware? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] In solidarity, Lisa Blunt Rochester Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Will you do this until Election Day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hey there, folks, I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a recurring donation. Today, I’m asking for $9 at a time for the next 9 months. You may be asking, _why $9?_ And that’s because 9 months from today is Election Day — which will be the biggest test of how strong our grassroots movement truly is. Recurring contributions are essential to making sure we have the resources to organize volunteers, hire staffers, hand out yard signs, and print campaign literature, among so many other critical tasks. As you can see, committing to chipping in even a few bucks every month allows us to plan ahead and communicate with as many voters as possible. After the election, your weekly contributions will automatically be turned off. So for just the next 9 months, I’m asking: **[Will you contribute $9 per month for the next 9 months until Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78463170/453457043/-1193245975?recurring=true&amount=9&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmQ4YjBiYS02ZGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQQPwLSd5JSH3ajwg7jE12eLrtQati7YDVkaVrOkBqk=)** | ****[CONTRIBUTE $9 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78463175/453457048/640857628?recurring=true&amount=9&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmQ4YjBiYS02ZGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQQPwLSd5JSH3ajwg7jE12eLrtQati7YDVkaVrOkBqk=)****

subject: THIS election will determine the Majority...

body:
My name is Mazi Pilip, and it's so lovely to meet you Friend!
Here’s what you need to know about my Special Election

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kM_RAq4jaiIpLzGpyMZ0CQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRno_MuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgplumJXwWWBaYEXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kM_RAq4jaiIpLzGpyMZ0CQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRno_MuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgplumJXwWWBaYEXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kM_RAq4jaiIpLzGpyMZ0CQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRno_MuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVdFRklNQUdFX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDIwNVcDc3BjQgplumJXwWWBaYEXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/g2U0ayCD-47syeefqetNQw~~/AARclAA~/RgRno_MuP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmW6YlfBZYFpgRdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AIDIZ_dFV9U03y11D_EvGA~~/AARclAA~/RgRno_MuP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplumJXwWWBaYEXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks, this is Senator Amy Klobuchar. I’ve always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. **No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78463825/453459353/-1773662333?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdiNmYzOC03MWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s9qKRUQdmUtIFzVvywXMsWtd5nzdalPmFG-ebQL9-OY=) **But thanks to supporters like you our grassroots movement beat the odds and I was elected to the U.S. Senate.** Every day since then I’ve been working hard to deliver progress. name: Nikki Haley
subject: The truth
body:
Every American needs to know it’s never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election.

| |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_t=Mi4pin7hYNSj2Fr8_ltqNBPLSqqJ_7VxwRrz7FBx_Af3xIJbfLO-yLEEd-CTUbizvquYSuadeb-beWI8veKZeNDoBjcL7olZjAawJcSiww0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_t=Mi4pin7hYNSj2Fr8_ltqNBPLSqqJ_7VxwRrz7FBx_Af3xIJbfLO-yLEEd-CTUbizvquYSuadeb-beWI8veKZeNDoBjcL7olZjAawJcSiww0%3D)

Friend,

Every American needs to know it's never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election.

**The truth is:_Under Donald Trump, Republicans lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. _**

Fast forward to 2024... we are at risk of losing **AGAIN** if Trump becomes the Republican nominee.

_**Why?**_

For starters, seventy percent of Americans **DO NOT** want another Trump-Biden rematch.

**But the larger issue is that Trump isn't talking about how to save our country because he is consumed by investigations and grievances!**

Instead of focusing his campaign on how to best serve the American people and defeat Biden in 2024, he spends his time on court cases and chaos.

**[If you're ready to end the drama, chaos, and losing streak, please chip in to fuel my fight today!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_e=cUiFP2gcG7VkKKALt5W7yqgnGUNF8oCFn5_MmLjGjCrIEp5Ho6VGmF3Ai7_B2XPDFFld0VKcXB38ZotEZSxzkeeuIebxfLvwKfxDQUgUe9OyNUaMxNnkMgQwXK87_1k_37LLNZ99DNnwNfLpDJ3UzxBLrAoxN_wNStl--nLxoKkAgS2yCCjtsJNVo2IgDGUdvS6DzQSMmuUtg-LOHgo0RFsNnygf_OK3VmbSbwOA2pTNdwvJUvbHoO9vXETHkU-SLukLAdwAGlwbGMJZdZ6SLxqJ6pD5MJHHkaj3QPw7ZMRQcimtYVEdQk9kViL6dMo-N_I-4hsHuFHx4UqAt3CXeqgLNmMjolDMbi-jxgYZ_Tc%3D)**
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_e=cUiFP2gcG7VkKKALt5W7yqgnGUNF8oCFn5_MmLjGjCrIEp5Ho6VGmF3Ai7_B2XPDFFld0VKcXB38ZotEZSxzkeeuIebxfLvwKfxDQUgUe9OyNUaMxNnkMgQwXK87_1k_37LLNZ99DNnwNfLpDJ3UzxBLrAoxN_wNStl--nLxoKkAgS2yCCjtsJNVo2IgDGUdvS6DzQSMmuUtg-LOHgo0RMEjqaQ9XXjhkj1dqqKCWuMykT4419lB4EVZrsMplBA_8IyYT9_LF8d1XHv5kAvROPjm1w_J2SjHe2mnSLtQ02PPGOqfHdR7A4jRDybSwVbE2jLnYtURImf9hRjw35zq2jJ5cgBcg7-YUHHHt0Um2Vc%3D) | [JOIN MY MOVEMENT TODAY](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_e=cUiFP2gcG7VkKKALt5W7yqgnGUNF8oCFn5_MmLjGjCrIEp5Ho6VGmF3Ai7_B2XPDFFld0VKcXB38ZotEZSxzkeeuIebxfLvwKfxDQUgUe9OyNUaMxNnkMgQwXK87_1k_37LLNZ99DNnwNfLpDJ3UzxBLrAoxN_wNStl--nLxoKkAgS2yCCjtsJNVo2IgDGUdvS6DzQSMmuUtg-LOHgo0RASQsUwJPjkvvSpayLW0GFG0BnPINBoXz4VxR7RqZOZWFqn53-tJmiK6CiuyWL2I9VexGCtAp21kceuypqV4MYT5-jBHVellStKhVFYv7FR3GK3eloLjwTxbgSGXkn4DE0lK5CgknMqYN8VebSEdDOk%3D)
---

_**I 'm tired of losing and you should be, too.**_ It's time for a new generation to step up, lead us into the future, and save the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden, we win in a landslide. **It 's not even close. **

_That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts._ It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride.

I am the candidate who will fight for you every day, who will make this country proud, who will secure our future, and who will _**WIN**_ on Election Day.

**[If you're tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win - _not just for our party, but for our country_ - then put your trust in me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a4b75039207f4a46839d8af84fb2085e&_e=cUiFP2gcG7VkKKALt5W7yqgnGUNF8oCFn5_MmLjGjCrIEp5Ho6VGmF3Ai7_B2XPDFFld0VKcXB38ZotEZSxzkeeuIebxfLvwKfxDQUgUe9OyNUaMxNnkMgQwXK87_1k_37LLNZ99DNnwNfLpDJ3UzxBLrAoxN_wNStl--nLxoKkAgS2yCCjtsJNVo2IgDGUdvS6DzQSMmuUtg-LOHgo0RJNNI6Tk4EbtL6r8Ax_UXwBKnK-3zhTwjyNn3lgDOI3V3ja217KnC1YqeWmUBHxRl0J4mkjNFdmMepzHHzHxnstsGNplo5n2_pCsXtjbE5SL7E23LzHP7vX-iDHJT59xYo6yYZUvua2ww4Gu2HBjmnU%3D)**

clean_body: Every American needs to know it’s never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election. | | | | | Friend, Every American needs to know it's never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election. The truth is:Under Donald Trump, Republicans lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. Fast forward to 2024... we are at risk of losing AGAIN if Trump becomes the Republican nominee. Why? For starters, seventy percent of Americans DO NOT want another Trump-Biden rematch. But the larger issue is that Trump isn't talking about how to save our country because he is consumed by investigations and grievances! Instead of focusing his campaign on how to best serve the American people and defeat Biden in 2024, he spends his time on court cases and chaos. | I 'm tired of losing and you should be, too. It's time for a new generation to step up, lead us into the future, and save the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden, we win in a landslide. It 's not even close. That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts. It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride. I am the candidate who will fight for you every day, who will make this country proud, who will secure our future, and who will WIN on Election Day. Now, with the South Carolina Primary quickly approaching, it is going to take all hands on deck to finish this race STRONG. We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line. I look forward to having you by my side. Let 's win this! My very best, Nikki R. we’re freaking out...

---
Team, this couldn’t be more serious.

MAGA minion Kari Lake is tracking AHEAD of Ruben Gallego in the polls... _No!!_

**We are launching a rapid response Save Arizona Fund to raise $10,000 before midnight and play defense against Kari Lake!** **[Please, rush $7 before MIDNIGHT and help us support good Democrats like Ruben Gallego and defeat the MAGA movement! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/61585?t=8&akid=12832%2E878179%2EbTVgkT)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12832%2E878179%2EbTVgkT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12832%2E878179%2EbTVgkT).**

$25. Let us explain:** Trump has all but locked up the Republican nomination. What this means is that he and his MAGA allies are starting to spend millions of dollars to attack Joe and Kamala -- and to build the organizing infrastructure they’ll need for the long haul. We can’t risk him getting any closer to the White House. Because you’re a top supporter, you know that the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign -- and one of the best ways to ensure Trump doesn’t stand a chance on Election Day -- is the response to emails like this one. Now, we don't expect you to donate to each and every one of our emails. But fundraising really slows around the first couple months of the year, so we hope you'll choose to give to this email. It will give the President and our entire campaign considerable peace of mind as this race heats up. [Can you please make a $25 contribution to help President Biden defend the White House? clean_body: We need you to join the thousands of supporters who chipped in after the South Carolina Democratic primary. Let us explain why: | | | $25. After President Biden won the South Carolina Democratic primary this weekend, thousands of people made small, individual donations to power our campaign to victory. We need you to join them, Peter. Let us explain: Trump has all but locked up the Republican nomination. What this means is that he and his MAGA allies are starting to spend millions of dollars to attack Joe and Kamala -- and to build the organizing infrastructure they’ll need for the long haul. We can’t risk him getting any closer to the White House. Because you’re a top supporter, you know that the single greatest source of individual donations to our campaign -- and one of the best ways to ensure Trump doesn’t stand a chance on Election Day -- is the response to emails like this one. Now, we don't expect you to donate to each and every one of our emails. But fundraising really slows around the first couple months of the year, so we hope you'll choose to give to this email. It will give the President and our entire campaign considerable peace of mind as this race heats up. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. As difficult as the 2020 race was, this one will be even harder. That's why your help is so important. Team Joe and Kamala

name: Josh Harder
subject: Today is the day!
body:
Ballots are being mailed out in California.

Hey Peter -
It’s official: Today is the day ballots are being mailed out for California’s election on March 5th (some of you may already have received yours!)
Not only am I on the same ballot as Donald Trump, but I have an extremely competitive race against my GOP opponent Kevin Lincoln.
My opponent raised over $600,000 last year and he’s already spending thousands on ads ahead of the election. Can I count on you to rush in a donation today to help me fight back and keep this seat blue?
Here’s my link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Feb2024-FR-February**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78464964/453463214/1770708251?&refcode=E6876-20240205-Personal-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjkzMjdhZTEtNzNjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MgZhE537rV-mCoddTTGlRJ3AT6L14JKKQvOkxfra-yc=)
\- Josh

P.S. Don’t forget to mail back your ballot as soon as it arrives! I would be so grateful to have your vote this election.

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

subject: Just Getting Started
body:

Dear Friend,

Two weeks ago, our campaign submitted a very strong end-of-the-year report. Thanks in no small part to the generosity of so many of you, our 2023 fundraising total was strong. This robust report is tangible proof of the invaluable support our campaign has had since its inception.

As I get closer to officially launching this campaign for Mayor, I’m renewing my resolve to make an impact on the issues that affect so many of us. But I cannot continue that work without the sustained efforts of all of you.

The maximum contribution is $600. You can contribute online [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2] or send a check to:

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899

Thank you for your continued generosity.

Sincerely,

John

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: ICYMI: I'm calling on the FSSA to pause Medicaid cuts for parents of disabled children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
I'm writing to you today with a heavy heart and a sense of urgency regarding the FSSA's proposed cuts for parents of medically complex children.

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** ICYMI: I'm calling on the FSSA to pause Medicaid cuts for parents of disabled children (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2024/01/29/lt-gov-lawmakers-call-on-fssa-to-pause-medicaid-cuts-for-parents-of-disabled-children/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

In the past week, our state has been faced with an egregious threat (https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to the well-being of some of our most vulnerable citizens.

I'm writing to you today with a heavy heart and a sense of urgency regarding the proposed Medicaid cuts (https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for parents of medically complex children by the Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o7PL10dJDXM&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** WTHR: Indiana's Lt Governor responds to FSSA's proposed cuts
------------------------------------------------------------

During a critical meeting of the Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities Task Force, I witnessed firsthand the callous decision by FSSA to slash vital programs, specifically targeting parents providing essential care to their medically complex children.

The explanation provided by FSSA during the meeting was far from satisfactory.

The lack of transparency and data was not only disheartening but raised serious concerns about the impact on these families who depend on Attendant Care pay for Legally Responsible Individuals (LRIs).
https://wgntv.com/northwest-indiana/unfathomable-to-me-lt-gov-calls-on-fssa-to-pause-timetable-to-indianas-attendant-care-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In response to this crisis, I am unequivocally calling on FSSA to pause its proposed cuts, scheduled for implementation by July 1. It's unconscionable to proceed with these changes without adequately addressing the legitimate questions and concerns raised by Hoosiers.

Furthermore, I implore the General Assembly to support the pause in implementing these cuts.
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/2024/01/29/lt-gov-lawmakers-call-on-fssa-to-pause-medicaid-cuts-for-parents-of-disabled-children/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Vulnerable children and their families should not bear the brunt of bureaucratic decisions that lack empathy and consideration for the real-life consequences.

My disappointment with FSSA is profound, but even in my frustration, my heart aches for the families and caregivers who are grappling with the uncertainty and anxiety caused by these proposed cuts. It's truly heartbreaking.
https://www.chicagotribune.com/2024/02/03/proposed-fssa-cuts-impact-families-with-disabled-children/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Since the meeting, families have reached out to my office, desperate for a solution. A group of brave families even came to the Statehouse, lobbying their legislators and seeking justice for their children.

I've consistently urged them to contact their state legislators immediately, and now I extend this urgent call to all Hoosiers.
https://readthereporter.com/lt-gov-crouch-urges-hoosiers-to-contact-their-state-legislators-regarding-fssa-cuts/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

We cannot stay silent in the face of such a dire situation.

Contact your legislators, raise your voice, and demand that these cuts be paused until we receive the answers and assurances necessary to guarantee the care our medically complex children deserve.

Let us stand united in defense of compassion, empathy, and the well-being of our fellow Hoosiers.

In solidarity,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/crouchforindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

https://vimeo.com/780244425?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d9b59daf7f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_05_06_29&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d9b59daf7f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: POLITICO: Joanna Weiss Calls Sexual Assault And Abuse “Employment Matters”
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d7d01d4b8278/politico-joanna-weiss-calls-sexual-assault-and-abuse-employment-matters-15669920?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** February 5, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**POLITICO: Joanna Weiss Calls Sexual Assault And Abuse “Employment Matters”**

_Weiss Dismisses Questions About Self-Funding Her Campaign With Money Made From Defending The Catholic Church From Charges of Molestation & Sexual Assault As “Employment Matters"_

_“Weiss’ campaign pushed back against the allegations... noting that Jason Weiss primarily represented the diocese on employment matters”_**\- Politico 2.2.24**
**IRVINE, CA** — The fallout from the [Daily Beast’s](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=d86c816611&e=7017cc100e) shocking investigative report on CA-47 candidate Joanna Weiss’ self-financing of her campaign with over $230,000 earned representing the Catholic Church against sex abuse, child molestation and sexual assault claims in Orange County continued last Friday in a news story by [Politico](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=2da6f70ace&e=7017cc100e), in which Joanna Weiss’ campaign pushed back on the Daily Beast’s findings stating that Weiss “primarily represented the [Catholic] diocese on employment matters.”

**“These comments are truly hurtful to the survivors of these horrifying crimes, and Joanna Weiss should immediately apologize for dismissing their sexual assault cases as ‘Employment Matters’”** said Campaign Spokeswoman Amelia Matier. “**Weiss’ personal finances are not only disturbing, they are disqualifying. With ballots arriving in mailboxes this week - it is fair for voters to ask why there was not a more thorough vetting of this first-time, out-of-district candidate, and why is there a flood of Republican dark money propping her up?”**
_**Here Is What Joanna Weiss Calls “Employment Matters”**_

**“Lawsuit accuses O.C. priest of sexually assaulting his assistant at Irvine church”
\- Los Angeles 7.20.2017** In 2018, Weiss acted as the lead attorney defending the Catholic Church in the highly publicized case alleging that the Diocese of Orange knowingly covered up and abetted child grooming and sexual assault by one of its priests, who had previously been the subject of sexual misconduct claims dating back over a decade. Weiss argued that the First Amendment’s protections for**** freedom of religion [shielded the Church from liability](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=074190bde0&e=7017cc100e). After this argument was rejected, the Diocese of Orange [settled the case](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=84a2dee1a9&e=7017cc100e).
**“All of California’s 12 Bishops Sued for Alleged Clergy Abuse Cover-Up”
\- The Daily Beast 10/08/2018** Again in 2018, Weiss acted as the lead attorney defending the Catholic Church in a highly publicized case alleging that the Church knowingly covered up and abetted child sex abuse and rape by one of its lead priests in the Diocese of Orange. Weiss represented the Diocese of Orange through multiple years of this litigation, [including on appeal](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e0a0a8846a&e=7017cc100e).
**“California's institutions face a flood of sexual abuse lawsuits”
\- The Los Angeles Times 12/28/22** In 2020, Jason Weiss was [lead attorney](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=5eeeea51e5&e=7017cc100e) for The Roman Catholic Bishop Of Orange against a lawsuit alleging sexual abuse by Rev. Thomas Naughton, whom the Church ‘relocated to Southern California’ after earlier accusations of sexual misconduct. John Doe 54’s [lawsuit](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=c0117dfbf0&e=7017cc100e) claimed that Fr. Naughton committed ‘acts of childhood sexual assault’ against him from approximately ages nine through 16, including ‘sexual touching, humiliation, masturbation, and anal penetration.’

We have experienced multiple recent social movements that are making different conversations and change possible, including the Ford-Kavanaugh hearing, #WhyIDidn’t Report, Times Up, and #MeToo movements. Weiss dismissing Weiss' representation of the Catholic Church against child sexual assault survivors as mere employment matters further victimizes these courageous survivors. Sen. Dave Min not only stands with survivors, but has authored and passed 8 bills expanding abuse survivors rights and protections, recently introduced a bill protecting adult survivors of clerical abuse, and will soon introduce two more domestic violence bills. ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Weiss represented the Diocese of Orange through multiple years of this litigation, . “California's institutions face a flood of sexual abuse lawsuits” \- The Los Angeles Times 12/28/22 In 2020, Jason Weiss was for The Roman Catholic Bishop Of Orange against a lawsuit alleging sexual abuse by Rev. Thomas Naughton, whom the Church ‘relocated to Southern California’ after earlier accusations of sexual misconduct. John Doe 54’s claimed that Fr. Naughton committed ‘acts of childhood sexual assault’ against him from approximately ages nine through 16, including ‘sexual touching, humiliation, masturbation, and anal penetration.’ We have experienced multiple recent social movements that are making different conversations and change possible, including the Ford-Kavanaugh hearing, #WhyIDidn’t Report, Times Up, and #MeToo movements. Weiss dismissing Weiss' representation of the Catholic Church against child sexual assault survivors as mere employment matters further victimizes these courageous survivors. Sen. Dave Min not only stands with survivors, but has authored and passed 8 bills expanding abuse survivors rights and protections, recently introduced a bill protecting adult survivors of clerical abuse, and will soon introduce two more domestic violence bills. ### California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | Our mailing address is: PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616 | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Dave Min For Senate PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616-5959 USA

name: Team Kennedy
subject: People First:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
“Trust the experts! It’s settled science!”
This is what we were told by the pharmaceutical industry, government bureaucrats and the media when the COVID vaccines were introduced.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s immediate response: “‘Trust the experts’ is not science and there is no such thing as ‘settled science.’” He went on to speak out against the lack of proper testing for COVID vaccines. When he exposed that the vaccines are exempt from pre-licensing safety testing – they don’t have to be tested, and many of them are not – the powers that be went after him with a vengeance.
He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth. He fought for transparency. Get the facts out there and let the American people decide.
Because of this stance, his biggest critic and mudslinger became Dr. Anthony Fauci of the NIAID. This is the same Dr. Fauci who, during a congressional hearing a couple of weeks ago, admitted that the 6-foot social distancing mandate that led to lockdowns and the destruction of our economy “just sort of appeared” and had no basis in science. Fauci is also the man who funded the bioweapons research that caused the COVID pandemic. He despises RFK Jr. for exposing the truth about this dangerous, illegal research as well as Dr. Fauci’s role in the cover up.
RFK Jr. stood up for the American people. He called out Fauci’s illegal gain-of-function research and sought to hold him and his accomplices accountable for their actions.
As a result, Dr. Fauci and his accomplices in the NIH, CDC, and Big Pharma have called RFK Jr. an “anti-vaxxer.” Nothing could be further from the truth.
RFK Jr. believes in vaccines – safe, properly-tested vaccines. He’s used his vast knowledge of medical research and medical testing, along with his favorable public profile and his bully pulpit, to speak truth to power. The American people deserve to have all the facts.
BUT he is not running on vaccines. The only time he talks about vaccines is when someone asks him about it. He is running a campaign of _telling the truth to the American people, including truths that they don’t want to hear_.
He will continue this in the White House.
This is why his favorability rating is the highest among all candidates and his campaign has built the fastest growing populist coalition of left, right, and center. By transparency! Help RFK Jr. bring transparency to our government and our lives.
[Join Team Kennedy and its campaign of truth with your gift of $10, $25 or what you can afford. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=5)
America needs a President not afraid to speak the truth. That President is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_05_24_email_1_1_nd&n=6)

The American people deserve to have all the facts. BUT he is not running on vaccines. The only time he talks about vaccines is when someone asks him about it. He is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people, including truths that they don’t want to hear. He will continue this in the White House. This is why his favorability rating is the highest among all candidates and his campaign has built the fastest growing populist coalition of left, right, and center. By transparency! Help RFK Jr. bring transparency to our government and our lives. America needs a President not afraid to speak the truth. That President is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: David Hogg
subject: Gen Z will outlive the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
We’re counting on your continued support to keep winning these fights.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78466874/453468671/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Y5ZTI5My03YWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRQW96qBAa2D7ixC47Ee3eHbqxmmm93FyKBlKE2K71U=&emci=d6be4d2d-4bc4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=93f9e293-7ac4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=43566853)

| | Mark my words, Peter: **Gen Z will outlive the NRA.**

_The Daily Beast_ recently analyzed the NRA’s tax returns. They aren’t pretty.

In fact, the pro-gun group’s revenue has been on the decline for years now, especially since Parkland. _Last year, their fundraising was at its lowest point since 2008. And since 2018 they have lost over 1 million members._

I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered—and as their power and influence fade into the dustbin of history, we will replace their corrupt, purchased politicians with a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action to stop the scourge of gun violence in America.

**I co-founded Leaders We Deserve because Gen Z’s answer to the NRA is electing more and more young people to public office to counter their agenda.**

[_**With so much riding on the upcoming elections, we’re preparing now so we can elect the leaders we deserve in November. Will you split a $25 contribution to support Leaders We Deserve and the Democratic Party of Georgia today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78466875/453468672/-2074411583?refcode=20240205.2_DH_2F&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Y5ZTI5My03YWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRQW96qBAa2D7ixC47Ee3eHbqxmmm93FyKBlKE2K71U=)

We founded Leaders We Deserve last year to elect the next generation of leadership—and folks across the country are already helping us shatter expectations.

Not only have tens of thousands of people just like you joined our movement and helped spread the word about our mission, we’ve already elected our very first candidate.

In the days leading up to the November election, we hit the streets in Virginia to knock on doors and get out the vote for Nadarius Clark. Thanks to our supporters’ donations, we were proud to invest more than $100,000 to support Nadarius’s campaign.

**When all the ballots were counted, Nadarius won by less than 2,000 votes.**

Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning these fights in 2024. There is too much on the line for us to lose.

[_**Leaders We Deserve and the GA Dems can only be successful in November with your continued support, so can you split a $25 contribution or whatever makes sense for you today? Anything you can give will make a difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78466876/453468673/-2074411583?refcode=20240205.2_DH_2F&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Y5ZTI5My03YWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lRQW96qBAa2D7ixC47Ee3eHbqxmmm93FyKBlKE2K71U=)

Thank you for your consideration,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

[](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6e6ab6d0f9a8403ba9ca36ec9850aeb7&_e=Vhbqj8zlmRJYyiAvAOhIAlmkYsIYFwt-8C69mYRW-tI53Q_8dSJES1zo9KgINa5AEhgzCVxo5vg6sDql4eiLwkSOHICE_F1mJAopblAp2vwi9Ybg_eXBrCqzzU-2_XMhwxOonNh8QS07L2DyxYXbtMS-E2xm1TIDbDWTbVgusZeLhM8R9nUKzjztTtnUfUYWLyEvOA0OOvP4XVowchr2J6nE_jcDPO-Ws26S94bzz2enve7dBZG4Sqb0izxbLJtCdR_88J8ad8K-1jpZch14GyqmnsE8yXZXLOXDds2ukbYRw-iSBgdB4vUHFptWrOx6SVnSSg7YusLuZle4WsEQKBKK5kRDPQoiEtGAuuqZnpF5cpX7alVgnwGx5UbZr6IxOBp7O8REE4W7rotK_7vdwA%3D%3D)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6e6ab6d0f9a8403ba9ca36ec9850aeb7&_e=Vhbqj8zlmRJYyiAvAOhIAlmkYsIYFwt-8C69mYRW-tI53Q_8dSJES1zo9KgINa5AEhgzCVxo5vg6sDql4eiLwkSOHICE_F1mJAopblAp2vwi9Ybg_eXBrCqzzU-2_XMhwxOonNh8QS07L2DyxYXbtMS-E2xm1TIDbDWTbVgusZeLhM8R9nUKzjztTtnUfUYWLyEvOA0OOvP4XVowchr2J6nE_jcDPO-Ws26S94bzz2enve7dBZG4Sqb0izxbLJtCOa0oZNNPT4CH85Cw1p_SKMdORGSrvKsfktV2J4wzjV6JM-4mw6GHIURTfH-ovBlODOcBBbmOqosIbaS0LROWhRrYX66eJoUNOS5D0MtuiHMyvkSDIg9ntadUcW3rihHm7RVtvEr6YqgJA_sJeKTuyg%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6e6ab6d0f9a8403ba9ca36ec9850aeb7&_e=Vhbqj8zlmRJYyiAvAOhIAlmkYsIYFwt-8C69mYRW-tI53Q_8dSJES1zo9KgINa5AEhgzCVxo5vg6sDql4eiLwkSOHICE_F1mJAopblAp2vwi9Ybg_eXBrCqzzU-2_XMhwxOonNh8QS07L2DyxYXbtMS-E2xm1TIDbDWTbVgusZeLhM8R9nUKzjztTtnUfUYWLyEvOA0OOvP4XVowchr2J6nE_jcDPO-Ws26S94bzz2enve7dBZG4Sqb0izxbLJtC2cbxITlIl-YLfbF44cFU6CDtmOhISeSDONmSoWd10VEFbAZ-atUdeHADa2UZ97SXzfpVvcMC-Ie23aCqoTtWUGvqYuFu_KxHUef_9FDdcjvDBT3i-uDLSrY24_8MPf1blyfcne0b-O4zOV9AE7-97Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: enough already
body:
😷💉🫳 |
---
| | We're hitting the committee tomorrow with [our bill to reel in health district powers](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=9e277ae322&e=dea908e0fe "see the bill")...

It’s about keeping them restarined and our freedoms intact.

Because we've seen enough of "do whatever it takes" turning into "do whatever we want."

It’s time to draw a line.

This isn't against public health; it's for making sure measures are fair, needed, and respect our rights.

We're pushing back on any "because we said so" rules.

I expect some to say we're risking public health. Not true. We're ensuring decisions are based on real needs, not just power grabs. It's basically about striking this balance: protect health while keeping our freedoms alive.

And... we need your voice:
1. **To testify (in-person or via video):** if you have a story on how over-the-top health rules have affected you or your biz, we need you to share it. Your voice matters to show why this bill is crucial. [Sign up to testify here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=53ee460160&e=dea908e0fe "sign up").

2. **To watch:** Tune in live. Your support counts, even from afar (same link as above)

Let’s make it clear tomorrow: freedom and health go hand in hand.

No more fear-driven rules. No more UNLIMITED power (which, is what they have now).

Let me know if you’re in to speak up or will be watching.

Every bit of support counts.

Catch you tomorrow at 9 AM MST sharp!

Brian

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=ecb2443267).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7ae287970e&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

$5 might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, we can build a winning campaign in a critical Senate battleground.

$5 today is what we need to go up against our mega-millionaire Republican opponent and a dark money GOP PAC supporting him that has already amassed a record-breaking amount — over $18 million — to spend against us.

| They’re tumbling like dominoes – elected officials who once stood strong against the divisive rhetoric and policies of Donald Trump are now one by one supporting his campaign. It’s shocking and sad to see.

**I took a stand against Trump before, and I'm prepared to do it _again and again._**

During my tenure at the Department of Justice under the Obama Administration, I worked tirelessly to foster fair and strong immigration policies. But the Trump administration derailed well-considered policies with impulsive decisions often announced in late-night tweets. I took a stand and left to work directly supporting Michigan families and defending the Constitution in our community.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.
