body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Hi Peter,
Last week, we shared some really exciting news with you. Kirsten was added to the DCCC’s Red to Blue program. She was among the first of the 17 candidates to be added to this group — and the only one from Arizona!
This is a big deal.
The Tucson Sentinel reported on what this means for our race. You can read it here >> [https://www.tucsonsentinel.com/local/report/012924_engel_dccc/national-dems-invested-engel-election-rematch-vs-ciscomani/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_020524_TucsonSentinel_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_020524_TucsonSentinel_act]
In 2022, Kirsten lost by just 5,000 votes — out of 350,000. That’s just one percent.
And while her opponent was able to avoid questions about abortion on the 2022 campaign trail, we now have him on record voting to restrict access to abortions nationwide.
Kirsten can win this race. The support she’s getting from the DCCC will just add to the momentum she needs to flip this seat blue.
Our people-powered campaign needs folks like you to help us win in November. Even if it’s just $10, it helps us knock on doors, run ads, and get our message out. Will you chip in now to help Kirsten flip AZ-06 and take back the House majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_020524_TucsonSentinel_act]

name: Working Families Party
subject: Join the phone bank: No trading Trump immigration policies for more bombs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, **We’re writing to you ahead of Wednesday’s scheduled vote in the U.S. Senate on immigration policy and military funding that would be a moral and political disaster — in the United States and across the world.** This supplemental funding request, the text of which was just released last night, would turn many cruel Trump-era immigration policies into permanent law. In exchange, Democrats would receive a military aid package that would include $14 billion in unconditional funding to the Israeli government to continue the siege on Gaza which has already killed more than 25,000 Palestinians, mostly women and children. **[Join our virtual phone bank tomorrow, Tuesday, February 6 at 3 PM ET/12 PM PT, and help us reach key Senators ahead of this week’s vote to defeat these inhumane policies.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u7he6CflMW4tcmekjwBnKfev-RazpZfoGcn6ZDcwb17lJhHXWSeQ_iBfjVwE2Ow4X-F-wvrxYJwyUmfGMNUzzVZLQhHp_TSfXBcn0iVBAfdIP5Y3yJ_B6tYHydOtyTU__Cki4YjKHaQDOIhNBazpMWdTaCfP6H7OfyVwk81fObF-DZ3pFCmcpAS4YR9kjNg07a1yDfp5c36H5oExt1ViszSeD3eEz-Rc5UtayaU_0Uciw/43l/Rx3gUqfaRuCmaiFrMfOh5g/h0/2yOrpVdZwNY6isq_wKkVUNHOZjIvBxs3VZqHBoaGpN0)** **[Join the phone bank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-cGYGWrDFVb05z_d7bYwkuqX2sL7b8tFgQYs6rNH_iHX3h12womL-rWANIQELos8u7he6CflMW4tcmekjwBnKfeFcetySHbEGTgyrwCjJiqJNridP-SJAaJB7rK5bbm0aoEUDu9XzKpXjGlEKSqgbuYlJ4HWrA4Q972anepcVoopEgkBEtzNoG_JCnV27lv1dWozxjYWKG5n6RZAvFXDhskhZ60tU5bRDDtqqVjPiQZ1aAkn3CGvmeptLeIbWLty6mVaOvArFFRAcULhK72hr1H4e99c4NrE2nR9_qH15FvpQ/43l/Rx3gUqfaRuCmaiFrMfOh5g/h1/Yo8Q5zEClJX8XS7BySUf3NvCbFtu5D4BmEcEvEJrE7Y)** **The passage of this legislation would mean devastating consequences both for refugees fleeing life-threatening conditions and innocent civilians in Gaza.** **[We ask you to use your voice to help oppose this legislation before Wednesday’s key Senate vote. Can you join the phone bank tomorrow, Tuesday, February 6 at 3 PM ET/12 PM clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re writing to you ahead of Wednesday’s scheduled vote in the U.S. Senate on immigration policy and military funding that would be a moral and political disaster — in the United States and across the world. This supplemental funding request, the text of which was just released last night, would turn many cruel Trump-era immigration policies into permanent law. In exchange, Democrats would receive a military aid package that would include $14 billion in unconditional funding to the Israeli government to continue the siege on Gaza which has already killed more than 25,000 Palestinians, mostly women and children. The passage of this legislation would mean devastating consequences both for refugees fleeing life-threatening conditions and innocent civilians in Gaza. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. My team and I have already started the uphill climb to win the House seat for this community and to bring the voices of our people to Washington.
For my entire life, I have seen what it really means to be part of a community as my parents worked in Pulga Los Portales, our family’s flea market, hustling everyday, running up and down to help fellow community members.
Now, I’m following in their footsteps, working hard everyday to do everything I can for the community that raised me by running to represent the working people of TX-15 in Congress.
I’m running on a platform to build stronger and healthier communities for ALL of us — that means you, Peter — because I have seen firsthand just how hard it is for families in South Texas to get ahead.
**[I’m ready to get to Congress and fight for you and your rights — but first, I’m going to need your help. We have just one month until the primary election and my team and I are ready to hit the ground running! Please chip in whatever you can afford so we can do just that.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_MA5druy_cUbYpRm75Hjhmn_Zh6wdQVjxq6RW3OnqToX08EekTIwWi6E4e8k8G3uidLkZkfDIX5S--vyfnYk5XzD7h1TV8vPm8-yUnQ66PwebJgr-E7X3RvzngMTGOwenh_nel_u1E_LlZGvbbtB62Nr6v_xtjeOrg3ocRsA7afhsKzzwriOXajUCTb4m92uxKRJ2pyiQJlLtECrRkgGRZ6Yyerz45K-hThOdIAijr4U2QydoIZ_sK3GOOw7GLekcx7HQ2vQHgzZloRqnUtAmS_CQ_X5WLrWsSCS0Id8xivGTVFOf_6LJ12F4xe6ANhLLre381kSuvzWvYr6p7RkdmA/43l/WUk-48_lSba_609Yf03A0g/h8/DEn5Zrn9xrnExdXpuiMoDKwtMeoVuQ911-lSb26ts6Q)**

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240205_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20732%2E4449941%2Ee1LlO8)
---
**Elizabeth Warren is 100% right** — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College._

**Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.**

But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!

**[__So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Elizabeth Warren & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away! »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240205_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20732%2E4449941%2Ee1LlO8)**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: my grandmother taught me that grassroots activism matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time
| | |
---
Look, big change starts small.
That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany.
By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. **She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can.**
For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024.
With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. **But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors.**
**[So please, will you chip in $3 or $25 or whatever you can spare today to help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so these grassroots donations are truly critical to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78468158/453472895/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjhiMTNlNS03ZmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7Ea-sP5oF43qj-fr_kBBbSBzNz9NbdP5uX2Rrn2_zE=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78468164/453472901/1575385346?refcode=jtk4788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjhiMTNlNS03ZmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7Ea-sP5oF43qj-fr_kBBbSBzNz9NbdP5uX2Rrn2_zE=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78468165/453472902/1575385346?refcode=jtk4788-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjhiMTNlNS03ZmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7Ea-sP5oF43qj-fr_kBBbSBzNz9NbdP5uX2Rrn2_zE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time | | | Look, big change starts small. That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany. By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can. For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024. With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for believing in the power of raising your voice and uniting together for change. With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Hello,
$5.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this seat. Yes, just $5.
